name: Rick Scott
subject: The Biden-China Alliance

body:
| | | Peter,
---
The more we learn about the Biden family’s shady business dealings with Communist China, the worse it gets.

A new BOMBSHELL report shows that Hunter Biden’s business partner wired over **$1 MILLION of Chinese funds** to various Biden family members.
[**It’s time to hold the Biden family accountable for their corruption. Join us now and STOP the Biden-China alliance!**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=4b450a394a81493c8993ec63ccccf6fe&_e=8SNk41G4Yfq65wGh2kOvkxqcpLL9_Am0ArnFxp2ls_H4aFICMjFkhd4YtJSKHg4ZiPzkNfpxmBoDyKfB4li91objV0zOgR3LaKbyINH2YqKjN0Yn1STpcyPtGiUov0niDEvvN7LoTpv4eB06C8F2vVl0ir3gyFpe0w82a68r_JNPJw8CoEqqHENFB8Ug8-74hRmrJxHelVrs-sAXXenoonlAXO07q_RRaDZKS9iElC8cJA-DYs1MtaU2WgKdr33rCJHwAJinjjPRcFbnCIKKstZ2KJEF667cUutah_zdVLt46ZhMyPOpzW_kGG7320SEsPUmSHOvJGv6num_qGpboxyTZFlVeTVZvxZakbRiO-M%3D)

| | [**STOP THE BIDEN - CHINA ALLIANCE**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=4b450a394a81493c8993ec63ccccf6fe&_e=8SNk41G4Yfq65wGh2kOvkxqcpLL9_Am0ArnFxp2ls_H4aFICMjFkhd4YtJSKHg4ZiPzkNfpxmBoDyKfB4li91objV0zOgR3LaKbyINH2YqKjN0Yn1STpcyPtGiUov0niDEvvN7LoTpv4eB06C8F2vVl0ir3gyFpe0w82a68r_JNPJw8CoEqqHENFB8Ug8-74hRmrJxHelVrs-sAXXenoomoukxR1cOI_bP21RDQfj9DYDyFqJwuvPcDnn0fAdGwrbokuPw6Eo-p6SQLa5G_X8HKtfz1TvKI5OKav34Rxf8G5APgU_-U1fJfdICSlNMY5Kwd1D8ZCbuAHKSaMN91rFRJnb3f9LSRTRHnEbPknSHw%3D)
---
**Here’s the truth: Joe Biden’s appeasement of China is only allowing them to get stronger. **

The White House’s weakness is making us the laughingstock of the world, and the Chinese Communist Party is taking full advantage of it.
_We need REAL leaders who will STAND UP to America’s enemies, and that starts with TAKING BACK THE SENATE with conservatives who aren’t afraid to take a hard line on Communist China._

[**Hold the Biden Administration accountable NOW and help us STAND UP to China with strong, conservative leaders.**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=4b450a394a81493c8993ec63ccccf6fe&_e=8SNk41G4Yfq65wGh2kOvkxqcpLL9_Am0ArnFxp2ls_H4aFICMjFkhd4YtJSKHg4ZiPzkNfpxmBoDyKfB4li91objV0zOgR3LaKbyINH2YqKjN0Yn1STpcyPtGiUov0niDEvvN7LoTpv4eB06C8F2vVl0ir3gyFpe0w82a68r_JNPJw8CoEqqHENFB8Ug8-74hRmrJxHelVrs-sAXXenoonljXn1yOdc0HjACHBiKAis6XILQ1p23Ek45OULdHJHLs8IfDmnKATGnplf7x9aQfL1P_iHR5nMP1jT8AchRPu-qcZv9muU7nJ3U2TaYYwFuLPwiKdDMY6GCZXm6ZB-p8wbg8b-jLYqE4pVOW3xTmHQ%3D)
---
[**STAND UP TO CHINA**](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=4b450a394a81493c8993ec63ccccf6fe&_e=8SNk41G4Yfq65wGh2kOvkxqcpLL9_Am0ArnFxp2ls_H4aFICMjFkhd4YtJSKHg4ZiPzkNfpxmBoDyKfB4li91objV0zOgR3LaKbyINH2YqKjN0Yn1STpcyPtGiUov0niDEvvN7LoTpv4eB06C8F2vVl0ir3gyFpe0w82a68r_JNPJw8CoEqqHENFB8Ug8-74hRmrJxHelVrs-sAXXenoohc6Letm1YnXbI_Z_6HYVekE6JOdXiYYuNOLJFwzc3FQrXc7lXlAhEEszrDvpu76fQSrnqOmXSCZfl2EChrwOmoYlMnKTZgPn_4NmA0G3-nOuyqNY1w0uP9_AZzumjkqxeahlaT6Ha0WTTSIF8C8L5w%3D)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: Sources: IL GOP Leaders Threatening Lawsuits
body:
Democrats have long used lawfare to attack and silence critics. Are IL GOP Leaders preparing to do the same?

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/415dd9772c00/sources-il-gop-leaders-threatening-lawsuits?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Sources: IL GOP Leaders Threatening to Sue Illinois Review, Silence Leading Conservative News Publication in Blatant Attack on Freedom of the Press (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/sources-il-gop-leaders-threatening-to-sue-illinois-review-silence-leading-conservative-news-publication-in-blatant-attack-on-freedom-of-the-press.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)

In Russia, President Vladamir Putin (https://www.npr.org/2022/03/07/1084870797/russia-has-reasserted-state-control-over-the-country-s-major-media-companies?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) signed into law legislation that criminalizes news publications from reporting on anything that contradicts, or is critical of his administration.

In China, a country that leads the world in jailing reporters, there are an estimated
274 journalists (https://www.theguardian.com/media/2020/dec/15/china-jails-the-most-journalists-for-second-year-running?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) currently in prison for reporting on stories that angered the ruling Communist political party – and citizen journalist Zhang Zahn sits in a Chinese prison for her reporting during the pandemic.

Zahn was sentenced to four years in
prison (https://www.theguardian.com/world/2021/nov/05/chinese-journalist-jailed-over-covid-reporting-is-close-to-death-family-say?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for “picking quarrels and provoking trouble” because she questioned Chinese officials’ decision-making process during the early stages of the outbreak.

In Iran, there are
41 journalists (https://rsf.org/en/41-journalists-prison-iran-now-world-s-3rd-biggest-jailer-journalists?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in prison for writing stories that exposed the corruption of Iranian authorities.

In the Philippines (https://cpj.org/2018/07/mission-journal-duterte-leads-tri-pronged-attack-o/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , former President Rodrigo Duterte routinely harassed and bullied media organizations critical of his administration and policies, and he even “rationalized the killing of journalists.”
A rally calling for greater press freedom in Manila in January 2018. Philippine journalists say President Rodrigo Duterte is trying to intimidate the media. (AFP/Ted Aljibe)

And just recently, senior – and former IL GOP officials have sent representatives to try and intimidate the editor-in-chief and publisher of this publication – and threatening them with lawsuits in an attempt to silence and stop Illinois Review from publishing any more stories critical of the Republican Party of Illinois and its leaders – in a blatant and deliberate attack on First Amendment rights – and more specifically, Freedom of the Press.

Censoring media outlets is typical in third world countries ruled by dictators – but for Republican Party of Illinois leaders to want to censor the leading conservative news publication in Illinois because they are bothered by the facts is both sad and alarming.

Think about that – Republican leaders wanting to censure and silence a conservative Republican news publication.

Only in Illinois.

But sometimes, the truth hurts.

Is it not a fact that IL GOP chair Don Tracy’s family-owned company, Dot Foods, where he is an owner,
donated (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/dot-foods/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000044109&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) to Democratic presidential candidate Joe Biden in 2020?

Is it not a fact that in 2002, Don Tracy ran in the Illinois primary for the 50th State Senate District as a
Democrat (https://www.elections.il.gov/ElectionOperations/CandidateDetailEO.aspx?CandidateID=R%2fbzwrvri7J3D7vdz10qXA%3d%3d&ElectionID=pq0YmF3ui0Y%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ?

Is it not a fact that on September 4, 2020 – just months before his election as chair of the Illinois Republican Party, Tracy made a personal donation to
Citizens for Judge Emily Sutton (https://www.elections.il.gov/CampaignDisclosure/ContributionSearchByAllContributions.aspx?ddlContributionType=wOGh3QTPfKqV2YWjeRmjTeStk426RfVK&ddlState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTime=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&ddlFiledDateTimeThru=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&txtLastOnlyName=xs6pE3aHsP7GjQPVV6Ds2A%3d%3d&ddlLastOnlyNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&txtFirstName=2IwpeG5iH7o%3d&ddlFirstNameSearchType=uhV70GVj7rs2mYAJ0IPVG%2fPXF28eNgo%2f&ddlVendorState=Ry707kcsXsM%3d&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a Democrat running for Circuit Court Judge in the 9th Judicial Circuit of Illinois?

Is it not a fact that IL GOP national committeeman Richard Porter’s law firm, Kirkland & Ellis, where he is a
senior partner (https://www.kirkland.com/lawyers/p/porter-richard-w-pc?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , donated to Joe Biden (https://www.opensecrets.org/orgs/kirkland-ellis/summary?topnumcycle=2022&contribcycle=2022&lobcycle=2022&outspendcycle=2022&id=D000000811&toprecipcycle=2020&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and Kamala Harris in 2020, during the height of the pandemic and lockdowns?

Is it not a fact that Kirkland & Ellis also represents Pritzker family interests, including
Pritzker Private Capital (https://www.kirkland.com/news/press-release/2021/09/kirkland-advises-pritzker-on-nai-group?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ?

Is it not a fact that the Republican Party of Illinois
weaponized (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/il-gop-weaponized-postage-discount-to-attack-conservative-candidates-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) their postage discount to attack conservative candidates during the primary?

It’s okay for the IL GOP to send out, and pay for mailers that are full of lies and deliberately deceive Republican voters – even photoshopping pictures of Gov. JB Pritzker and disgraced former Democratic House Speaker Mike Madigan alongside conservative Republican candidates, to trick voters into thinking that they are not real Republicans – but it’s not okay for this publication to publish stories backed by evidence and facts.
A copy of a mailer attacking Republican conservative grassroots House candidate Travis Weaver during the 2022 Illinois Primary, using a fake and misleading photograph with Democrat Gov. JB Pritzker.
A copy of a mailer “Paid for by the Illinois Republican Party” attacking Republican conservative grassroots House candidate Travis Weaver with lies and falsely linking him to disgraced Democratic House Speaker Mike Madigan and Gov. JB Pritzker during the 2022 Illinois Primary.

What a strange world.

In
exclusive audio (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/exclusive-audio-don-tracy-admits-irvin-campaign-used-il-gop-postage-discount-during-primary.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) obtained by Illinois Review, Tracy, during a meeting with conservative leaders last July, admits that the Richard Irvin campaign for governor was allowed to use the IL GOP postage discount for mailers – a perk not afforded to other gubernatorial candidates during the primary.

Tracy acknowledges the Irvin campaign’s use of the postage discount in the recording, but says the IL GOP was taking its “direction from the Senate Caucus and the House Caucus” – meaning he was re-directing the responsibility for that decision to then-Senate Republican leader Dan McConchie and then-House Republican leader Jim Durkin – the leaders of the Senate and House Caucuses.

And Illinois Review is releasing, for the very first time, a portion of that exclusive audio where Tracy shifts the blame to Durkin and McConchie for deciding who had usage of the postage discount, stating,

“And that goes, we take direction from the Senate Caucus and the House Caucus.”
https://www.youtube.com/shorts/T364wkfTC4E?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
In exclusive audio obtained by Illinois Review, IL GOP chair Don Tracy blames Durkin and McConchie for the Irvin campaign’s usage of the postage discount, saying the IL GOP took direction from “the Senate and the House Caucus.”

Is it not a fact that Durkin lost seats (https://abc7chicago.com/jim-durkin-illinois-resigns-republicans-darren-bailey/12686513/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in the House when he was Minority leader during the November election?

Is it not a fact that Durkin
voted (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/01/breaking-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-votes-with-democrats-to-ban-assault-weapons.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with the Democrats to ban assault weapons?

Is it not a fact that Durkin’s Western Springs
home (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/04/former-il-house-gop-leader-jim-durkin-selling-home-months-after-resigning-from-humiliating-election-defeats-postage-discount-abuse-revelations.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) is up for sale?

Is it not a fact that the chair of the IL GOP Finance Committee, Vince Kolber, has
vote (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) d (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2022/12/il-gop-treasurer-to-grassroots-during-meeting-if-you-havent-donated-then-why-are-you-here.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in Wisconsin and Illinois?

Is it not a fact that Orland Park Mayor Keith Pekau, who is a close ally of the IL GOP leadership, harassed and intimidated female
Fire District candidates (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/witnesses-keith-pekau-harasses-intimidates-female-orland-fire-dist-candidates-follows-them-in-his-car-while-they-knocked-on-doors.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , and then followed them in his car?

Is it not a fact that Pekau routinely attacks and harasses constituents
online (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/mayor-keith-pekau-attacks-insults-constituents-online-proving-hes-a-better-fit-as-a-server-at-ed-debevics-than-mayor-of-orland-park.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ?

Is it not a fact that Pekau honored progressive, liberal Democrat and former US Rep. Marie Newman and awarded her with a
Community Appreciation Award (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/orland-park-mayor-keith-pekau-honors-praises-democrat-marie-newman-who-pushed-for-vaccinating-children-during-village-board-meeting.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) ?

Is it not a fact that Pekau rewards top campaign donors (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/mayor-keith-pekau-playing-favorites-hires-big-campaign-donor-who-also-donated-to-lightfoot-to-develop-orland-park-land-deal-worth-253m.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) with city contracts?

And while IL GOP officials are obsessed with wanting to sue Illinois Review and silence this publication, they remain silent on matters where a lawsuit would have been helpful.

For example, Illinois Republican US Senate candidate Kathy Salvi’s name was left off the
ballot (https://www.breitbart.com/politics/2022/10/13/county-leaves-kathy-salvis-name-off-illinois-ballot-for-u-s-senate/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) in one county, and when local officials tried to fix the problem, Salvi responded by stating that their efforts did not “solve the most pressing problem of election integrity and transparency.”

Salvi went on to say that voters have “been potentially disenfranchised” because of the mistake.

And where was the IL GOP with their lawsuit?

They were silent.

Illinois Review recently learned that when a local Republican leader raised the alarm about a Democratic-controlled county clerk’s office playing games with assigning Republicans to serve as election judges, Tracy and IL GOP officials had a simple
message (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/02/we-cant-help-you-il-gop-leaders-abandon-conservative-school-board-candidates-while-pritzker-goes-on-the-attack-and-funds-their-opponents.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) for this concerned, local Republican leader who was desperate for some help and guidance: “Sorry, but we can’t help you.”

This is deliberate election interference – and where was the IL GOP with their lawsuit?

They were silent.

And when Gov. Pritzker signed an unconstitutional assault weapons ban, where was the IL GOP with their lawsuit?

They were silent.

When Gov. Pritzker abused his executive powers and shut down schools and businesses, and forced children to wear masks, where was the IL GOP with their lawsuit?

They were silent.

When Gov. Pritzker extended his “supreme executive power” for the
40th time (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/03/gov-pritzker-extends-supreme-executive-power-and-issues-40th-covid-19-emergency-declaration-says-state-remains-a-disaster-area.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) , declaring that the State of Illinois is still a disaster area from the effects of the pandemic – in a blatant abuse of power, where was the IL GOP with their lawsuit?

They were silent.

But now, when this publication shines light on the many problems with party leadership—this is what motivates them to run to the court and sue?

If IL GOP leaders follow through on their threats and sue this publication, they’ll join the ranks of Russia, China and Iran.

And here at home they’ll join the ranks of Twitter, before Elon Musk, Facebook, YouTube and allies of the Democratic Party – who routinely censor conservative voices.

If there was ever a time to file a lawsuit – it would be against the Republican Party of Illinois for dereliction of duty.

It’s no wonder why Republicans always lose in Illinois – their leaders are more concerned about taking out conservative Republicans and conservative news publications than they are about defeating Democrats and winning elections.

“Silence conservative voices, but leave the Democrats alone” is the new motto of the Republican Party of Illinois.
https://www.goldentreewealth.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=c7317264c7-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_04_10_07_10&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-c7317264c7-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

name: Bob Casey
subject: I’m making a big announcement
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61608878/400589365/1846241399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE0MmQ3Yy1mY2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zoZZ6JeFGAX9vXK3YxfmK_cA5vc_ZK2Gx9fulH63DXY=)
Hi Peter,

I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election.**

It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
**But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**
[**If you’re with me, will you split a donation between Patty Murray and our campaign today? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61608879/400589367/1846241399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE0MmQ3Yy1mY2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zoZZ6JeFGAX9vXK3YxfmK_cA5vc_ZK2Gx9fulH63DXY=)
| | [CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61608880/400589368/1846241399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE0MmQ3Yy1mY2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zoZZ6JeFGAX9vXK3YxfmK_cA5vc_ZK2Gx9fulH63DXY=)
---
In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red.

Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton.
**Peter, I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth.

But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.
**[Become a Founding Donor and join our team by splitting a donation between our campaign and Patty Murray today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61608881/400589369/1846241399?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk9-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZWE0MmQ3Yy1mY2Q3LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zoZZ6JeFGAX9vXK3YxfmK_cA5vc_ZK2Gx9fulH63DXY=)**
In a race as important as this one, people like you make all the difference.

Thank you,

Bob Casey
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/q9iNeaDCVUi-n6xIKf7j9g2?unsubscribedata=FJ0lDpzdJ%2BrgC0WDfWweOHHwtazE5gGEwikiLaSMxQaQf74584EW5na879YOCvZAnC54G38FNL5xIOIfVvV4ko1XHuDKdF7r%2FcNFB7RTEafKBoeXdPWsuN3TQurh1pfXIPS9bxIzSyK9m0Cs0RfglJw9PruXp2bTAqgPqejQVfDCxdKitB5yNPxtU%2BYbWqWFynxMDxWKcJmOiAyJHwRxLVnvTzMkZquvEF7HRTP0hM9%2BQtoyqAzF6Y1I%2Fy8zRBE9Fr7XyG%2FDVjvO0jG%2B0z2Qm5BBJ%2FfOvhXHS2THQQK7QAOtEqKUFoRbGtwS%2FIGJ2Rc9IbrozPgFf5WWqYq%2B1Dcye7wsuZIaLcuAEuXLsVTwuW7SU%2BRObk63QbiKwnGtZEl4XGUExJtkZjwjQDswpCF0mxfsZ8criC%2FbNIv6Cu742e9WIuXnqOuY8bb%2FxG4G5olx) Test

name: =?utf-8?Q?Amanda=20St.=20George?=
subject: FW: Exciting Update: Liz Harrington to Keynote the Republican Action Conference!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us May 5th and 6th in Kennewick for the Republican Action Conference! | | |
---
|
---
| | Hey Peter,

I just wanted to make sure you saw the news about our fantastic new keynote speaker for the upcoming Republican Action Conference on May 5th and 6th. We're incredibly excited to have Liz Harrington, Trump's Spokesperson, join us at the event!

As you may know, Liz is a prominent conservative voice and will be sharing her insights on the current political landscape, including the unprecedented indictment of former President Trump. Trust me, [you won't want to miss her speech!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6cd750f49f&e=6a281f566d)

If you haven't registered yet, now's the time to [secure your spot](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=d73384c043&e=6a281f566d) and join fellow Republicans for engaging panel discussions, networking opportunities, and an unforgettable experience. Plus, take advantage of our Early Bird Registration for discounted rates.

[Sign up ASAP and join us to hear from Liz Harrington and other inspiring speakers](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=22ecb3d45d&e=6a281f566d)

---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=a86245fbff&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| Best,

Amanda St. George
Director of Administrative Services
Washington State Republican Party
---
|
---
| **BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE:**
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
---
|
---
| | Peter,

We have some fantastic news for the upcoming 2023 Republican Action Conference! We're thrilled to announce that we've secured none other than Donald Trump's 2024 Campaign Spokesperson, Liz Harrington as our new Keynote Speaker!

Liz Harrington is a prominent conservative voice and a well-respected figure within the Republican Party. As a former National Spokesperson for the Republican National Committee and current Spokesperson for President Trump, she brings a wealth of knowledge and experience to the stage.

[Don't miss this exclusive opportunity](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=ee27af77b1&e=6a281f566d) to hear Liz Harrington share her insights on the current political landscape, the future of the Republican Party, and how we can work together to secure victories in upcoming elections.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bb1332f508&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Join us at the Republican Action Conference on May 5th and 6th](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=cf4565bb29&e=6a281f566d) at the Red Lion Hotel, Kennewick Columbia Center, for an unforgettable experience. Here's a quick overview of what you can expect:
* Engaging panel discussions and workshops on topics like campaigning, grassroots activism, citizen lobbying, ballot collection, fundraising, and digital media
* A Friday night social reception for networking with fellow Republicans and enjoying a fun-filled evening
* The exclusive Saturday night banquet with Keynote Speaker Liz Harrington

Don't wait – secure your spot at the conference today!
---
| [Register for the Republican Action Conference today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=424e332e1c&e=6a281f566d "Register for the Republican Action Conference today!")
---
| [Take action now and register for the conference to hear from Trump Spokesperson Liz Harrington and connect with other passionate Republicans ready to take back our state in 2023 and 2024.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b770622080&e=6a281f566d)

We can't wait to see you there!
\- Team WAGOP
---
| | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/wsrp/rac2023-reminder-1340896?e=6a281f566d)
---
| _Copyright © 2023 Washington State Republican Party, All rights reserved._

You can [update your preferences](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/profile?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=7b11bf166a) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=4f90cbb438&e=6a281f566d&c=7b11bf166a).

name: Kash Patel
subject: J6 Choir tops music charts
body:
Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zk6i7c034etf2mt7obf7r3l5najqkr66o0uqcnfg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9g6eoj6c5h2bs)

Friend,

Do you know what the Jan 6th detainees do every night from the confines of their jail cells?

**They sing the national anthem.**

And they have sung this song proudly every night for _more than 700 straight nights_. This song is more than just a sign of their patriotism. It’s an exercise in their freedom of speech, even from the depths of the D.C. gulag.

We captured that audio and had the greatest President, Donald J. Trump, recite the Pledge of Allegiance. Then we combined those recordings to create a song you need to hear. All net proceeds from the song go to certain Jan 6 families in need.

**The song, Justice for All, is number 1 on the Billboard Digital Charts!**

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zr3o3gb09caf3nqvhoiv0nlriegt0o7pvcrg1sv0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9g6eoj6c5h2bs)

[_**Please listen to this song and support our efforts to provide legal resources to some Jan 6 families. **_](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z2bpf78pgndp0n6aom6pa1a21ge5dtsn66que7t0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9g6eoj6c5h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no _“deadly insurrection.”_ **The video evidence proves it for many!** This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

It’s time to act and help to support these families.

My goal is to reach 1,000 new donors in the next 48 hours to fund their legal battles in court. **Will you stand up and help Jan 6 families?**

name: American Briefing
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
A few years ago, New York magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?”

| | | This sponsored message from American Briefing is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zc7fvh7k5bq8iidmmon1etc6hbldfdmt3l8ug4mg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71cth2bs)
---
| |
Dear Fellow American, A few years ago, _New York_ magazine posed the question: “When Did Everyone Become a Socialist?” This is, of course, an exaggeration. But it makes clear that the far-Left in America aims to bring about a “Great Reset” of our economy and our way of life. In a recent issue of _Imprimis_ —Hillsdale College’s digest of liberty—author Michael Rectenwald described the economic goal of the Great Reset as “‘capitalism with Chinese characteristics’—a two-tiered economy, with profitable monopolies and the state on top and socialism for the majority below.” Today, as a supporter of liberty, you can help Hillsdale College understand the extent of support for—and opposition to—socialism. Your input will help us develop the most effective strategy to fight for the future of liberty in our country. **Will you please share your views on the political, social, and cultural forces promoting socialism in our country by completing your National Survey on Socialism using the secure link below?** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zls2okst029f5fb46tlo0r9ib5g92lj1mgvglmb8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71cth2bs)** Sadly, socialism is becoming increasingly popular, especially among the young. You may be aware of a SHOCKING survey showing that... **. . . during the COVID-19 pandemic, support for socialism among those 16 to 23 years old jumped to 49 percent, and socialism also increased in popularity among all ages.** **Why is this?** Draconian government lockdown measures destroyed businesses and eliminated competitors of corporate monopolists. These policies were a dream come true for corporate socialists. At the same time, too many young Americans have not been taught what socialism really means. Or the dismal history of its failures wherever it has been tried. This is a result of the far-Left’s “long march through the institutions”—including colleges and universities, K-12 schools, and the media. Marxist-inspired critical race theory is a prime example. Once confined to the classrooms of far-Left professors, critical race theory has infiltrated every level of government, as well as school boards and even the military. But it is in our schools where the effects of critical race theory—which teaches young Americans to categorize their fellow citizens according to race—are most dangerous. You may recall that many young Americans with college degrees who championed socialist policies participated in the riots and violence we witnessed in the summer of 2020. In the face of well-financed and widespread efforts to destroy free markets and individual liberty, Hillsdale’s work to **reach** and **teach** millions has never been more urgently needed. **That’s why I need your thoughts quickly.** By responding to the **National Survey on Socialism** in the next five days**,** your honest opinions will help us understand the recent rise of socialism and develop our strategy to **reach** and **teach** increasing millions of Americans on behalf of liberty. We hope to hear from friends representing every part of the country. Education is the surest way to turn back this dangerous trend. And your partnership with Hillsdale College is critical. As Winston Churchill said, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” If you agree, please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Socialism** today. **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/take-the-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zp2ig5vva6c3hd3c8r19tr74g6o03ouun5bncl8o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71cth2bs)** Despite the recent successes of the far-Left, we must remember—**it is NEVER too late to defend liberty through education**. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zub0fgvpir2ji7015d1oi4bgijbjg5ph327099dg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60o74cjgeeoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zu58kgcpj41tcmfhvj2l9pmsdl6kq2vt8cafa33g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71cth2bs)_

subject: Public enemy #1 to the Radical Democrats
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
This is Chairman James Comer:

| |

---
| | | This is Chairman James Comer.

I can't believe how fast I became public enemy #1 of the Radical Democrats.

Joe Biden's Treasury Department is **STONEWALLING** our oversight investigations... Hunter Biden **LAWYERED UP** when I mentioned the word "subpoena"... The Liberal Media is **SMEARING** my name across the airwaves... Pete Buttigieg just **ATTACKED** me on social media when I discussed a probe into his agency...

_**[After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we're exposing, I won't let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I'm personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3cg9tlnifl6a7j51dng8clfb5fbol8sc0ti8tbg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71c9h2bs "After all the corruption, scandals, and cover-ups by Radical Democrats that we’ve begun exposing, I won’t let them intimidate me into silence. But I need your help to fight back. So I’m personally asking everyone getting this email to stand with House Republicans by chipping in JUST five bucks a piece. ")**_

It's no surprise they're desperate to stop our important work...

They've been let off the hook for YEARS with Nancy Pelosi in charge of accountability. Biden and the Radical Democrats were NEVER forced to answer for anything.

No one held them accountable... and they took full advantage.

**As the GOP 's lead investigator, I promise you they will now. **

But going up against the Liberal powers at be is a monumental undertaking. They've tried trashing my reputation, jamming up my investigations, and threatening our House Majority. The only thing that can stop them is the power of our ENTIRE grassroots standing up and fighting back.

_**[Are you with me? I'm counting on it.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zc1pcsmpdiicj98p8llclrmajft3b92emjlctcsg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9i60o71c9h2bs "Are you with me? I’m counting on it. ")**_

subject: Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, Ben Shapiro, Glenn Beck, and Donald Trump Jr.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: [Action Needed] The Trans Bill of Rights
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544706:64pMmqG3N:m:1:3391001263:0749D9CB65EA05764659ACD188134224:r) Peter,

Far-Left, extreme trans activists are pushing a new "Trans Bill of Rights" in Congress.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544706:64pMmqG3N:m:1:3391001263:0749D9CB65EA05764659ACD188134224:r) | | [ STOP THE TRANS BILL OF RIGHTS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544706:64pMmqG3N:m:1:3391001263:0749D9CB65EA05764659ACD188134224:r)
---

This "Trans Bill of Rights" is 10 pages of mentally unstable wokeness and will completely warp reality in our country. Here are just a few of the INSANE things they are trying to push:

* Amend the Civil Rights Act, the Fair Housing Act, and the Equal Credit Opportunity Act to ban discrimination based on gender identity... **_That means Trans become a protected class and women's rights are totally and completely annihilated._** Men pretending to be women would not just be equal to women in all areas, they would be preferred and above all women, essentially replacing women.
* It also says to improve conditions for trans in jails and asylum facilities, create community services to support trans abuse survivors, **_and give priority to trans asylum seekers. Key word there, "priority."_**
* Calls for a ban on conversion therapy, a type of therapy many former trans and detransitioners have undergone to successfully change their life.
* Calls for **_codification of Roe v. Wade_** which would make abortion legal in all 50 states, destroy state rights, and ensure the murder of babies all over America.
* Calls for prohibiting the withholding of services to trans people on religious grounds, **_which destroys religious liberty._**
* Calls for education laws to ensure students have the right to participate in sports that best align with their gender, and use facilities that correspond to their preferred gender, **_which destroys Title IV and women's rights._**
* Also calls for trans in schools to have access to curriculum and books that accurately portray the "substantive history and identity of LGBTQI+ people and Black and indigenous people of color." **_Access to those grooming and brainwashing books means grooming and brainwashing for all children, and parents could not stop it._** _This would undo the Republican's recently passed Parent's Bill of Rights_.
* Also calls for getting rid of government restrictions on access to gender affirming care for trans adults and youth. **_This means the great laws Republican states have been passing that protect children from Trans surgeries, puberty blockers, and hormones would be wiped out and kids would not be safe anywhere._**

We MUST launch an immediate and overwhelming response to this evil masquerading as "equality." If you just read that entire list of bullet points, **[I absolutely need you to sign my petition in opposition to the"Trans Bill of Rights" immediately](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544706:64pMmqG3N:m:1:3391001263:0749D9CB65EA05764659ACD188134224:r).**

If patriots like you fail to take action after learning what's happening, we will lose the fight against gender insanity.

**[So please, sign my petition and share it with your friends - it will only take a moment](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544706:64pMmqG3N:m:1:3391001263:0749D9CB65EA05764659ACD188134224:r).**

_In Liberty,_

MTG

subject: Breaking News: Sgt. Perry Found Guilty - Tucker Carlson Reveals the Story
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544146:JfnByqGRN:m:1:3365131770:20E841B5C73C7B0137DFC0F0BDE19295:r)
---
| | We are heartbroken to announce that** Sgt. Daniel Perry has been found guilty**, leaving his family and all of us in shock. Despite this devastating news, we refuse to give up. We believe in Daniel's innocence and are determined to fight for justice. A strong appeal can turn the tide in his favor, but we need your help. Your generous support will not only fund Daniel's legal appeal but also help us raise awareness about his case. Together, we can make a difference in his fight for justice. **As Tucker notes in his segment, the Austin Police concluded it was a justified act of self-defense!** Please join us in supporting Daniel and his family during this challenging time. Pray for them and consider making a contribution to the cause. Don't wait - every dollar and prayer counts. Dig deep for Daniel and stand with us in the fight for justice. **Don 't Let Black Lives Matter Murder This Soldier!** In July, 2020 in Austin, Texas, a Black Lives Matter maniac started to point his AK-47 rifle at Army Sergeant Daniel Perry. **Sergeant Perry responded immediately, firing in self-defense with his legally carried revolver, and stopped his attacker.** Then another member of the rabid BLM mob tried to murder Perry, firing four times at him, striking his car with three bullets. But a George Soros-backed district attorney targeted Daniel - and now the verdict :( **Please don 't let that leftist prosecutor finish the job that Black Lives Matter started -- save Sergeant Perry's life by fully funding his critically important legal defense with your crucial gift of any amount NOW!**

subject: The Source of Our Freedom Is Our Creator, Not Government

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, we are now 100 days into this session of Congress — and that's a big deal. Let me explain why:
My Democratic colleagues and I have spent these first months of the year identifying our top priorities for the legislative session, introducing bills and rallying the votes we need to send these laws to President Biden's desk. **Right now, I'm working to expand Social Security benefits, fully fund the World Trade Center Health Program and negotiate key items in the huge Farm Bill that Congress passes every five years — combating food insecurity and increasing access to nutritious meals.**
And, as all this happens, voters are tuning in to see which party is leading our country forward. _What happens in these next few months will play a key role in deciding which party controls Washington in 2024._
That's why I need to hear from top supporters like you to make sure that Democratic leadership is meeting your expectations.** I've put together a special Generic Ballot Poll to measure enthusiasm for our majority, and I'm counting on 5,000 responses to reach statistical significance. Please, will you respond before this survey closes at midnight?**
**Which party would you vote for?**
| | | [DEMOCRAT](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627612/400633728/246536475?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4043-su-nd&refcode=jtk4043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPy5h6oGcXkKKg2gOhZhvth2weajbuNbFxxCn7kUY=&emci=20d86b65-b9d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9759d772-69d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

| [REPUBLICAN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627613/400633729/246536475?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4043-su-nd&refcode=jtk4043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPy5h6oGcXkKKg2gOhZhvth2weajbuNbFxxCn7kUY=&emci=20d86b65-b9d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=9759d772-69d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)

Thank you so much for making your voice heard today.

With gratitude,

Kirsten
|
* * *
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627614/400633730/1575385346?code=jtk4043-su-nd&refcode=jtk4043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPy5h6oGcXkKKg2gOhZhvth2weajbuNbFxxCn7kUY=) A note from Kirsten: Friend, I can’t thank you enough for standing by my side in the critical fights ahead of us. As Democrats face our toughest Senate map in decades, I need your help more than ever. While Republicans only have to defend 10 seats in 2024, Democrats have to defend 23 – and if the GOP flips just two of them, it will deliver Senate control back to Mitch McConnell. Now, Nate Silver’s FiveThirtyEight is saying that the GOP has a clear path to the majority. As right-wing special interests gear up to pour millions into flipping the Senate, we need to fight back right now. But I refuse to take a single cent from corporate PACs, which means I’m relying on your grassroots support. [**So please, chip in to help defend our narrow Democratic Senate majority.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627615/400633731/1575385346?code=jtk4043-su-nd&refcode=jtk4043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPy5h6oGcXkKKg2gOhZhvth2weajbuNbFxxCn7kUY=) And if you’d like to become a core member of my team and receive exclusive texts from my campaign, [**text JOIN to 60708.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627616/400633732/1575385346?code=jtk4043-su-nd&refcode=jtk4043-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5NzU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iCaPy5h6oGcXkKKg2gOhZhvth2weajbuNbFxxCn7kUY=) Thank you, Kirsten Gillibrand

body:
|
---
| | | **BREAKING: House Judiciary Committee announces field hearing in Manhattan where corrupt DA Alvin Bragg's failed agenda is letting crime surge out of control!**
* * *
Peter,

Everyone knows corrupt Manhattan DA Alvin Bragg has one focus, and one focus only:

PROSECUTING TRUMP FOR BOGUS CHARGES.

Meanwhile, he downgrades violent felonies and crime spirals out of control on his watch. He's a politically motivated zealot, not an even-handed prosecutor. _And House Republicans are coming to Manhattan to expose his incompetence._
---
| | | [READ YOUR FULL BRIEFING](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545014:JHovYqGNQ:m:1:3391001263:3BB3CEE5DE36808FBA9598B92F9D633C:r "READ YOUR FULL BRIEFING")
---
Here's what your House Majority is doing RIGHT NOW to hold DA Alvin Bragg - and the radical Democrats backing him - accountable:
- We're **DEMANDING** key witnesses testify in Congress
- We're swearing them in **UNDER OATH**
- We're tracking down **EVERY PENNY** of federal funds
- We're **SUBPOENAING** internal communications
- **AND NOW** we're exposing Bragg's laser focus on stopping President Trump instead of prosecuting violent criminals
No matter how much they try to stop us, House Republicans will turn over every stone in this corrupt prosecution. _**[If you're with us, we urge you in the strongest possible terms to stand with House Republicans as we expose this power grab, hold those responsible accountable, and fight for what's right.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545014:JHovYqGNQ:m:1:3391001263:3BB3CEE5DE36808FBA9598B92F9D633C:r "If you’re with us, we
urge you in the strongest possible terms to stand with House Republicans as we expose this power grab, hold those responsible accountable, and fight
for what’s right.")**_

We're making our final preparations before heading to Manhattan. Before then, we sincerely hope to hear back from you.

Thank you,
House GOP

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: One of the things that's so exhausting about Republican lawmakers is they'll cheat any chance they get. Often, they don't even try to hide it, like how they’re blatantly trying to cheat Jon Tester out of his Senate seat, with a rule that won’t apply to their favored incumbents.
body:
Heads they win, tails we lose
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c19a732-afc4-4a91-92ba-cacde43cc682/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **Among the things that are exhausting about Republican lawmakers is they'll cheat any chance they get. Often, they don't even try to hide it. ** **Take Democratic Senator Jon Tester. _Though he represents a red state, he's stood with Democrats on every major vote. He's from a farming family, fits Montana perfectly. So, unable to defeat him three times now, Republicans are cheating._** _>From a Montana Public Radio story on a state-senate bill:_ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0b375003-0e07-44fe-bce6-734fcd72d931/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Smaller parties often win some of the anti-incumbent vote, splitting it up._ **_**So the state senate passed a bill creating a top-two primary regardless of party.** _**_Yet, they only applied this change to one person--Jon Tester. They specifically targeted the only Democrat elected statewide. _****_In other words: Cheating._** [**_We can't let them get away with this or we'll lose a great Senator and control of the U.S. Senate. Will you join us in donating to Jon Tester right now to ensure he runs and wins no matter how much Republicans try to cheat their way to victory?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3c821984-b295-4d79-a41c-8d78ae60e83a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for not letting them cheat their way to victory._ Cliff
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---

| Having trouble viewing this email? [View it in your web browser](https://blueampstrategies.salsalabs.org/testerrulechange-2-n?wvpId=368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc39de2b9-1a82-47af-b45a-d91f1ea41e01/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

I’m on the road with Nikki and wanted to make sure you heard the news. Nikki Haley is hosting town halls and making special appearances throughout the state of Iowa THIS WEEK! Nikki had her first town hall last night, but that was just the beginning of her busy week in Iowa. It is critical we send her a surge of support before she makes her next stop, TONIGHT. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=091a5212deef8a612c27c5ff618bf82148da085d25cb70ddb5d9e32322f261dc92e27fa24d78fb911df0738f22cdb4f8f212629e2f715c1631d0dc20910dd39f >">It would mean a lot if you could send a small donation of $5, $10, $15, or any amount to help Nikki continue to reach voters across the country, and let her know you have her back as she fights for America’s future. >> https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=091a5212deef8a612c27c5ff618bf82148da085d25cb70ddb5d9e32322f261dc92e27fa24d78fb911df0738f22cdb4f8f212629e2f715c1631d0dc20910dd39f SUPPORT NIKKI HALEY ON THE CAMPAIGN TRAIL Nikki is working diligently to spread her message of freedom and strength to as many hardworking, committed patriots as possible. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=091a5212deef8a612c27c5ff618bf82148da085d25cb70ddb5d9e32322f261dc92e27fa24d78fb911df0738f22cdb4f8f212629e2f715c1631d0dc20910dd39f BUT she knows that is only possible with you by her side. name: Becky Wagner
subject: My police officer husband is facing ten years in prison
body:
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...

Dear Friend,
I wish I were writing to you under happier circumstances...
...but my hero police officer husband, Mark Wagner, is the next big target of the radical anti-police movement and I urgently need your help before they make an example out of him.
That's Mark in the picture I sent you, along with our boys Nolan and Jacob and dog Kilo.
[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2af86fc3239a4b949585b2cb29f6d98e&_e=fbWHDXv9HSad2mbLHNoAywmM32RQWamp7_bnSaEk0Z8WpazjiiTXnI1jfFHV9tsLSUDK3UnCsr1PXcWsyo-xU-D7mKIlEC0AwYnyRRY3z5ewI25D0UAvyoX1xEndKn59OHVFxUSnn8FE2OE4qoH9SmvpUGyvIWdERsDvgJ6MOxc4euqxR34-Bd3g-GKU0MLqxJA3Zp-u3FS5aV1u-hJ-JuI2iUQV8QpEfgVMkhe0Md0UFossfXz4eQ70S6LvWE2RK_On_KAgpCa7VHm5W4PJNaL491nDfFwTpRNM1PT0zCYz8Z7hbe8gycjGrIEJwZzs3rX58ACPB8jAz1n4XrH_6aRjiTtMarSIF2N-NWFQkOI%3D)
Not only is Mark a highly respected officer, he's an incredibly supportive father, a loving husband, and a fierce friend.
He's dedicated his life to protecting others. But we live in far-Left Madison, Wisconsin - and the "defund the police" mob whipped up rage, LIED about what happened, and trashed Mark's reputation.
And now Mark faces 10 YEARS behind bars for doing exactly what he was trained to do in the line of duty - and I'm scared I might lose him. [**That 's why I wrote this letter to you, someone I've never met before, to ask for your help.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2af86fc3239a4b949585b2cb29f6d98e&_e=fbWHDXv9HSad2mbLHNoAywmM32RQWamp7_bnSaEk0Z8WpazjiiTXnI1jfFHV9tsLSUDK3UnCsr1PXcWsyo-xU-D7mKIlEC0AwYnyRRY3z5ewI25D0UAvyoX1xEndKn59OHVFxUSnn8FE2OE4qoH9SmvpUGyvIWdERsDvgJ6MOxc4euqxR34-Bd3g-GKU0MLqGaFgVPrXTyeUQR13e1RjFyQzf5hwLKcC3k3UvXy0iX7zja5PdZkIsKLdDwFyKlaFdU85cKON7jyx3VJ08GBJ4JdQDW29EMeRjSXG5CQIlg_49xFa8QX5SwXS_MrJRj-hRAsGJM_SnzqbyYbio4VMppWwtTl39GUOMgDa2yfk-nI%3D)
But first, let me explain what happened...
On the morning of February 3, 2022, Mark and other officers tried to arrest a _violent_ _criminal_ named Quadren Wilson.
Wilson has a rap sheet a mile long with dozens of arrests for drug distribution, theft, witness intimidation, battery, eluding police, and more. He was wanted for allegedly dealing fentanyl to a man found dead in a restaurant bathroom.
Mark's arrest team planned to capture Wilson in his vehicle using a containment strategy. They pulled in their trucks to block his car on both ends. But Wilson floored the accelerator, spinning his wheels wildly in a desperate attempt to escape justice.
Mark and another officer exited their vehicle to make the arrest. Mark was holding one of those big POLICE shields and had his gun drawn. But Wilson refused Mark's commands to show his hands, continuing to spin his wheels and try to force his way out.
With the wheels screeching and smoking, Mark and the other officer saw Wilson reach into the center console and pull his hand up.
Mark thought Wilson had a gun. He heard what he thought was gunfire. Then Mark felt something hit the shield he was holding and push him backward.** **
**Both Mark and the other officer responded to this life-threatening situation by firing into the vehicle.**
Mark believed his life and his fellow officers' lives were in danger. He did what he was trained to do and stopped the threat.
Thankfully, Wilson survived and no one else was injured. But because Wilson is black and Mark is white - anti-police radicals jumped at the chance to target Mark.
Protesters drummed up a racial firestorm by spreading lies that Wilson "had his hands up" and that he "was shot five times in the back." The corrupt liberal media repeated these lies and painted my husband as a monster.
And on September 22, 2022, the liberal District Attorney caved to the mob and filed BOGUS felony charges against Mark. **Now Mark faces 10 YEARS in prison.**
[**_Now I hope you can see why I 'm turning to you for help today._**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2af86fc3239a4b949585b2cb29f6d98e&_e=fbWHDXv9HSad2mbLHNoAywmM32RQWamp7_bnSaEk0Z8WpazjiiTXnI1jfFHV9tsLSUDK3UnCsr1PXcWsyo-xU-D7mKIlEC0AwYnyRRY3z5ewI25D0UAvyoX1xEndKn59OHVFxUSnn8FE2OE4qoH9SmvpUGyvIWdERsDvgJ6MOxc4euqxR34-Bd3g-GKU0MLqDmGB_nTn1ueW0L-Xk1XWX63DggQpt-G-EPPrJjMJUEQwbZHIuFSibFkh5X2HK0wS4J9Zf0MDO4oVv2nK7_4k6cMfANq9Xb_26ycPrazXeTEiuP0fP98PnavrMsRnVAIqjfmg7Op8pPTOlEFTlWQ_CXaqO390JetNZxrWM5n4MsE%3D)
Mark dedicated his life to helping others. He's spent 30 years in law enforcement, most of them with the Milwaukee Police Department (MPD).
We knew fighting alone against the anti-police movement here in Wisconsin would be impossible and our hope that justice would prevail was quickly fading when we received a call from **the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF)** offering to help Mark.
This incredible organization helps innocent officers, like my husband, who have been unfairly prosecuted for split-second, use-of-force decisions in the line of duty.
Law and justice experts like President Ronald Reagan's Attorney General Edwin Meese and former FBI Assistant Director Ronald Hosko serve on LELDF's Board. LELDF's president, Jason Johnson, served over 20 years as a police officer, including as Deputy Commissioner of the Baltimore Police Department.
In short, these are experts when it comes to policing. And they thoroughly vet cases to determine if an officer was wrongly accused or charged before deciding to help.
They provide legal counsel, expert witnesses, whatever is needed to make sure wrongly accused police officers get a fair shake in court. And they do it all free of charge!
But LELDF doesn't receive any money from the government to help police officers facing unjust charges. They're funded entirely by the generous support of folks like you who can recognize a miscarriage of justice and want to help fix it.
This is why I reached out to you today. I needed to ask you a very important question:
[**_Will you please help my husband Mark fight the unjust charges against him and clear his name by rushing a generous, tax-deductible donation to LELDF today?_**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2af86fc3239a4b949585b2cb29f6d98e&_e=fbWHDXv9HSad2mbLHNoAywmM32RQWamp7_bnSaEk0Z8WpazjiiTXnI1jfFHV9tsLSUDK3UnCsr1PXcWsyo-xU-D7mKIlEC0AwYnyRRY3z5ewI25D0UAvyoX1xEndKn59OHVFxUSnn8FE2OE4qoH9SmvpUGyvIWdERsDvgJ6MOxc4euqxR34-Bd3g-GKU0MLq8k8vlxFyTMQ-Jm-_EMPpoi6mSRoPaesB9NmU5plvmKC1G_41XvOC3CKymPsqMEBVR-k3KIBDvOOBQ_Muzs319xqnUME0LW3CXP0q8d8rQamlmOHpFQ_AGl7vjvGjNYhmeUHSX7TPO8aautb3IshpkgKHK-mnWTYiKaVlxoWvPUA%3D)
Your kind gift today of $35, $50, or $100 to help Mark will mean so much to my family.
Or, if you're blessed with the means to help with a gift of $250, $500, or even $1,000 or more, I pray you will so my husband doesn't spend 10 YEARS behind bars away from his family.
Right now, LELDF is preparing to ramp up legal action in Mark's case. [**So please follow this link to make your tax-deductible donation right away.**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2af86fc3239a4b949585b2cb29f6d98e&_e=fbWHDXv9HSad2mbLHNoAywmM32RQWamp7_bnSaEk0Z8WpazjiiTXnI1jfFHV9tsLSUDK3UnCsr1PXcWsyo-xU-D7mKIlEC0AwYnyRRY3z5ewI25D0UAvyoX1xEndKn59OHVFxUSnn8FE2OE4qoH9SmvpUGyvIWdERsDvgJ6MOxc4euqxR34-Bd3g-GKU0MLqBoGshmODEWOTpZyDh0a10bZWAR8nr3zXjNzoX7Pf75VBml8jXE0H5tfiXUFUT9qaFQhi5apvHmXv9cfXiUqX6bjvFd3GITl7jyQISQZ2NrAaOng2Gdot_zY7XzYTJft24toDfQbypC94EvkYfB81ZnAs4maiMr2feZK1hcMUiwU%3D)
Any gift amount you can send today is truly a blessing. No matter what you're able to give, please say a prayer for Mark and our family.
Thank you in advance for your generous support of my family and LELDF.
With deepest gratitude,
Becky Wagner
P.S. Mark is the type of person who'd offer to donate a kidney to a friend in need just because it's the right thing to do. In fact, that's exactly what he did when he donated one of his kidneys to his former partner of more than a decade! Mark didn't even let his partner know he got checked out as a potential donor. He just said that his partner had young kids who needed him to be around and it was the right thing to do.
This is the type of man the anti-police mob is targeting and trying to destroy: a kidney donor, a youth football coach, a man who assists the elderly from our parish in running errands and doing handy-man projects. A man of faith who's always helping others.
Mark faces 10 years behind bars - simply for doing his job to serve and protect. [**_Will you help him clear his name by making a tax-deductible donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today?_** ](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=2af86fc3239a4b949585b2cb29f6d98e&_e=fbWHDXv9HSad2mbLHNoAywmM32RQWamp7_bnSaEk0Z8WpazjiiTXnI1jfFHV9tsLSUDK3UnCsr1PXcWsyo-xU-D7mKIlEC0AwYnyRRY3z5ewI25D0UAvyoX1xEndKn59OHVFxUSnn8FE2OE4qoH9SmvpUGyvIWdERsDvgJ6MOxc4euqxR34-Bd3g-GKU0MLqXjrFHZPrZKyIHyjivF80XZPbMMJWN07ndlJmhyaA8ZEDtb_lDlO9Un3m_T5W6WnHw_nXF0JBMlDkrZ0qeixUHW3A424UppIjGv6j2vbiappdXbVyKTYZ3joZYR782Gp_n1qkzcqKRNvif5pljV39prbDxeOGSbJ-D4Zzs60hl2A%3D) Your generosity will help LELDF mount the strongest legal defenses for my husband and other wrongly accused officers. Thank you in advance for your prayers and support.

\----------------

_More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we 're defending, please visit **www.leldf.org**. And remember - Blue Lives Matter!_
_(C) Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | www.PoliceDefense.org
2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303_

Reclaiming American Freedom
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Riley Gaines
subject: They’re siding with my attackers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nine PAC
body:
| | | [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545637:JO25uqGNk:m:1:3391001263:CEB72814C24057794D9970008000161C:r)
---
Fellow American,

**First** : After the NCAA forced me to compete against a biological male, I decided to dedicate my life to fighting for women and ending the unjust discrimination against females who are forced to compete against biological males. **Then** : Just days ago, after speaking to a group of college students, I was assaulted and attacked by a man in a dress, one of the many recent episodes of violence doled out against those who refuse to bow down to the transgender agenda. **Now** : The University is siding with the violent protesters and refusing to even apologize to me. Some faculty members had the nerve to call the violence "peaceful." It seems like the left has no problem with violence against women, so long as the violence serves their woke agenda.
---
[**FIGHT BACK**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545637:JO25uqGNk:m:1:3391001263:CEB72814C24057794D9970008000161C:r)
---
Despite their violent talk and actions, I WON'T BE INTIMIDATED. We must stand up for the TRUTH, no matter whose feelings it hurts. The future of women's sports depends on taking a stand RIGHT NOW. We can't cede any more ground to these woke activists. Join me and help fight back!
---
[**DONATE TO NinePAC**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545637:JO25uqGNk:m:1:3391001263:CEB72814C24057794D9970008000161C:r)
---
God Bless,
---
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545637:JO25uqGNk:m:1:3391001263:CEB72814C24057794D9970008000161C:r)
---
Riley Gaines

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMdmyXrd13Z1fbU733gSGSEfDHMeTd0pFWke9BRDEsFlbVPUPgqGh2POhtaLYuF0j6PzMptRmZvdB_x9bBjnL5LxvwjHDPUtOw6NoTmIbXUd2_PE3T6_RcX0uCIzLKP4br6a8ND3TONtwmK7RtdcDcME%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMQCynKc_Em22I23SEtGSZg6KJ5Iqpgpg5F5zYajXIVj7vDRE5DyhyryyJK-67-o6IAMeSry8NHdMUhAuBjsfEL-34QXlXA4YJKGYIWCOfZqZXEHT7TITOO-JQtwkEYd15BdHXA-epjI9ywYfMItyg_A%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMZgDJdRMvB1r9jPwLEymEKoaZlg7aqr22eUbjeJou46iYcdl4pHHBhEP7ntpgkwBKJmf44kVWDhQ9zofbjVchSCeSnZHsuKhdRFQJW90p95edXWSYRFODnzWxpXwdPGVf_5_mNGwi6Sj_kcl765uoE0%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMVcNjMsNTJqIF3iDnK0dD_3ZMv7qS3j-R2nKr-Y_ZoKIyiaHM9MwbHLlv4gA-0n-6OXc04Y-zLe9oL8jnbrmAOvPcMgFY6g0zrjN3zHt4ckWX-v02vQF7CPONS0rm6-8nO1XXaG4UBXycPdjrRwFfJg%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMVB2HsnsIS5oQFCJhHzCe-9sTZ8KRJyupc-vlDNbgN2oah8lbMs153LiIoApRKLugvkmPxh6AiEqD_GfmVFlCv_rhZJYOyB4tX3pjktzS6WFFaNKZS3BDcxSUxAA0uKhZq0L2VfzU8kHJWcEQmy222U%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMTNTUwVTOIGeHK24EMqq4gDU9oETWitP5GM9-KBcXRd-sEwvXZAHF0QWT5CTnLMNztn0aEasTH6PztT2CjBJEqdKA8Xhj-ui4bPiAAmuKYy7cdEzJtPqKrdnmcTpf4zzE0qnbyEERbHHKq8VoFDMis0%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMdDw17uldOUo7vBi3RO5hDvGWTTH4fmu1s1nOPN_jZWCCJdok4gAGibZRnLKlikUPiOljrGVIrVg4EzmVflXkN1dNjcI7xL1JsQWFThjvb7EIsA3u8G4OF9B_3cycqO_QxjTkTYvu2-ZXYp1KNSyB7s%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b414b6e76aa74d4db7f8dede651c503d&_e=PDri2Y9B9ufQwh3fojsYUQ1NXizkVXzUxSZQreuE7T4H_Akf7gncmFIsr6CDFq2tOyegyhuegb4bjjOLDTvn14BMZjwChb-TyvEizbvx7Xu7PfkSJBKoKxHZZADUO9H0kp3e1y2Ewy1ePrxw0IUqMa5_WOuUVhUcwxyQWt8-ilsEnXSjp5JCFW8Q_E-vnNplnG6DQPjyy-_EsnkdIs0sVYDMOuYefSqXDTFhWx8E7u00MzmexLfIK-7sFiZQCKKc5H23K5S_VTdXs8vkLDE5Nc-O_eLL2DZVekWMQ2OF7tY%3D)

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.
