clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Defend the Constitution 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

Peter,
---
Your support, prayers, and relentless determination just led to a massive victory in the fight against deadly chemical abortion.
---
**A U.S. District Court in Texas has issued an injunction HALTING the FDA 's approval of mifepristone - one of the dangerous drugs used to perform deadly chemical abortions.**
---
This single drug is used in more than 50% of all abortions in the United States!
---
_But the fight against grisly chemical abortion is far from over ..._
---
_Pro-abortion forces are FURIOUS, and they're already pushing other dangerous alternatives as they appeal the ruling and vow to take the issue all the way to the Supreme Court._
---
[**Please make a contribution to help us keep up the fight against deadly chemical abortion on the heels of this MASSIVE victory for LIFE.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544234:J9malqGN8:m:1:3365131770:29CA38CC5F398B17C2F0C2EF7F2488AD:r)

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544234:J9malqGN8:m:1:3365131770:29CA38CC5F398B17C2F0C2EF7F2488AD:r)
---

Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk ruled that the FDA's original approval of mifepristone and the recent decision to allow it to be prescribed remotely were both unlawful.
---
In his opinion, he agreed that the FDA prioritized politics over patients:
---
"But here, FDA acquiesced on its legitimate safety concerns - in violation of its statutory duty - based on plainly unsound reasoning and studies that did not support its conclusions. There is also evidence indicating FDA faced significant political pressure to forego its proposed safety precautions to better advance the political objective of increased 'access' to chemical abortion - which was the 'whole idea of mifepristone.'"
---
The ruling reaffirms that pregnancy is not an illness, and abortion is not healthcare.
---
_Every time a woman takes one of these pills, it tragically ends the life of an unborn child._
---

Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk ruled that the FDA's original approval of mifepristone and the recent decision to allow it to be prescribed remotely were both unlawful. In his opinion, he agreed that the FDA prioritized politics over patients: "But here, FDA acquiesced on its legitimate safety concerns - in violation of its statutory duty - based on plainly unsound reasoning and studies that did not support its conclusions. There is also evidence indicating FDA faced significant political pressure to forego its proposed safety precautions to better advance the political objective of increased 'access' to chemical abortion - which was the 'whole idea of mifepristone.'" The ruling reaffirms that pregnancy is not an illness, and abortion is not healthcare. Every time a woman takes one of these pills, it tragically ends the life of an unborn child. Additionally, evidence shows that it can have a whole host of horrific side effects for the mother - including severe bleeding, intense pain, the need for surgery, and even death. Unfortunately, that didn't stop the Biden-Harris FDA from ignoring the science and approving these dangerous abortion drugs for sale by mail-order without any in-person doctor visit. It was past time that a federal court took action to rein in the Biden-Harris Administration 's radically pro-abortion FDA. But as more and more states implement strong pro-life protections, the Big Abortion Lobby will fight tooth and nail to defend its 'insurance policy' of mail-order abortion pills. subject: I’m one of the girls who was deceived by the transgender movement
body:
You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson.

| |
---
| |
# FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE
---
|
---
Dear Friend, My name is Chloe.
---
| | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest.
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9c77ace0314fb9bedb205906ca5952&_e=Cu4EWy0Ti_Vqtz6BQip9_s1t-qw2czQ2rj5KqkwnZ5z6-uX4GVdNae9kWbmTuQpmp3wMUbPOegiDpQi2jpR4n-Pw8RXlVr3khW3YHbVeiGLt-O0Key1En8AXFl4PIK5eWtwPO6w7OvVj7vvmGISTQGEYXmCtXjOtHxoyPNsrfyo37olJIpNEqZMxP_aa5m-DOrLPt7v2YNElpFWAO9Hvf6ReImmy3HsMLGjqJdZ4Q3lHqNvQfAGeNgfswccnekxDxZa_OfiO8rpILy8w6wkHaMu95-V8ySaQBl8XHjZDhPf1KcA0KJUXRjHqxtedt0c4pH20H03x_p4JfPn0T8PEj-jx1zwupqD70GTxwt2o0s3Sl_C_LNgMIKMLqkmxRF_Z)
---
| | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy."
---
| | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9c77ace0314fb9bedb205906ca5952&_e=Cu4EWy0Ti_Vqtz6BQip9_s1t-qw2czQ2rj5KqkwnZ5z6-uX4GVdNae9kWbmTuQpmp3wMUbPOegiDpQi2jpR4n-Pw8RXlVr3khW3YHbVeiGLt-O0Key1En8AXFl4PIK5eWtwPO6w7OvVj7vvmGISTQGEYXmCtXjOtHxoyPNsrfyo37olJIpNEqZMxP_aa5m-DOrLPt7v2YNElpFWAO9Hvf6ReImmy3HsMLGjqJdZ4Q3mtbJKBhfdtMgCiKd2KYy4-wwgaTVPTNXMVAPwOUcTss7NNeBLsYS7AoiHgw-WMvNyWFqVD7TGUze1FRHHmmlgUeQKY16WzI0GxTEbR8Z8sgWpgfL1aRA7w6259TVCBiCA1yFjJJee7jEdi7_TGZHk9)
---
**_Before transitioning_**
---
| [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9c77ace0314fb9bedb205906ca5952&_e=Cu4EWy0Ti_Vqtz6BQip9_s1t-qw2czQ2rj5KqkwnZ5z6-uX4GVdNae9kWbmTuQpmp3wMUbPOegiDpQi2jpR4n-Pw8RXlVr3khW3YHbVeiGLt-O0Key1En8AXFl4PIK5eWtwPO6w7OvVj7vvmGISTQGEYXmCtXjOtHxoyPNsrfyo37olJIpNEqZMxP_aa5m-DOrLPt7v2YNElpFWAO9Hvf6ReImmy3HsMLGjqJdZ4Q3lP5F0J9ib8e5QDP_XKG6qAZ1WOwyj_HvXEqK7KlwPVLBQvnnDKZRmSCrifGl9vFPNzav1_6IolmKQgBUae10DEjsubgoIYqD0m-o0tXQJNv7SACkrQ8Lj6zmhwfiMIKCDWm1p_kWP8oXzUc1Ym35P0)
---
**_After transitioning_**
---
| | [**Even though we don 't know each other, I'm writing you today hoping you'll help me stop the** **horror of what happened to me, from happening to other children and their parents.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9c77ace0314fb9bedb205906ca5952&_e=Cu4EWy0Ti_Vqtz6BQip9_s1t-qw2czQ2rj5KqkwnZ5z6-uX4GVdNae9kWbmTuQpmp3wMUbPOegiDpQi2jpR4n-Pw8RXlVr3khW3YHbVeiGLt-O0Key1En8AXFl4PIK5eWtwPO6w7OvVj7vvmGISTQGEYXmCtXjOtHxoyPNsrfyo37olJIpNEqZMxP_aa5m-DOrLPt7v2YNElpFWAO9Hvf6ReImmy3HsMLGjqJdZ4Q3lCnwRI1Yr525IiWQth3lDNcCmTYEv4LbZ6f-uL9HXCmMM9GV_CTGS94WJbkgKdHKinPs724J4TO3rFsHxxvbDnEsbFjQfIS-lkTYEyxGfEKqRbfwpo9uSQBG82KnNIGSk2PnvSUiVrIxuuJa-73un_) It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. **The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" ** Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. [**Will you help me fight so these radical doctors and hospitals can 't prey on another scared, confused, lonely child like they did me?**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9c77ace0314fb9bedb205906ca5952&_e=Cu4EWy0Ti_Vqtz6BQip9_s1t-qw2czQ2rj5KqkwnZ5z6-uX4GVdNae9kWbmTuQpmp3wMUbPOegiDpQi2jpR4n-Pw8RXlVr3khW3YHbVeiGLt-O0Key1En8AXFl4PIK5eWtwPO6w7OvVj7vvmGISTQGEYXmCtXjOtHxoyPNsrfyo37olJIpNEqZMxP_aa5m-DOrLPt7v2YNElpFWAO9Hvf6ReImmy3HsMLGjqJdZ4Q3kMXw71lJLm_V7tORHdxopCgbUyQmK80wq41IAtUAqiwCNEeaUSSEQ1dXTHapvKBmgnm3iaZMVeeZaSx79rH-4iTFohvyld8klzwaspQFemTKBbHwbN-3qL9yLKOxAPOOp5ps9U3UDtGUbcpiBcllbt) The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." [**And YOU can help me.**](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=8e9c77ace0314fb9bedb205906ca5952&_e=Cu4EWy0Ti_Vqtz6BQip9_s1t-qw2czQ2rj5KqkwnZ5z6-uX4GVdNae9kWbmTuQpmp3wMUbPOegiDpQi2jpR4n-Pw8RXlVr3khW3YHbVeiGLt-O0Key1En8AXFl4PIK5eWtwPO6w7OvVj7vvmGISTQGEYXmCtXjOtHxoyPNsrfyo37olJIpNEqZMxP_aa5m-DOrLPt7v2YNElpFWAO9Hvf6ReImmy3HsMLGjqJdZ4Q3md3yMDdEUdHtwCOQ5B9l83dmFMANUhGVq2O83anD_LkIv76dL3LedKgWTeDgB71tkbL911tz9GSEkRKmu7c2gqs6ZF2XfgiVOTU8W7bKJtoLBjsoXCmO_0jUA7GNff8x5WTX8NmqogMHG0DOdCLwt1) More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. **There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. ** And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. clean_body: You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. | | | | FROM THE DESK OF CHLOE COLE | Dear Friend, My name is Chloe. | | You don't know me but I'm hoping you saw me on Fox News talking to Tucker Carlson. There are lots of powerful people who don't want my story to get out, so I'm so grateful that Mr. Carlson had me on as a guest. | | | I guess I'm what you'd call a "cautionary tale." You see, I'm one of those girls who was deceived by the transgender movement. I'm 18 years old now but here is a picture of what I looked like before the transgender movement got me. And one from after -- when they had turned me into a "boy." | | Before transitioning | After transitioning | | It all started when I was 11 years old and growing up in Northern California. I was growing embarrassed and confused once my body started changing. I was also shy and didn't socialize easily - and I didn't feel comfortable talking about any of this with my parents. But I found 'friends' on the internet who told me if I was uncomfortable with my body, I was probably a boy trapped in the wrong body. And the more I agreed with them, the more they celebrated me. I was getting the message loud and clear: if I was a girl who became a boy, I'd be valued and loved even more. Before long I was telling my parents I was transgender. They had no idea what to do. My poor parents were scared and desperate and took me to "experts" who convinced them that if they failed to act quickly, I would surely commit suicide. The gender clinic gave my parents an ultimatum: "Would you rather have a dead daughter or a living son?" Given those choices, my parents would have signed anything the doctors put in front of them if it meant "saving" me. When they signed those forms, it wasn't informed parental consent. It was a desperate decision made under extreme duress. And so, at age 13, I was fast-tracked for medical transition from a girl into a boy. The doctors started giving me weekly testosterone injections...they injected me with an experimental drug used to chemically castrate sex offenders... ...and finally, they removed my breasts in a radical double mastectomy. I was fifteen years old. And of course, none of this made me any happier or less confused. If you're like most people I tell my story to... right about now you're probably thinking, "HOW did it ever get this far?" And the answer is simple. The "experts" lied to my parents -- and to me -- every step of the way. They claimed I would never get "better" unless I medically transitioned - when the truth is that the vast majority of children who think they're transgender grow out of it with absolutely no chemical or surgical intervention. They claimed their consent forms covered all the risks of pumping testosterone and puberty blockers into my 13-year-old body... ...while their forms left out dozens and dozens of known risks. They never told us that there isn't one single scientific study on the effects these treatments have on young children. And they never, ever, were straight with me about what it would mean to let them remove my breasts. When I woke up from that surgery, I was shocked at how mangled my body was. And now years after the surgery, I still wear bandages every day to cover the oozing, unhealed scars. At age 18, I'm just beginning to understand what it will mean to never nurse my child -- if I'll ever be able to have children at all. For the rest of my life, my voice will sound like a man's, my body will look like a boy's, and who knows what cancers, cardiac problems, bone problems, and more are lurking around the corner. And my parents feel like they've failed me on every level imaginable. I can't go back. I can't change what happened. But I can change what happens to the THOUSANDS of kids just like me who are falling prey to the predatory transgender movement and unscrupulous abusive medical "experts." More and more children are mutilated and abused every day. There 's even a doctor who advertises her mutilation surgeries on TikTok to draw young kids in. And it won't stop until someone fights back. When I turned 18, I decided that someone would be me. I had no idea how I would do it, but I'd seen enough T.V. to know I needed a lawyer. I also didn't know how hard it would be to find someone willing to take my case in liberal California. didn't even know what a liberal was until they started slamming doors in my face! Finally, someone told me to call Harmeet Dhillon at the Center for American Liberty. | | And the first time we spoke, I felt something I hadn't felt in a long time -- hope. Because Harmeet is a fighter like me. She didn't tell me we'd never win against the giant medical industry. She didn't tell me the transgender issue was too sensitive to touch. She told me my fight mattered. | | | Not only because of what had happened to me -- but also because we could STOP it from happening to other children. And so together with Harmeet Dhillon's non-profit -- the Center for American Liberty -- I've launched a case against the radical doctors and hospital who preyed on me... ...and who continue to prey on children -- maybe even in your family. As I've mentioned several times -- I'm 18-years-old. On my own, I'd never have the money to pay for a giant court case like this. That's one of the ways these radicals are taking over everything. They know regular people like me don't have the money to fight them in court. But that's exactly why Harmeet started the Center for American Liberty. The Center for American Liberty brings together attorneys who want to fight for what's right and matches them with people like me who would have had nowhere else to turn. Right now, the Center for American Liberty has landmark cases going like: Brach v. Newsom \-- to stop California from shutting down private and religious schools... Ngo v. Roce City Antifa \-- to get justice for Andy Ngo after he was beaten by Antifa thugs and liberal politicians did NOTHING... O 'Handley v. Padilla \-- to stop Big Government from using Big Tech to silence people they disagree with... And now my case... Chloe Cole v. Kaiser Permanente. The Center for American Liberty is a nonprofit. They have big cases but that doesn't mean they have the big money that their opponents have. There are big forces at work who want to get rich no matter who they hurt. Alone we're no match for them. , we can beat these monsters who are using scared, confused and lonely children to make a buck. For exposing them, I've been called a "liar." But when we beat them in court and stop them from hurting any more children with their lies and mutilations,I will be proud to face them and say: " You may have taken away my childhood, and forever changed my future -- but I exist. Fellow American,

**First** : After the NCAA forced me to compete against a biological male, I decided to dedicate my life to fighting for women and ending the unjust discrimination against females who are forced to compete against biological males. **Then** : Just days ago, after speaking to a group of college students, I was assaulted and attacked by a man in a dress, one of the many recent episodes of violence doled out against those who refuse to bow down to the transgender agenda. **Now** : The University is siding with the violent protesters and refusing to even apologize to me. Some faculty members had the nerve to call the violence "peaceful." It seems like the left has no problem with violence against women, so long as the violence serves their woke agenda.
---
[**FIGHT BACK**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62545632:JlzoEqGNU:m:1:3331421248:90853E075DBF6E7B0C1682F4F180E1B0:r)
---
Despite their violent talk and actions, I WON'T BE INTIMIDATED. We must stand up for the TRUTH, no matter whose feelings it hurts. The future of women's sports depends on taking a stand RIGHT NOW. We can't cede any more ground to these woke activists. Join me and help fight back!
---

name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: [Action Needed] The Trans Bill of Rights
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544622:JC8eEqGWN:m:1:3365131770:8200340567BD4B9E8016115634765B50:r) Peter,

Far-Left, extreme trans activists are pushing a new "Trans Bill of Rights" in Congress.
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544622:JC8eEqGWN:m:1:3365131770:8200340567BD4B9E8016115634765B50:r) | | [ STOP THE TRANS BILL OF RIGHTS](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544622:JC8eEqGWN:m:1:3365131770:8200340567BD4B9E8016115634765B50:r)
---

This "Trans Bill of Rights" is 10 pages of mentally unstable wokeness and will completely warp reality in our country. Here are just a few of the INSANE things they are trying to push:

* Amend the Civil Rights Act, the Fair Housing Act, and the Equal Credit Opportunity Act to ban discrimination based on gender identity... **_That means Trans become a protected class and women's rights are totally and completely annihilated._** Men pretending to be women would not just be equal to women in all areas, they would be preferred and above all women, essentially replacing women.
* It also says to improve conditions for trans in jails and asylum facilities, create community services to support trans abuse survivors, **_and give priority to trans asylum seekers. Key word there, "priority."_**
* Calls for a ban on conversion therapy, a type of therapy many former trans and detransitioners have undergone to successfully change their life.
* Calls for **_codification of Roe v. Wade_** which would make abortion legal in all 50 states, destroy state rights, and ensure the murder of babies all over America.
* Calls for prohibiting the withholding of services to trans people on religious grounds, **_which destroys religious liberty._**
* Calls for education laws to ensure students have the right to participate in sports that best align with their gender, and use facilities that correspond to their preferred gender, **_which destroys Title IV and women's rights._**
* Also calls for trans in schools to have access to curriculum and books that accurately portray the "substantive history and identity of LGBTQI+ people and Black and indigenous people of color." **_Access to those grooming and brainwashing books means grooming and brainwashing for all children, and parents could not stop it._** _This would undo the Republican's recently passed Parent's Bill of Rights_.
* Also calls for getting rid of government restrictions on access to gender affirming care for trans adults and youth. **_This means the great laws Republican states have been passing that protect children from Trans surgeries, puberty blockers, and hormones would be wiped out and kids would not be safe anywhere._**

We MUST launch an immediate and overwhelming response to this evil masquerading as "equality." If you just read that entire list of bullet points, **[I absolutely need you to sign my petition in opposition to the"Trans Bill of Rights" immediately](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544622:JC8eEqGWN:m:1:3365131770:8200340567BD4B9E8016115634765B50:r).**

If patriots like you fail to take action after learning what's happening, we will lose the fight against gender insanity.

**[So please, sign my petition and share it with your friends - it will only take a moment](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544622:JC8eEqGWN:m:1:3365131770:8200340567BD4B9E8016115634765B50:r).**

_In Liberty,_

MTG

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: YOUR SIGNATURE IS NEEDED: Endangered species under attack by Republicans
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1714832?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: House Republicans are trying to DISMANTLE one of our nation’s bedrock environmental laws, the Endangered Species Act.** **[Act now!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1714833?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** Glimmering oceans. Dense forests. Rocky mountain terrain. Even the sky itself. Each of these places has something in common with the others -- all are home to endangered species being pushed to the brink. From leatherback sea turtles to grizzly bears and gray wolves, to soaring falcons. **Republicans are trying to push them even harder toward EXTINCTION!** Republicans have introduced more than a dozen different bills taking aim at the Endangered Species Act, even targeting specific animals like the poor gray wolves of the Northern Rockies. But wolves aren’t their only target: corporate lobbyists want to erase ESA protections to open wildlife habitats for destruction by greedy fossil fuel companies. **[Friend, please add your name by 11:59pm TONIGHT and STOP Republicans from attacking the Endangered Species Act!](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1714834?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)** | [Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1714835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
The ESA is also an essential tool for blocking Big Oil and other corporate polluters from _**BULLDOZING WILDLIFE HABITATS**_ and _**STRIPPING OUR PUBLIC LAND’S RESOURCES**_ to line the pockets of a few greedy executives. By extension, communities that might otherwise face **contaminated air, water, and soil** from fossil fuel extraction are protected by the Endangered Species Act.
Endangered species need your help before it’s too late, Friend. **Don’t let Republicans take a wrecking ball to the Endangered Species Act.** [**We need 76 more people from your area to send a message to Congress: NO GUTTING THE ENDANGERED SPECIES ACT!**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1714836?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[Sign the petition](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1714835?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Standing with you,
Nicole Ghio
Fossil fuels program manager,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: This is a deliberate and coordinated assault on our democracy.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
|

Friend,
I am deeply concerned about the current state of affairs in our nation. We are witnessing a deliberate and coordinated assault on our democracy, state by state.
* * *
● **Tennessee** \-- Conservatives in the state house forced out duly-elected Democratic legislators and continue to disregard the desires of Tennessee voters to address gun violence.
● **Florida** \-- Conservative lawmakers are abusing their power by advancing a new anti-democratic election bill that would impose further restrictions on voters.
● **Mississippi** \-- State conservatives are instituting dangerous legislation that threatens the very foundations of our democratic values to remove power from Black Mississippians in Jackson.
● **Virginia** \-- The re-application of a Jim Crow-era voting law in Virginia, which disproportionately impacts black voters, constitutes an anti-democratic assault on voting rights.
* * *
**These brazen actions are part of a years-long effort by conservative extremists to stifle the voice of the people and exert anti-democratic control over our nation’s ideals and infrastructures.** These efforts to bend and break the foundations of our democracy for the acquisition and maintenance of partisan power are unacceptable and must be unequivocally opposed.
**[Will you support All On The Line as we combat gerrymandering and anti-democratic assaults on our democracy?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61642202/400688881/1796693206?refcode=20230411_AOTL_P_EHHTN_RedLiteXKY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMmQ0MWU4LTgxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HQBNZyNrp1oUSA1aTVC-QMb58TMZu1CEPu0vJMnx4mY=)**

All On The Line’s work to protect fair maps and engage communities across the country is crucial at this moment. From gerrymandering to outright voter suppression and intimidation during election cycles, these dangerous, cynical tactics have been employed to limit the participation of targeted voices in our democracy. **Such actions undermine confidence that our governments are accountable to the people.**
Our work to end gerrymandering and to protect fair maps requires dedication, persistence, and a willingness to keep going even when the odds seem stacked against us. But this work is absolutely vital as attacks on our democracy escalate. **[Will you support All On The Line’s work to protect the fundamental rights of every citizen and end gerrymandering by making a donation today?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61642217/400688896/1796693206?refcode=20230411_AOTL_P_EHHTN_RedLiteXKY&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkMmQ0MWU4LTgxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HQBNZyNrp1oUSA1aTVC-QMb58TMZu1CEPu0vJMnx4mY=)**
We must act with urgency and optimism. Thank you for sticking with us.
\-- Eric H. Holder, Jr.

subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

| | | | | [ ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15169%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=x%2b5yClqvZuK17ILCwPPy7A&sysid=1)
---
| |
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15160%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=9j%2b6e7EMMEaVfdylCtMr1A&sysid=1)Dear Patriot,

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What’s more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens’ Grand Jury. We’re going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we’re going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift of $25, $50, $100, or more IMMEDIATELY.** ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15161%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=H%2booQ8aPmhlsEewOJ9E7vg&sysid=1)

**I’m Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch.**

I’m a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who’s fought for the American people for 45 years. You’ve seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I’m proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

I worked closely with Congressman Bob Barr and other impeachment managers to IMPEACH criminal Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I’m the only lawyer in American history to have a court rule that a sitting President had committed a crime. And the only lawyer to enjoin the National Security Agency from conducting mass surveillance on hundreds of millions of American citizens.**

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden’s corrupt regime.** ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15162%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=KnHxtLgbtOFxUwz8er9Sqg&sysid=1)

Sincerely,

Larry Klayman
Founder, Judicial Watch and Freedom Watch
Chairman and General Counsel, Freedom Watch, Inc.

**P.S. Patriot, you and I can’t let George Soros-backed District Attorney Alvin Bragg get away with his illegal indictment of President Trump.**

[ **Please help Freedom Watch fight back peacefully and legally with your crucial gift of $25, $50, $100 or more right away.** ](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c15163%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=t43G6HzZ73%2fJgE1vxen%2fjw&sysid=1)

body:
| | **" That's why this is the moment to make sure that, when the Judge examines your life, you have placed your faith in Jesus Christ's death and resurrection for the forgiveness of your sins."**
In light of Trump's arrest, the great Rev. Franklin Graham just spoke out on what will guide us through any trying time.
Because at this moment, America needs God more than ever.
**Faith in God in America is already at an all-time low.**
**Democrats have just pledged $45 million to wipe out Christian Republicans.**
**And now that Trump has been arrested, they hope to take out the biggest defender of religious liberty & the unborn our country has ever seen.**
Democrats hope that if they throw Trump behind bars, Republicans will never show up to the polls again. Then they'll have free reign to trample our religious liberties.

New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

**Like I told you yesterday, this shocking indictment threatens the rule of law, honest elections, and the future of our country.**

What's more, what District Attorney Bragg has done is **ILLEGAL.**

So once again, Freedom Watch turns to its Citizens' Grand Jury. We're going to seek a criminal indictment against Alvin Bragg for his crime...and we're going to seek justice, peacefully and legally.

[ **Patriot, please help Freedom Watch fully fund this critically important effort with your best gift IMMEDIATELY.** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544657:Jm4kGqGRN:m:1:3365131770:D3CB91BACA1B681B1A5E2C0F7C4799D3:r)

**I 'm Larry Klayman, the founder of Judicial Watch and founder and General Counsel of Freedom Watch. **

I'm a former federal prosecutor and trial lawyer who's fought for the American people for 45 years. You've seen me on cable news outlets and heard me on radio talk shows.

I'm proud to say I am the first lawyer to EVER obtain a court ruling that an American president committed a crime when I won my case against Bill Clinton.

And I SUCCESSFULLY represented the victims of other Clinton scandals, like Filegate, Travelgate, IRS Gate, Chinagate, and many others.

**I know what it takes to take on federal agencies, politicians, even presidents, and WIN.**

[ **The time to act is now. Please help us fully fund our fight against the injustice of Biden 's corrupt regime. ** ](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544657:Jm4kGqGRN:m:1:3365131770:D3CB91BACA1B681B1A5E2C0F7C4799D3:r)

Larry Klayman

name: James Comer (Chairman, House Oversight Committee)
subject: every Tom, Dick, and Harry is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When I became the Chairman of the Oversight Committee, everyone warned me not to step in the ring if I can’t take any punches.

| |

---
| | | When I became Chairman of the House Oversight Committee, everyone warned me not to step in the ring if I couldn't take any punches. Well, I took their advice and stepped in anyway.

As the GOP's top investigator, I've made a LOT of enemies looking into:
- Internal communications of the **Manhattan DA** targeting the former president
- Suspect **payments to the Biden family** from a Chinese company
- **Hunter Biden** and his shady business dealings
- The **origins of COVID-19** and any potential cover-ups
- The Biden Administration's failed response to the **baby formula shortage**
- Joe Biden's widespread use of **catch-and-release** for illegal immigrants
_The blowback from the Liberal Mob was swift and severe:_ The Biden Administration said my bombshell report was full of lies. Vox said my investigations were "flopping." Jennifer Rubin said I was focused on "phony scandals." And the Manhattan DA is refusing to cooperate in our oversight investigation.

Every Tom, Dick, and Harry is coming after me but our House Majority will never stop fighting for you, the American People. However, we can't take on the Liberal Mob - and keep fighting for accountability - without YOU.

_**[If you're with us, I urge you in the STRONGEST POSSIBLE TERMS to help defend our House Majority by chipping in a few dollars right now.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z5gmn1p5loivbep2l80v18up7t9vd0a1peq1milg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j60or2c9h2bs "If you’re with us, I urge you in the STRONGEST POSSIBLE TERMS to help defend our House Majority by chipping in a few dollars right now.")**_

Any amount you can spare enables us to keep fighting for what's right - even in the face of enormous blowback from the Liberal Mob.

Together, we'll take back our country.

Thank you,

name: Sherrod Brown
subject: (urgent) re: anti-abortion ruling in Texas
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN
body:
We must protect reproductive freedom for all.
| | |
---
| | |
---
**BREAKING NEWS: Texas judge strikes down the FDA approval of a key abortion pill – a move that will limit abortion access ACROSS the nation.**
---
**ACTION NEEDED: I’m counting on 500 more pro-choice Democrats in your area to respond to my rapid-response poll to protect reproductive freedom by 11:59 p.m. tonight – including you, friend. So, let me know where you stand:**
---
| | **Do you believe Democrats should restore reproductive rights for all?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627525/400633602/1917667117?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk49-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnQl4Oj0hvHB4RIBqMCoWRBZbhtaGKNB1rZf1kk0mPA=&emci=dd1d9689-abc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9959d772-69d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627526/400633604/1917667117?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk49-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnQl4Oj0hvHB4RIBqMCoWRBZbhtaGKNB1rZf1kk0mPA=&emci=dd1d9689-abc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9959d772-69d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
|
---
Friend, this is urgent:

**A judge in Texas just ruled on an abortion case that could result in a _nationwide_ ban on mifepristone – a safe, FDA-approved medication that's used in more than half of all abortions across the country. This ban could even impact states where abortion is legal and constitutionally protected.**
I’ve fought my whole life to protect reproductive freedom because I believe in every American’s right to make their own health care decisions. But with Roe v. Wade no longer the law of the land, this new ruling in Texas puts this essential right in serious jeopardy – and we all must speak out now.
That's why I'm personally asking you to respond to my rapid-response poll to demand we protect reproductive rights nationwide. **I’m counting on 500 folks from each state to speak out before midnight, and I’d really love for you to represent yours: **
| | **Do you believe Democrats should restore reproductive rights for all?**
---
| | | [YES](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627527/400633606/1917667117?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk49-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnQl4Oj0hvHB4RIBqMCoWRBZbhtaGKNB1rZf1kk0mPA=&emci=dd1d9689-abc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9959d772-69d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
| [NO](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61627531/400633607/1917667117?email=&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk49-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5OTU5ZDc3Mi02OWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=HnQl4Oj0hvHB4RIBqMCoWRBZbhtaGKNB1rZf1kk0mPA=&emci=dd1d9689-abc1-ed11-a8e0-00224832e811&emdi=9959d772-69d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=18332626)
---
We can’t afford to have a single pro-choice Democrat sitting on the sidelines, so thank you for adding your voice to this critical fight.

In solidarity,

Sherrod

I’ve fought my whole life to protect reproductive freedom because I believe in every American’s right to make their own health care decisions. But with Roe v. Wade no longer the law of the land, this new ruling in Texas puts this essential right in serious jeopardy – and we all must speak out now. That's why I'm personally asking you to respond to my rapid-response poll to demand we protect reproductive rights nationwide. I’m counting on 500 folks from each state to speak out before midnight, and I’d really love for you to represent yours: | | Do you believe Democrats should restore reproductive rights for all? | | | | We can’t afford to have a single pro-choice Democrat sitting on the sidelines, so thank you for adding your voice to this critical fight. In solidarity, Sherrod | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Friends of Sherrod Brown 3867 West Market Street Ste. 289 Akron, OH 44333 United States | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF SHERROD BROWN

name: =?utf-8?Q?Derek=20Lyons=20=2D=20RITE?=
subject: Are We Ready to Vote in 2024?
body:
RITE is backing lawsuits in Arizona, Florida and Ohio confrontng the activist left that is dead set on undermining election integrity at every turn. | | |
---
| |
---
| There are 574 days until America votes for its next President. Are we ready? RITE is systematically reviewing election laws in critical states to identify any daylight between what voting laws say and how they are being administered. We are also defending commonsense safeguards such as Photo ID requirements or drop box security measures, which are constantly being challenged by the activist left that is dead set on undermining election integrity at every turn.

Please forward**[ this newsletter to friends and colleagues](https://us12.forward-to-friend.com/forward?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=31c3c59b69&e=ea91f782ea)** and ask them to **[sign up](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/subscribe?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382)**. ** **

Read more ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️
---
|
---
|
# 1\. Countering Elias’s Activism in Arizona, Florida, and Ohio

Activist attorney Marc Elias is once again trying to twist state election laws into a partisan agenda. In three states, RITE is in court countering his attempts to undermine important election integrity safeguards.

**OHIO:** Working with RITE, two Ohio citizens and the Ohio GOP are asking an Ohio federal court to preemptively dismiss Marc Elias’s meritless challenge to the state’s new election integrity safeguards. Ohio Secretary of State Frank LaRose and Attorney General Dave Yost are preparing a vigorous defense of the new reforms, which Governor DeWine signed into law in January. RITE strongly supports this work. The citizens RITE is supporting have gone even further. They’ve argued to the court that the laws at issue are so obviously constitutional that the court should dismiss Elias’s case before it wastes any more taxpayer resources. (**[Learn More](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=34bae09357&e=ea91f782ea)**)

**ARIZONA:** Elias is trying to step in to defend a terrible mail ballot signature scheme implemented by then-Secretary of State Katie Hobbs. RITE has sued the Secretary of State to ensure signature matching is implemented in accordance with the law, which prohibits the use of any signatures other than those used for voter registration to validate mail ballots. The illegal scheme Hobbs put in place allows unreliable signatures to be used to validate ballots. (**[Learn More](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=b93e87a68d&e=ea91f782ea)**)

**FLORIDA:** Elias has once again invoked an important civil rights law in an effort to invalidate a commonsense election integrity requirement – this time, a Florida rule that requires voters to actually sign their voter registration forms. Distorting this law is one of Elias’s primary tactics. It has met with very limited success because the Supreme Court long ago confirmed that reasonable regulations are required for states to run fair, honest, orderly, and confidence-inspiring elections. RITE PAC is supporting efforts to defeat this latest misadventure. (**[Learn More](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=31f5abe1ea&e=ea91f782ea)**)

* * *

# 2\. Non-citizen Voting is the End of Self-Governance

A nationwide effort is underway, backed by establishment Democrats and left-leaning activists, to undermine citizenship and self-government. Federal law clearly states that only citizens can vote in federal elections, and several state constitutions have provisions that say the same for state elections.

The problem is in local elections, where liberals have begun testing theories of non-citizen voting. Their not-so-subtle goal is to use local elections as a platform for breaking opposition to non-citizen voting in state and federal elections.

RITE is working to end these disastrous experiments and to ensure that a bad idea with roots in a few far-left enclaves doesn’t end up infecting elections for the United States Congress or President.
* RITE is backing two Vermonters in a constitutional challenge against the City of Winooski, which wants to allow non-citizens to vote in certain local elections, including those for school board or approval of state-funded education budgets. These elections, however, are not as local as they may seem because they have major financial implications for taxpayers statewide. If Winooski’s law stands, it will enable non-citizens in one part of the state to spend tax dollars paid by citizens living in another part of Vermont. That’s not self-government. (**[Read More](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=800de6e049&e=ea91f782ea)**)

* Recent efforts to undermine self-government are also afoot in New York, Washington, DC, and California. The New York and California efforts have been enjoined, while several Members of Congress have targeted the DC measure for potential federal intervention.

* * *
# 3\. Following RITE complaint to the State Election Board, Governor Kemp Expected to Sign Bolstered “Zuck Bucks” Ban in Georgia

Georgia Governor Brian Kemp is expected to sign into law an expansion of Georgia’s ban on outside funding for election administration.

After **[RITE filed a complaint in February](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=d48a4987a3&e=ea91f782ea) ,** the Georgia State Election Board launched an investigation into DeKalb County accepting a $2 million grant from the U.S. Alliance for Election Excellence, a non-profit funded by donations from Mark Zuckerberg, which have become known as “Zuckbucks.” RITE alleges the county violated its state’s election law when it accepted the grant.

The update to Georgia’s existing “Zuckbucks” ban will help ensure additional counties do not try to circumvent the law and accept private money to finance their election administration activities. Meanwhile, RITE continues to urge the Election Board to compel DeKalb to return the funds and cut ties with its would-be liberal benefactors.
---

[Add us to your address book](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/vcard?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/profile?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382&e=ea91f782ea&c=31c3c59b69) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://riteusa.us12.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=dc5917dfc5aa19cc3795efbb2&id=735bdaf382&e=ea91f782ea&c=31c3c59b69).

name: Team Lucas Kunce
subject: The most valuable way you can help our campaign *right now*
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We have a lot to accomplish over the next 574 days, Peter
#
Peter,
In a moment, we’re going to ask you to **[make a monthly recurring donation of just $15, $5, $3, or whatever you can afford to help us elect Lucas Kunce and flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30799?refcode=em20230411-2982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=2982%2E614464%2EK8zZnn) But first, let us explain why these kinds of early investments are so important for our campaign.**
**[START YOUR MONTHLY DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30799?refcode=em20230411-2982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=2982%2E614464%2EK8zZnn)**
We’ve said from the start that Lucas is committed to building this movement the right way — entirely powered by real people like you, not corrupt mega-donors or corporate PACs. **And we’re proud of that commitment, but here’s the reality:**
Politicians like Josh Hawley have virtually unlimited access to campaign cash from corporate elites and GOP mega-donors. And since Hawley is the most vulnerable Republican senator up for re-election this cycle, they’re all-in to defend him.
Insiders at the National Republican Senatorial Committee have already come at Lucas fast and early with desperate attacks. They’ve conspired with DC special interests to tear down Lucas AND the movement we’re building together... **and Josh Hawley even said himself that our race _“is going to be one of the closest in America”_ this year.**
So here’s the situation: We have about 19 months (574 days, if you’re counting) between right now and Election Day 2024 — and we need to spend every day between now and then getting Lucas’ message in front of voters, standing up to these attacks, and holding Hawley accountable for betraying our country.
We have a LOT to accomplish. So we need your help to get it done, Peter.
**Monthly recurring donations are one of the most valuable ways you can help our campaign early on in this race.** Monthly support gives us the opportunity to plan ahead for things like field offices, TV ads, campaign lit... all of the things that are critical if we want to defeat Josh Hawley and flip this seat in November 2024.
**So what do you say?[Will you commit to starting a recurring donation of just $15, $5, $3, or whatever you can afford each month to help our campaign start off strong and prepare for the fight ahead? Monthly donations in ActBlue are flexible, so you can cancel anytime if your budget changes!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30799?refcode=em20230411-2982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=2982%2E614464%2EK8zZnn)**
**[START YOUR MONTHLY DONATION NOW »](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/30799?refcode=em20230411-2982&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=2982%2E614464%2EK8zZnn)**
We’re on a mission to put everyday working people in charge of our country again — and supporters like you are our only chance at making it happen.
Thanks for your support and consideration. Now, let’s flip this seat!
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230411-2982-footer&t=5&refcode2=2982_614464_K8zZnn&akid=2982%2E614464%2EK8zZnn)**

If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.lucaskunce.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=6&akid=2982%2E614464%2EK8zZnn). Mail us: PO BOX 1240 Independence, MO 64050.

subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven’t heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79721%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kguh53%2fNODAjkW4OGFpwNQ&sysid=1 "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we’ve seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they’re going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79722%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6HfyLBQ3L%2fQCubIdRitCLg&sysid=1 "but you only have until
midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---

---
You’ve fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can’t DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it’s too late>>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79723%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=j72e6jcI%2f4jD4DJwrjGUdg&sysid=1 "Renew your membership
before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message \---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans’ side. You’ve supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we’ve seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you’ve failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There’s good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79724%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=voE7TRj4GYihNEm0wUQHug&sysid=1 "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79735%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Tgrra4GtLBufOhGSSTZPuQ&sysid=1 "Are you going to renew
your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4
consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to
let your streak fade away?")_**

---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn’t over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79737%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=qbGqEsXCBhkhnbjyVA18EA&sysid=1 "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it’s too late>>>](https://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c79738%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=OoQRvun1H78PI8h59jTxaw&sysid=1 "Renew before it’s too
late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don’t let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

name: Deroy Murdock
subject: Theology 101
body:
I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning.

This sponsored message from Deroy Murdock is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zjjtadcsgusnauur3t6s5eb1ssvssnn717pn8s30_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I hope your day is going well. I’m writing to let you know about something I think you’ll find useful in your learning. Reason and speech are gifts from God that enable us to think about God and to worship Him. [](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zhin8lqljmf5mip1cd5ue2v9naln6n015plvpi58_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs) One of the chief aims of education at Hillsdale College is to understand what kind of being we are, as well as our purpose. That, in turn, makes it possible to begin to understand our relationship to God.

The study of God, also known as “theology,” has had a profound impact on Western civilization, stretching back thousands of years to the ancient Hebrews. And that’s what Hillsdale’s **“Theology 101”** online course is about—the development of theology from the Old Testament through the twentieth century.

**“Theology 101”** has been a popular course, so I’m pleased to let you know that it is [**now available for you to own on DVD**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zkcr9vtf6qu6tgfams4u34tdmql898en4in75log_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs). You can add it to your home library or give it as a gift to a friend or relative.

We do have a limited number of sets in stock, though—and they go fast—so don’t delay in getting your copy of **“Theology 101”** on DVD. Secure yours right now at: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/support-hillsdales-online-courses-theology-101-dvd](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2zooe2r9akr5gtivoqnk9ls7llm582qv25j2t1c40_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs)** Best regards,

Kyle Murnen, ’09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College
---

Deroy Murdock
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z9l66n62ospatrgn79frlscmi3347naqlkng2n98_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk4qj4ttkumqn4s9nmorb79hnmmrqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshg61oj5ctie48d245p25oh4cdge8oj6c5h68p724no)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.deroymurdock.com/rd/9z2z3cremgek4ibvc5esvdjv1mlp54onqbbtjc68uog_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs)_

name: James Comer (Chairman, House Oversight Committee)
subject: every Tom, Dick, and Harry is coming after me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When I became the Chairman of the Oversight Committee, everyone warned me not to step in the ring if I can’t take any punches.

| |

---
| | | When I became Chairman of the House Oversight Committee, everyone warned me not to step in the ring if I couldn't take any punches. Well, I took their advice and stepped in anyway.

As the GOP's top investigator, I've made a LOT of enemies looking into:
- Internal communications of the **Manhattan DA** targeting the former president
- Suspect **payments to the Biden family** from a Chinese company
- **Hunter Biden** and his shady business dealings
- The **origins of COVID-19** and any potential cover-ups
- The Biden Administration's failed response to the **baby formula shortage**
- Joe Biden's widespread use of **catch-and-release** for illegal immigrants
_The blowback from the Liberal Mob was swift and severe:_ The Biden Administration said my bombshell report was full of lies. Vox said my investigations were "flopping." Jennifer Rubin said I was focused on "phony scandals." And the Manhattan DA is refusing to cooperate in our oversight investigation.

Every Tom, Dick, and Harry is coming after me but our House Majority will never stop fighting for you, the American People. However, we can't take on the Liberal Mob - and keep fighting for accountability - without YOU.

_**[If you're with us, I urge you in the STRONGEST POSSIBLE TERMS to help defend our House Majority by chipping in a few dollars right now.](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z23krofiq9esgs2v0p2j99bj035342lou8gblnd8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs "If you’re with us, I urge you in the STRONGEST POSSIBLE TERMS to help defend our House Majority by chipping in a few dollars right now.")**_

Any amount you can spare enables us to keep fighting for what's right - even in the face of enormous blowback from the Liberal Mob.
---
| | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrkk2dsv85j80sc3af815jqh1rlcuo2h9oesh03o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs "James Comer")
---
| | | [STAND WITH ME](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhaluk4s5ucktlj3u8330qa1na7i5vk58jllc9ag_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j62oj4cjh2bs "STAND WITH ME")
---
Your support makes a huge difference. I hope I can count on you in this pressing time.

Together, we'll take back our country.

Thank you,
**James Comer** | _Chairman, House Oversight Committee_

---

name: Marjorie Dannenfelser
subject: A U.S. District Court in Texas has issued an injunction
body:
This is a massive win for LIFE.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544481:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---
Peter,
---
Your support, prayers, and relentless determination just led to a massive victory in the fight against deadly chemical abortion.
---
**A U.S. District Court in Texas has issued an injunction HALTING the FDA 's approval of mifepristone - one of the dangerous drugs used to perform deadly chemical abortions.**
---
This single drug is used in more than 50% of all abortions in the United States!
---
_But the fight against grisly chemical abortion is far from over ..._
---
_Pro-abortion forces are FURIOUS, and they're already pushing other dangerous alternatives as they appeal the ruling and vow to take the issue all the way to the Supreme Court._
---
[**Please make a contribution to help us keep up the fight against deadly chemical abortion on the heels of this MASSIVE victory for LIFE.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544481:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $35](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544482:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544483:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544484:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544485:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $500](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544486:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---

[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544481:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---

Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk ruled that the FDA's original approval of mifepristone and the recent decision to allow it to be prescribed remotely were both unlawful.
---
In his opinion, he agreed that the FDA prioritized politics over patients:
---
"But here, FDA acquiesced on its legitimate safety concerns - in violation of its statutory duty - based on plainly unsound reasoning and studies that did not support its conclusions. There is also evidence indicating FDA faced significant political pressure to forego its proposed safety precautions to better advance the political objective of increased 'access' to chemical abortion - which was the 'whole idea of mifepristone.'"
---
The ruling reaffirms that pregnancy is not an illness, and abortion is not healthcare.
---
_Every time a woman takes one of these pills, it tragically ends the life of an unborn child._
---
Additionally, evidence shows that it can have a whole host of horrific side effects for the mother - including severe bleeding, intense pain, the need for surgery, and **_even death_**.
---
Unfortunately, that didn't stop the Biden-Harris FDA from ignoring the science and approving these dangerous abortion drugs for sale by mail-order without any in-person doctor visit.
---
**It was past time that a federal court took action to rein in the Biden-Harris Administration 's radically pro-abortion FDA.**
---
Polling shows that Americans don't believe the FDA's assertions that chemical abortion drugs are safe, and a strong majority doesn't want them to be distributed by mail.
---
_But as more and more states implement strong pro-life protections, the Big Abortion Lobby will fight tooth and nail to defend its 'insurance policy' of mail-order abortion pills._
---
We're counting on your support to continue the battle against these deadly chemical abortion drugs as we face intense backlash from enraged pro-abortion forces.
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help us keep up the fight against deadly chemical abortion on the heels of this MASSIVE victory for LIFE.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544481:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---
For _LIFE_ ,
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/62544481:J8Bu-qGNm:m:1:3331421248:51E68F9C5BDE7648CDE61B8A61154D14:r)
---
Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
---
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr. PO Box 803, Arlington, VA 22206
---

name: CAPT Hung Cao
subject: I never thought I’d see this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Unleash America PAC
body:
| | | [](http://links.unleashamericapac.co/u/click?_t=4fd2065bb87d4411bcd7523509144268&_m=f0a616f93794439fa04f64e2cce9c992&_e=AfhFSjv9sthtwGjZM6os6VXebzvv7zB13a0zZ7fyfN_YCEVpLTjee2GI3g6vArB81BYj5qIZeqs-zWvTDqjL_Nj3X8GQabhvqnMMPn5tNCKveNTSmUxx6oJgdc4WcbUa5xZfILFgN2EYtQR0IbSgMjRkOscKqE2rTOvrpNdnDnkuJSaa8NnQyZCce5WDaAG4ciWWrmkLj9OGEDVlyEpLXboS2EOO-k8t0pKI8Tl8z01iCrLAXzW9SGQUJKVzJXH3FPJNDj6_5IhVBTShZB4IQByvBYKDqZGEilvoUn3WJkvVUFGHJj-r2uCZpSBjck0TO7Hkbz_523HeTDarO-pRBUo-VvTvdrLr8MdEwmNlO-I%3D)
---
Peter, My mother was the last person to see her father alive as he was hauled away by communist rebels in Vietnam in the middle of the night.
_What was the crime that cost him his life?_
_Speaking out against the communist uprising in his country._
When my family finally escaped Vietnam and set foot on American soil, there were so many unknowns. But there was one thing we were sure of: in the United States, they don’t haul off innocent citizens based on their political views. _Or do they?_
**The indictment of President Trump should concern every conservative in America.**
The actions of Alvin Bragg could lead us down a path of no return, where jailing those we disagree with becomes a normal part of American life.
**Peter, I put my life on the line defending American freedom as a U.S. Navy Captain. I don’t want to see our great country go down the path of the horrors I escaped from in communist Vietnam.**
**Our nation’s enemies relish in seeing us divided. In times like this, it’s urgent that we unite behind freedom of speech and American values.**

clean_body: | | | Peter, My mother was the last person to see her father alive as he was hauled away by communist rebels in Vietnam in the middle of the night. What was the crime that cost him his life? Speaking out against the communist uprising in his country. When my family finally escaped Vietnam and set foot on American soil, there were so many unknowns. But there was one thing we were sure of: in the United States, they don’t haul off innocent citizens based on their political views. Or do they? The indictment of President Trump should concern every conservative in America. The actions of Alvin Bragg could lead us down a path of no return, where jailing those we disagree with becomes a normal part of American life. Peter, I put my life on the line defending American freedom as a U.S. Navy Captain. I don’t want to see our great country go down the path of the horrors I escaped from in communist Vietnam. Our nation’s enemies relish in seeing us divided. In times like this, it’s urgent that we unite behind freedom of speech and American values. In Liberty, CAPT Hung Cao USN (RET) | | Paid for by Unleash America PAC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. | | Address: PO Box 320253, Alexandria, VA 22320 Email sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by Unleash America PAC

subject: North Carolina, Rep. Tricia Cotham, who ran last year on codifying abortion rights, has switched to the Republican Party and signaled support for a 12-week abortion ban. Cotham's in a 60% Democratic district. She doesn't belong in the seat--we must toss her out of it as soon as possible.
body:
A big lie, even for political campaign standards
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T32ce38be-4e65-4f2d-b9d9-45be034cd865/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| | | | | Peter, **Sometimes, the level to which Republicans will stoop in their deceit is exhausting. ** **_In North Carolina, Rep. Tricia Cotham, who ran just a few months ago on codifying abortion rights, has betrayed everyone by switching to the Republican Party. This gives the GOP a supermajority, allowing them to override a veto of any crazy bill they pass by Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper._** _Right now they're promising to pass a 12-week abortion ban, and Cotham, unbelievably, has signaled she'd support it. So, my friends, the fight continues, as it always does._ _**Cotham's in a 60% Democratic district. She doesn't belong in the seat--we must toss her out of it as soon as possible. For that--and the coming presidential race--we need a STRONG North Carolina Democratic Party.**_ [**_Will you join Blue Amp Action in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to boot this traitor, Cotham, and stop Republicans from attacking our rights in North Carolina?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01ab05e0-32e7-408c-8a72-3212db5aa1ca/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for continuing to fight for what's right. Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T37a283d5-440d-4be7-8bde-db9cfe2a7dc9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

name: Wes Moore
subject: Our first session (and fundraising freeze) is over!
