| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61633185/400653505/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230411endofsession_wm_180da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc4MzEwZC03MWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QmEFLHEpJPSxjsRQ9s27h_bXja1YrcsuUvuufwMoaXI=)
---
Team, The 2023 legislative session — the first under the Moore-Miller Administration — has officially come to an end. It is the honor of a lifetime to serve as your Governor, and I’m incredibly proud of the progress we’ve made over the last few months. **Together with our partners on both sides of the aisle in the General Assembly, we successfully passed all 10 of the bills I introduced, including:**
* **The Family Prosperity Act** that seeks to end childhood poverty by making the Earned Income Tax Credit permanent and expand the Child Tax Credit.
* **The Fair Wage Act** that will raise the state minimum wage to $15/hour on January 1, 2024.
* **The SERVE Act** that will create a paid service year option for Maryland high school graduates to serve their communities.

I plan to sign some of these bills into law later today and will sign more in the days ahead! On the campaign trail, I promised to bring Marylanders of all backgrounds together to tackle the issues facing us, and now, we’re delivering. None of this would have been possible without support from people like you. While Aruna and I spent the last few months working to move our state forward and pass our legislative priorities, we had to pause ALL fundraising during the legislative session. Needless to say, _we’re a little behind!_ **As we celebrate our accomplishments, we need to get the message out across the state, and that takes resources.** **[Will you help us kickstart our fundraising efforts and make up for lost time by pitching in a grassroots contribution of $10 or more to power our campaign?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61633187/400653507/2098035812?refcode=fl_em_fr_20230411endofsession_wm_180da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZjc4MzEwZC03MWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QmEFLHEpJPSxjsRQ9s27h_bXja1YrcsuUvuufwMoaXI=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Rick Scott
subject: Less than 1%
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter,
---
It’s Senator Rick Scott. I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me, but I want to take a moment to talk about why this race is so important. I’ve spent my career fighting for good jobs and opportunities for families in Florida and beyond. I’ll NEVER stop fighting for the American Dream, and with great patriots like you on our team, I know we can keep it alive for generations to come.

But right now, our mission to defend American freedom is facing one of its biggest challenges yet. I’m running for re-election because I know there’s still a LOT of work to do to defeat the radical Left’s ideas, but my race is going to be one of the tightest in the country. Last election, I beat my Democrat opponent by less than 1% and it had to go to a RECOUNT.

**Our race for Senate in Florida could be the race that determines control of the Senate, and I need every patriot on our team to step up if we’re going to win.[Can you pitch in now and help us take back the Senate?](http://links.voterickscott.com/u/click?_t=24d1692d4ad14657a18af9ad6ea13243&_m=a0c15efcddcc4b99932b22e52f949ddf&_e=BRvJ9OcW1U8_WTzJ_MvPuSUn9kn5rtvh-AdYnK4VNqJ8uaopY9JdlP-D966pXNqCAvVAx4PKHZqSqpEumZ-6y9bkv8KGt5Eru0jp595JUHhkxN6OxEOC_LdIKsnQqVp6Iu69Hj_aqLQH21n3fQ16OwQ39X6I0cNbu1vH-J1hftB-XyClqNQ7isA3xHpIdWiL4KJE9EXkoY2AMlXiFi4xBueXMKbMwP6v_3omAB1pycH4-NERpxCU8G3EZdsgL5ieVfwgDxnpXNrq4ZgG9sBCGziHK-MxcnyhqyAAV8-DK6dcvJKYFdURKnzV4vFQd5EVHUsIyv8_6w_9_ROaOYkm-D2JKrkvJUOa5ltv6cbei-GrvZ350d_nzEos-rn15PBP)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, It’s Senator Rick Scott. I know you’ve gotten a lot of emails from me, but I want to take a moment to talk about why this race is so important. I’ve spent my career fighting for good jobs and opportunities for families in Florida and beyond. I’ll NEVER stop fighting for the American Dream, and with great patriots like you on our team, I know we can keep it alive for generations to come. But right now, our mission to defend American freedom is facing one of its biggest challenges yet. I’m running for re-election because I know there’s still a LOT of work to do to defeat the radical Left’s ideas, but my race is going to be one of the tightest in the country. Last election, I beat my Democrat opponent by less than 1% and it had to go to a RECOUNT. Our race for Senate in Florida could be the race that determines control of the Senate, and I need every patriot on our team to step up if we’re going to win. | | | | Peter, I know what it’s like to pinch pennies. clean_body: We have to fight back. | Peter — The federal court ruling against the abortion pill mifepristone is an extremist attack on reproductive freedom that could have disastrous consequences for women across this country. We have to do everything we can to fight back and secure reproductive rights in North Carolina and everywhere they’re threatened — starting by holding all those who have attacked our most fundamental rights accountable. Anti-abortion radicals in the Republican Party are planning to ban abortion. Roy needs your help NOW to prepare to take them on. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = = = = Thanks, Team Cooper Begin forwarded message: \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Roy Cooper = Date: April 7, 2024 8:31pm Subject: Unacceptable. Peter — A federal judge in Texas just made the unprecedented and outrageous decision to order the Food & Drug Administration to suspend approval of mifepristone, the first of two medications used in most abortion care in the US. This is unacceptable. Today’s decision removes access to a safe, effective medication that has been used by more than 5 million people since the FDA approved it, EVEN IF IT’S USED IN COMPLIANCE WITH RESTRICTIVE STATE LAWS! Unbelievable. This is an extremist, political attempt to take away women’s freedom to make their own private medical decisions. It not only threatens women’s health — but also the FDA approval process and patient access to other medications. I will do everything in my power to secure abortion access in North Carolina. Like the majority of Americans and North Carolinians, I believe that reproductive choice is a fundamental right. I believe that we must never go back. But Peter, North Carolina Republicans have made it clear that banning abortion is their plan for our state. "So if you come in 3rd, you win. What? 'I got a lot of second votes, I got a lot of 3rd vote — what does that mean?'"](https://f69e.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6435a039b7b9d93339493e51&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.businessinsider.com%2Fsarah-palin-cpac-election-system-house-seat-ranked-choice-voting-2023-3%3Ffbclid%3DIwAR3Jknc7C6zK7VNe7krxknXbi80F8gFjREiHTI3U8mtD-8C3OFMn-GWQoVA&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_64351e1d4e369c109edff3a0&l=en-US&s=JWpasXB6yhFOn49Nj2FzhwrXGUY%3D) Business Insider

**admin@alaskansforhonestelections.com or call 907-802-8116****We only need 26,000 signatures, which is the lowest amount in history since we had the lowest turnout by percentage in history. Rank Choice Voting has made our job even easier. Let’s Do This Alaska.****If you would like to help us collect signatures, please sign up here** https://www.alaskansforhonestelections.com/petition-signatures**The Pro Rank Choice Voting group paid $300k and used mostly out of state signature gatherers, we want this done “By Alaskans, For Alaskans”**
---
#### **An Alaska Senator has said that our Bill is the Most Important Bill for the 2024 Election. We need you to get there. Help us Today!!!**
---
### **Sign In Person Today**
#### **Want To Sign The Petition To Get Repeal Rank Choice Voting!!!**

There are 40 House Districts, we need at least 35 or 75% of the districts. Attached is a breakdown of how many signatures we need per district. We will need signature gatherers in each district. The sign up link is the only way we can keep track of all of the people who are getting petition books. The group that passed Ranked Choice Voting in 2020 spent over $300,000 just on the signature gathering process, they paid an out of state firm to gather signatures here in Alaska. We want to have Alaskans in charge this time around. They collected 40,000 signatures, we want to collect 75,000.
Link to sign up for a Petition Book

name: Tim Kaine
subject: Before I became a Senator…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AB PAC
body:
| | |
---
Friends,
I’m Tim Kaine. Many of you know me as a U.S. Senator, but my passion for service and fighting for equality started long before I entered the public eye.

In my career, I’ve been a teacher, a missionary, a civil rights lawyer, a Mayor, Governor, Senator, and on the presidential ticket as a Vice Presidential candidate. **But over the decades, one thing has never wavered: my commitment to improving life for hard-working Americans.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633725/400655814/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
I grew up in Kansas City, where my dad ran a union ironworking shop. My parents taught me the value of hard work, being kind, and serving others.

During my time in law school, I took a year off to volunteer as a missionary in Honduras, where I taught welding – a skill I’d learned during weekends and summers in my dad’s shop. While I was there, I witnessed an economic system where too few people controlled far too much of the wealth, and there began my commitment to expanding economic opportunity for everyone back at home.

**After law school, my wife, Anne, and I moved to Richmond, started a family, joined a church, and made a home together with our three children.**
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633726/400655817/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
I began work as a civil rights lawyer, representing people who were discriminated against by banks and landlords, insurance companies, firms, and local governments – anyone who treated people unfairly. Ten years later, I ran for City Council, knocked on every door of my district, and won by just 97 votes.

Since then, I’ve gone on to become Mayor of Richmond, Virginia’s 70th Governor, and a U.S. Senator.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633728/400655819/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
Today, as I serve in the Capitol and run for re-election to the Senate, I’m still fighting for the issues that matter most to our communities – like access to affordable health care, quality education, and economic opportunity for all.

**But right now, experts at FiveThirtyEight****are calling my race in Virginia a “pickup opportunity” for Republicans in the Senate in 2024. And with a razor-thin Democratic majority, we can’t afford to lose this seat. **

**[If you want to see more progress on the issues you and I have been fighting for together for so long, I hope you’ll consider splitting a donation between American Bridge PAC and my campaign.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633729/400655821/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)**
__If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Tim Kaine and American Bridge PAC will go through immediately:__ | | | [Donate $15](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633733/400655823/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633734/400655826/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633735/400655828/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
---
| | [Donate another amount](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61633736/400655829/285455407?&amounts=15,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk2445-bu-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Nzc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVkNTRkOTI0LTcxZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=g0Y0UKEI04pKfIOFjP3sLNybX0LlqKCMK-cIx_kyBsM=)
---
Thanks for reading – and for standing with me during my campaign to keep moving our Commonwealth and our country forward.

-Tim Kaine

P.S. Like many of you, I’m a huge music fan – and I’m not bad on the harmonica. Some of my favorites are The Replacements, Charlie Parker, and the Carter Family.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Serve America PAC
body:
Friends –
Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.
I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my family was dirt poor.
So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States Senate.
I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party switch.
I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.
The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there. And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.
So I am asking:
Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can afford between Serve America and my campaign? The amount isn’t as important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping in. So please. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/serve-gallego]
Thank you, and adiós,
Ruben

name: Josh Hawley
subject: By you, for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Josh Hawley Victory Committee
body:
| | | Peter, When I decided to run for Senate, I did it because I was ready to fight for the values that keep American families strong.

body: 96 https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/covid-emergency- over-email?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april11hf  Friend, it’s official: the COVID-19 State of Emergency is OVER! Joe Biden can no longer use the pandemic as an excuse to ram through his agenda and spend trillions of our tax dollars. I was proud to lead the bill in the U.S. Senate that forced him to end it. This is what happens when Kansans and Americans come together to tell these politicians we’ve had ENOUGH of their nonsense. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/covid-emergency-over-ema il?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april11hf&amount=8 Just think about how much more we could do with a Republican Senate, House, and White House. Help make it happen by chipping in just $8 here. Thank you for your petition signatures, donations, and constant support for my push to roll back Biden’s overreach. We got this done, thanks to you. It’s time to keep it up. https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/covid-emergency-over-ema il?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april11hf Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/covid-emergency-over-ema il?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april11hf DONATE NOW »   https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email -footer?utm_source=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april11hf Keep reading for a personal message from Doc: Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to defend life and to stand for our jobs, our families, and our faith. And that's exactly what I'm doing. But I can't keep up the fight without your help. It’s going to take all of us, standing together, to hold Joe Biden and the woke left accountable. I'm not about to back down, but I need you standing with me. If you're able, I hope you'll chip in below. -Senator Roger Marshall https://winred.kansansformarshall.com/marshall/2022-email-footer?utm_so urce=sgrc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=2023april11hf CHIP IN NOW This message was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com by: Kansans for Marshall PO Box 1588 Great Bend, KS 67530 Unsubscribe PAID FOR BY KANSANS FOR MARSHALL To unsubscribe visit: http://ci.criticalimpact.com/unsubscribe1.cfm?eid=80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694&c=37973&jid=1d18731734a8dcf9

clean_body: We can do it, but we need your help | | | | | This isn’t a standard email, Peter. We HAD to do something different because the Liberal mainstream media will never tell the truth. 2024 is theLASTchance to save our country, and the Senate map is one of the most favorable to Republicans in history. Democrats have to defend 23 seats, while Republicans only have to defend 11; we illustrated the Senate map below. | | Republicans have the best shot at recapturing control of the Senate and CEMENTING a Conservative MAJORITY. Democrats MUST defend more than 3 SEATS in Republican-controlled states: West Virginia, Ohio, and Montana, which are shown below. If Republicans cannot win these 3 Conservative seats to TAKE BACK the Senate, our country will suffer. Just look at the past couple of years with Democrats in control. They have shown they are INCAPABLE of governing our country. While they have been in the majority, crime has EXPLODED, our economy is in the tank, kids are being taught sexually explicit and racist content, and worse. It’s almost impossible to recognize our country anymore. | | The problem is, radical Democrats have continually outraised Republican candidates and nominees in the past years, allowing them to win elections – which has crippled our country. Because of the Democrats' Coastal Elitist donors, Republicans have lost winnable elections, and the consequences have been disastrous for our nation. I'm a new Text block ready for your content. 2024 is our LAST CHANCE to save our country as we know it – it is one of the most consequential elections of our LIFE. Republicans must win back the Majority in the Senate, but we can’t do it without you. The only way we can save our country and elect a REPUBLICAN Majority in the Senate is with patriots like you supporting our mission. | | We would love for you to join us at this free event.

Friends,

subject: NEW: Clarence Thomas IMPEACHED?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
|
---
| | | This is a full-blown EMERGENCY:

**In the past 72 hours alone, top Democrats have called on Clarence Thomas to RESIGN, launched partisan INVESTIGATIONS into him and his wife, and moved to IMPEACH him!**
---
| | | [GO ON RECORD: STAND WITH JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62546465:JOl5dqGN9:m:1:3391001263:42EF1F50EF50F373A138C3A241902910:r "GO ON RECORD: STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS!")
---
The Liberal Mob will do anything to kick Justice Clarence Thomas off the bench and DESTROY our Conservative Supreme Court Majority.

They hate him because he's a brilliant constitutionalist, a reliable Conservative jurist, and he completely destroys their narrative. If they manage to impeach and remove him from the bench, the consequences for our country will be unthinkable.

**That 's where you come in. **

_**[We desperately need the full force of our grassroots network to help stop their coordinated effort to take down one of our most beloved Conservative justices. We're calling on AT LEAST 20,000 Patriots to go on record by midnight tonight and stand with Clarence Thomas before it's too late.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62546465:JOl5dqGN9:m:1:3391001263:42EF1F50EF50F373A138C3A241902910:r "We desperately need the full
force of our grassroots network to help stop their coordinated effort to take down one of our most beloved Conservative justices. We’re calling
on AT LEAST 20,000 Patriots to go on record by midnight tonight and stand with Clarence Thomas before it's too late.")**_

Liberals control the Senate AND the White House. If they impeach Clarence Thomas and take control of the Supreme Court Majority too, it's over. **We 're finished.**

They would have the power to undermine your right to bear arms, roll back religious liberty, reverse our Pro-Life victories, and gut election integrity.

_But they 're not going to get away with it. Not on your watch._

That's why we need to hear from you ASAP:
---
| | | [GO ON RECORD: STAND WITH JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS!](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62546464:JOl5dqGN9:m:1:3391001263:42EF1F50EF50F373A138C3A241902910:r "GO ON
RECORD: STAND WITH CLARENCE THOMAS!")
---
Thank you,
Breaking Supreme Court News (via House GOP)

name: Andy Kim
subject: All military service members deserve access to affordable health care
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61637189/400669092/1642521363?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzc2ODNlMy03NWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=sbgs2TkG-H1Etb_ua6D_kvncl6PwuiNw1ub30ZNfkLA=&emci=5bc79289-b3d4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=dc7683e3-75d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=26261389)
---

| | Americans who wear the uniform and protect our country should not be without health care. It's that simple. That's why as the ranking member on the Subcommittee for Military Personnel, **I've introduced bipartisan legislation to ensure that**** _all_****of the military servicemembers, including our National Guard and Reserve servicemembers, have access to affordable health and dental care.** We can all agree that we need to serve them just like they serve us every day. When I speak with members of the National Guard and Reserve, and military support organizations, they tell me that access to affordable dental care is a concern for them and that dental issues are a top reason reservists are found unfit to deploy. **We owe our National Guard and Reserve servicemembers so much. They are always ready to answer the call to keep us safe. We must support them by providing essential health and dental care services.** More soon, _Andy_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution clean_body: | | | | Americans who wear the uniform and protect our country should not be without health care. It's that simple. That's why as the ranking member on the Subcommittee for Military Personnel, I've introduced bipartisan legislation to ensure that allof the military servicemembers, including our National Guard and Reserve servicemembers, have access to affordable health and dental care. We can all agree that we need to serve them just like they serve us every day. When I speak with members of the National Guard and Reserve, and military support organizations, they tell me that access to affordable dental care is a concern for them and that dental issues are a top reason reservists are found unfit to deploy. We owe our National Guard and Reserve servicemembers so much. They are always ready to answer the call to keep us safe. We must support them by providing essential health and dental care services. More soon, Andy | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Andy Kim for Congress. | This email was sent by Andy Kim for Congress P.O. name: Chris Van Hollen

body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61637529/400670318/396464211?refcode=em-logo&refcode2=02c6f8de-76d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=7Tv1qSpvq1zsyoz6k2Jt/xorV0ZjO20p1dajpIbTzyFTj39h0aiXJGI9ZDrGsjSp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM2ZjhkZS03NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjSVnWhEc4UIxjSLbUVK77uhou_bi0hEwCJBT9iLsg8=)

Yesterday my friend, Senator Bob Casey, announced that he will be running for reelection in Pennsylvania in 2024. Bob has been a tremendous asset to the Senate and a tireless advocate for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities.
Winning this Senate seat is essential to holding our Democratic majority. We know from experience that state-wide campaigns in the Keystone State are among the most contentious and expensive in the country.
[**Can you split a contribution today to support Bob Casey and our work to hold onto the Senate in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61637530/400670319/-802552346?refcode=&refcode2=02c6f8de-76d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=7Tv1qSpvq1zsyoz6k2Jt/xorV0ZjO20p1dajpIbTzyFTj39h0aiXJGI9ZDrGsjSp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM2ZjhkZS03NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjSVnWhEc4UIxjSLbUVK77uhou_bi0hEwCJBT9iLsg8=)
Last year Pennsylvania voters helped deliver the Senate majority for Democrats when they flipped that seat from Red to Blue and sent John Fetterman to Washington, DC. Now, we need to make sure they come out strong to reelect Bob Casey.
Republicans are already targeting this race. Mitch McConnell and his friends are working actively to flip Bob’s seat in 2024. They are going to spend hundreds of millions in the fight to turn Pennsylvania Red.
Bob and I have worked together on a wide range of issues, including bills to stand up for kids who were being left behind during the early stages of the pandemic, crack down on corporate abuses, prioritize the needs of seniors, support people with disabilities, and much more. The Senate needs more advocates like Bob. We need to win this.
[**As you know, early fundraising is critical to a campaign’s eventual success. Chip in $10 or whatever you are able to help hold Pennsylvania and keep our Democratic majority in 2024.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61637531/400670320/-802552346?refcode=&refcode2=02c6f8de-76d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=7Tv1qSpvq1zsyoz6k2Jt/xorV0ZjO20p1dajpIbTzyFTj39h0aiXJGI9ZDrGsjSp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM2ZjhkZS03NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjSVnWhEc4UIxjSLbUVK77uhou_bi0hEwCJBT9iLsg8=)
****[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61637532/400670321/-802552346?refcode=&refcode2=02c6f8de-76d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&contactdata=7Tv1qSpvq1zsyoz6k2Jt/xorV0ZjO20p1dajpIbTzyFTj39h0aiXJGI9ZDrGsjSp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODIzMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmM2ZjhkZS03NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bjSVnWhEc4UIxjSLbUVK77uhou_bi0hEwCJBT9iLsg8=)****
Thank you for staying in the fight.
Onwards!
Chris

name: Giffords.org
subject: New analysis shows that the gun death rate for children is rapidly increasing
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
This should raise alarm bells for everyone.
#

Gun violence is the NUMBER ONE cause of death for children and teens in our country.
We’ve known this. But the Pew Research Center released new analysis of CDC data that shows how quickly the problem is getting worse. Their investigation found that the gun death rate for children under age 18 increased by a staggering 46% between 2019 and 2021.
This should raise alarm bells for EVERYONE.
Thousands of young people’s lives have been stolen by senseless acts of gun violence. These are children and teens who had so much life left to live—so many more birthdays to celebrate—but their lives were cut short by the lethal impact of a bullet.
At GIFFORDS, we know that there is legislation that can save lives. We just need to pass it into law. Commonsense measures like universal background checks, extreme risk protection orders (aka red flag laws), and safe storage legislation allow guns to stay out of the wrong hands and keep our kids and communities safe.
It’s time for us to stand up and fight back. We cannot allow for another increase in the gun death rate for our nation’s children. Are you with us in this crucial fight?
[**Please, make a contribution to GIFFORDS PAC today to help keep our children safe from gun violence.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-apr23.fjJHm6&refcode=em230411-1-60&t=1&akid=4946%2E3935704%2EajMkb6)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_

We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=4946%2E3935704%2EajMkb6) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Eric Sorensen
subject: It’s time that we come to grips with the truth:
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois
body:
| | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x83M4dZJugfYV1qaqFPlv6RqhHUwGp3jx00BzdM94JVAiiWKvLXtSSr7G8RUinwS7_HPOEHFtsBC3bwDWxIOjU0FtmvuuC96aicTrXGdRp4HDJsPwEinq7S2U5aMK7G22-VxX-5VTxgwlL8Ix-t9yNlKUqqo22NlKnq4gIF8g8PnuDAC-uMDG6cfoSrzeYvO2z4uUhUF0nd4Sbtt_8M1G9T1QfusMJCUQbDRJeHuG65D6SBGB9ZrC1wIMmEUdruITTLNx7MK9KEeV8Fe4moRnpJcPtnM3iyYYNW2TxakV7LXEGMBOyaj37cGn8PPAtVWn8FWpZz5MqjHbCt-DGbmLwZHjia8BaPWREK9AnDJuzR6e8rc1E8-ONZ4fN8RKGKGnIPNZCxt_ZOQmIxLvOoQAI/3v9/HssX8ik3ROCMvK4AUamq2g/h0/YPMTXbRmqiRsvkMEmtzAmIF1yDpYadA388_ImDvX96E)
---
It happened again, Peter. We started the week with news of yet another mass shooting -- this time in Louisville. Four were killed and another nine were injured. This comes just weeks after six students and teachers were killed at a school in Nashville. In both attacks, the shooter used an AR-15. It's a disheartening thought, but mass shootings are now a routine occurrence in this country. **Make no mistake, this is a uniquely American phenomenon, and it’s time that we come to grips with the truth -- our uniquely weak gun laws are to blame.** **[Add your name in support of universal background checks and an assault weapons ban. Help me show Congress and the NRA that the American people are demanding action on gun violence immediately.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnHsswt9OapJnK11r_KUQ-ORI8_z5rVIrtEWaGrP9KSYbiwYOJqpNleHXuBoPWeowXZw13PmDaFPXZ9i4iIITzY5h6pcpCRgFEr-NIXx8ijd9oSR2LmxpO2RmgvM8EqI3XRAG6lyhYYH04edlkg1MVgaYibmEOhTZCC7dr_ZZSwRKrHG-EPexAKhWMjS82Kl4sfLeAVN03tvQMkvWQaJ89E_GZUg7QdbmdQHW_twPRr0sI2lfMb5XaYVjTHDrvko5LJ6FBYPLSx7bjgRlyWi-TSc7nMkhH08hzg2lzGkdtNyojyFg8bfC7CwCXoHun4HmzlBNcSIfpx4mMAkrTLkMqp6F_gIqUkqPIk_rvLT2HWFA/3v9/HssX8ik3ROCMvK4AUamq2g/h1/g-MNDREVrILBBnF3zPV85zpmwlhRNSFBF3WE_BkkCvs)**
---
[ **Sign the Petition
** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnHsswt9OapJnK11r_KUQ-ORI8_z5rVIrtEWaGrP9KSYbiwYOJqpNleHXuBoPWeowXZw13PmDaFPXZ9i4iIITzY-1XCdKsphv2wBbb3giDa_n9Wu115g4erT5n7HgG-hVnTOBVO8v3FSscgHrD1y3uYVg_mITalu5PVPvYkA3l0Wv4Ks6jE7cUgGgjwhYOlqNIS3UpDWMy5-X417LaePbEQtZUOFU3NHqYGM1f_bf16IHIr3CZLxRolkhOJKmg2g7Jz15vmTqHQhOacXzo5vIOtKdOtXA-jqX9qeEGu-_0CmqK0JOFzrQflbMXKpQ4m8pF9ui2kwcpDDvSP1KKgV9lFrDxQabrGuewVwGf4HP42iA/3v9/HssX8ik3ROCMvK4AUamq2g/h2/U5SN_NKCxAkXyBg6eRlGs61TY1Bfq8jNlc26DuLakhI)
---
Do you know what else is uniquely American, Peter? **One of two major political parties in this country has an expressed policy of putting the Gun Lobby ahead of the victims of gun violence.** I'll never forget my day in Congress. Several of my GOP colleagues showed up with AR-15 lapel pins instead of American flags — a shameful show of fealty to the NRA. In Nashville, three lawmakers were literally _expelled_ for leading gun safety protests. Think about that, Peter. More was done to silence dissent than to keep people safe! **We have many obstacles ahead of us, but I'm committed to strengthening our gun safety laws -- including through universal background checks and an outright ban on assault weapons. But we need widespread public support to do it:** **[Add your name to say you support universal background checks and an assault weapons ban. The more people that sign, the louder our message to the NRA will be.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnHsswt9OapJnK11r_KUQ-ORI8_z5rVIrtEWaGrP9KSYbiwYOJqpNleHXuBoPWeowXZw13PmDaFPXZ9i4iIITzYsW18OOy-GO7YKLA906kgIOHPdG1UdVNEt4CkBvPBjsAsYSJSSunk9BZdsoxd0mr-jhw21YJOR0enLxBQf1Yz8PRB3aUkxXl0tU7QvFrBXmT_KQ-NbLNi2TFLxh6xZdQtp4DbtYLmzbHgCIlgbD3AGeD3zSgs3W7MV5gTi1ap2zVJJZ_XQ3tkTp2rQZmCXCMA1ESypZ-64fZKPuwdMhZAZ4OluypvlJyBJJ7P6JDYQFvjSN8iFN1G5FN5c-SdD0380cIyBtwKV_xdg6p3UMy_1g/3v9/HssX8ik3ROCMvK4AUamq2g/h3/FZXJ15jvRFbnzEwXTnxRUFO2aelrRQ1HZzda7TgUbkc)**
---
[ **Add Your Name
** ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnnHsswt9OapJnK11r_KUQ-ORI8_z5rVIrtEWaGrP9KSYbiwYOJqpNleHXuBoPWeowXZw13PmDaFPXZ9i4iIITzY-MstrKBvjcYXHzVSa5ydI3pnyJBBzBbhEj7iM97iwiibdChfPPBuU4Rs7TLDDDOjEePgbIX48aJrn7CPKubUrjiiu4m6QlTgOVNoVZ_zBTZvaX9-VkjEKoTek9qmg1mwIh_fUTsyHJv817IIiacgxV603f87Z_nwti5-c10NvdD-Cvk60Yw1mGMLo8MSDnevNAGDaIfcrTaMRanHlj9b7mhPFGufScV_sFyBMC8bk1jiMl6wHjBVN-rJrCOflOJYkazMxTVjam4V6JmUKPm7Pg/3v9/HssX8ik3ROCMvK4AUamq2g/h4/2M8jc4ZIhxXwCGHfepUQveYN7CXrZThD-oV7mSw6x-Y)

Thank you, Eric

clean_body: | | It happened again, Peter. We started the week with news of yet another mass shooting -- this time in Louisville. Four were killed and another nine were injured. This comes just weeks after six students and teachers were killed at a school in Nashville. In both attacks, the shooter used an AR-15. It's a disheartening thought, but mass shootings are now a routine occurrence in this country. Make no mistake, this is a uniquely American phenomenon, and it’s time that we come to grips with the truth -- our uniquely weak gun laws are to blame. Do you know what else is uniquely American, Peter? One of two major political parties in this country has an expressed policy of putting the Gun Lobby ahead of the victims of gun violence. I'll never forget my day in Congress. Several of my GOP colleagues showed up with AR-15 lapel pins instead of American flags — a shameful show of fealty to the NRA. In Nashville, three lawmakers were literally expelled for leading gun safety protests. Think about that, Peter. More was done to silence dissent than to keep people safe! We have many obstacles ahead of us, but I'm committed to strengthening our gun safety laws -- including through universal background checks and an outright ban on assault weapons. But we need widespread public support to do it: Thank you, Eric | | Paid For By Eric Sorensen for Illinois Eric Sorensen is a meteorologist born and raised in Rockford, IL representing IL-17 in Congress. He’s seen firsthand the importance of establishing trust with the community, and he’s determined to use his expertise as a climate communicator to fight for Illinoisans on environmental justice and more in Washington. name: Courier Newsroom
subject: What happened in Wisconsin
body:
We’ll break down the stakes of this race, the results, and what we learned.
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)
Peter —
At Courier Newsroom, we mobilize voters by delivering factual, trustworthy journalism to those without access to local news in eight battleground states.
We deliver our news entirely to online audiences, which makes it easy to measure the reach and impact of our work.
**So, how did we do in the Wisconsin Supreme Court race?**
[**We’ll break down the results for one of 2023’s most important races in a moment — but if you already believe in our mission to deliver quality local journalism to communities who need it the most, will you chip in $5 now?**](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3656?refcode=em-20230411&t=2&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3656?refcode=em-20230411&t=3&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)**
Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race was one of the most expensive and important judicial races in the history of our country. From abortion rights to protecting voting rights ahead of the 2024 Presidential election, the court will soon make monumental decisions affecting millions of voters' lives.
**With so much on the line, our local newsroom team at _UpNorthNews_ jumped into action. They published numerous pieces explaining the stakes of the race, profiling the candidates, and more.**
[****](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3656?refcode=em-20230411&t=4&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)
But their work didn’t stop there. Using boosted social media posts and ads, the _UpNorthNews_ team reached an astonishing 525,000 Wisconsin voters. **The result?**
**Record-breaking voter turnout that flipped control of the Court to a liberal majority.**
**[Peter, the local news coverage of newsrooms like _UpNorthNews_ is impacting crucial elections just like this one. As we start laying the groundwork for the critical 2024 election cycle, your support has never been more important. Will you chip in $5 now to power our news teams, educate voters, and strengthen our democracy?](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3656?refcode=em-20230411&t=5&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)**
**[Chip in $5 »](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/3656?refcode=em-20230411&t=6&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)**
Thank you for supporting us,
Courier Newsroom

**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=7&refcode2=839_120351_UTe0s0&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=839%2E120351%2EUTe0s0)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

name: 2023 Membership Services
subject: We’re giving you one more chance to stay.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Your 3 year membership streak is at risk.

|
---
| | | |
Hey, we haven't heard from you. Are you letting your 3 year Republican Membership streak disappear or did you miss our email?
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zqiafcjoov0m08q2dr9rmvvss07cb61pr2iorvp8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---

The 2022 Midterm Elections were one of the toughest battles we've seen**, but the worst has yet to come. **

**The Democrats are prepared to pull out all the stops to attempt to stop us from implementing sound Conservative policies, and worse yet, they 're going to try to stop us from taking back the White House. **

**Now more than ever before, we need you to STAY on our team,_[but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zf1itrbe3epnp6fs0equlpqjnr55j8m1ca1sgqno_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "but you only have until midnight tonight to renew your 2023 House Majority Membership.")_**

---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z3cmq8jo31sb8l74mdsqhf82i3ppn63es9aucvi8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
You've fought with us for three consecutive years, and we need you to stick by our side as we go into battle this year.

We can't DEFEND OUR MAJORITY without you. **_[Renew your membership before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zr67n297oo2o4h8nhvuv0hedka84dvebiarbtqc8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "Renew your membership before it’s too late")_**

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Mark, 2023 Membership Services
Subject: We hate to see you go.

Friend, for the last **3 years** , you have stood by House Republicans' side. You've supported the Conservative fight furiously and consistently through every battle we've seen,**but we have bad news for you. **

**It pains me to tell you that for the first time ever, you 've failed to renew your Republican Membership and have lost your support streak.**

There's good news though, friend. I spoke with leadership about this exceptional circumstance, and they have allowed us to extend our Membership renewal period to **_[11:59 PM TONIGHT.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuql47sh803buf54bhaa5hgbimthm54oth0t367g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "11:59 PM TONIGHT.")_**

**_[Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z5kafjodlg4cb0ioojqkoqqeuldupis9leee3aa8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "Are you going to renew your House Majority Membership and become a sustained Republican Member for 4 consecutive years, or have we lost your support to the Left, and you are going to let your streak fade away?")_**
---
| | | [RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z12d4l7akgif18t8uft61rd76j8d9dq76b20bjq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP")
---
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zbit0o73l4s7lv3phhljecbi2ecto0gn1j5j7va0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "ORDER NOW")
---

We just finished the biggest battle of our lives. The 2022 Midterm Elections took everything we had, and the fight still isn't over. More than ever, we need our strongest grassroots supporters on our side.

You only have until **_[11:59 PM](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z82b2tu2ignqhk0llcfrc70ak28adp25tr873nq0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "11:59 PM")_** to let us know if you plan to stand against the Left and their radical socialist agenda for a 3rd year in a row. **_[Renew before it's too late >>>](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zce98iuir2ks8l48aebjp5ucus8u802dufjn8q7o_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cdh2bs "Renew before it’s too late")_**

Americans across the country are counting on you. Don't let them down.

Thank you,

Mark, National Republican Membership Office

subject: Introducing myself
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS
body:
I'm excited to be part of this team to send Lateefah to Congress.
# [](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/go/39?t=1&akid=12%2E1163%2Ey22A9_)
Hey, this is Zoë Kleinfeld! I'm so excited to _personally_ let you know that I'm managing Lateefah Simon's campaign to win election to Congress.
I jumped at the opportunity to join Lateefah's campaign. Having just successfully managed the Nevada Attorney General's underdog re-election campaign, **I know firsthand what it takes to win hard fights -- _and Lateefah has exactly what it takes._** Her commitment to serving our community truly embodies what California is all about and is the type of leadership we deserve in Washington.
We can't give this race anything other than 100%, because we don't know what may come our way in the months ahead. **[That's why I'm reaching out to ask: Can you chip in any amount right now to power our campaign? The more donations we get in this early stage of the race, the more effectively we can allocate our resources to get the staff, materials, and budgets we need for the long haul.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230411-1&refcode=em20230411-1?refcode2=12_1163_y22A9_&akid=12%2E1163%2Ey22A9_)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230411-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230411-1&refcode2=12_1163_y22A9_&akid=12%2E1163%2Ey22A9_)**
There are myriad reasons I'm excited to be on this team -- but a big one is that I know Lateefah will uplift _all_ folks' voices in Congress to fight for change. She is uniquely capable of unifying the experiences of every single community in California's 12th and, together, we're going to build a powerful, inclusive movement of historic proportions.
We're going to build a coalition to make Lateefah and every person in California's 12th proud. **I can't wait to see just how far we go.**
Thanks for your help — let's do this!! 💜
With gratitude,
Zoë Kleinfeld, Campaign Manager
Lateefah Simon for Congress

* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ls-em20230411-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230411-1&refcode2=12_1163_y22A9_&akid=12%2E1163%2Ey22A9_)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=12%2E1163%2Ey22A9_)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.lateefahsimon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=12%2E1163%2Ey22A9_)

To give by check:
Lateefah for Congress
1714 Franklin St #100 - 438,
Oakland, CA, 94612
Email us: [info@lateefahsimon.com](mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com)
PAID FOR BY LATEEFAH FOR CONGRESS

name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: Why I created the BLEXIT Foundation
body:
Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8b3hrcdecslm5i2hdt4pkmmdrnkv93npfmmkv98_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zqqgiddtlsn0dpm8dkc8l1lhl3vb8kf2vu9c0048_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgsr387bq0jrahmkkpiv26bu8b6skmgj9mrfkm3g_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zpq0ag1gb4ib3khl3mtd670ekfekqa63d5rtdj70_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zmo77a5rfshema94enqh8t3fbcb3cn02mlo9njno_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zve1970lh5jm5emei95v8narb2d8mp0384hmgcag_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjdioe3q1amn822abr74t4k6uelkqpm493t9dmp0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkde24eu9gfq9vdde909tfph99dsco7gjnkv2cso_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zorifmpo9osttqoi33c30jqivgkkcq9739dkf2so_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zl1200rp7uh5m5s6jfn2qqqidajjspbf0cpsbaso_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $50 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvbepcquan78n6kql61hno1q4l3urdn2kp8472s0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $100 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zct4dl91g2kug05brmr9q8c3i98b2hd05dpbk5t0_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $250 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zor6o18a7a0i097t5cpp2php9vdb51hr0p63ugkg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zvjhvhajkuiva3nido5errm2fjilkblbmav467c8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $1,000 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z11pdbp3te3rqph6dvk4bbl0uo8q2bt05j94u7eg_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate $2,500 >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zo7du0970q5pd6vl92dor47acqinqlan5f391v88_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)
[_**Donate Any Amount >>>**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z9p3qg8642fmer3f45cjp7hn6atmo6i42rfst5h8_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

[_**Please consider making the most generous donation you can today by clicking here.**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi4qm6t2g6hnr3j59al4uv62aj33l5qeaaap40fo_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)

Thank you, Friend.

Candace Owens
President
BLEXIT Foundation

American Action News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2q3kic696d5bhbb74ktkec5ban03ibiqni59eno_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkgqracjkmoq37d1m65qbfctjmkrncst66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni60o72cdim0oh1k8gn48n24hhm1p32cpie6oj7c8iv0)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsnj6tm650vl7foa3h573vg7lh22g4r5ao2qi7ig_rp22sh2s8i66o74c9j69or2cth2bs)_

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation American Action News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

I’m writing to share some big news

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61640953/400684363/-1015964506?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20230411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmIwZTRkMS03ZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQ78Lnj65N5Iq7IdjNoI0OFsLGQAd_XUqrEwEZSe2Tw=)

| Hi Peter, it’s Josh Riley.

I’m writing to share some big news: **I’m running for Congress in New York’s 19th Congressional District!**

I’m running because I believe in the promise and potential of Upstate New York. Even after all we’ve been through, this remains a Valley of Opportunity. Upstate New Yorkers are nothing if not resilient. When we get knocked down, we get back up.

And I know that we can do in the future what we have done in the past: build a strong Middle Class, protect seniors’ right to retire with dignity, defend a woman’s freedom to make her own healthcare decisions, and manufacture the things the world needs to meet our biggest challenges.

But Peter, we need to return to a politics that puts everyday people above special interests. That’s why **I’ll never take a penny of corporate PAC money.**

[_**Instead, I’m relying on grassroots supporters like you, Peter. So I hope you’ll help us kickstart this campaign and contribute $5 or more to help us get this campaign going to flip NY-19 from red to blue »**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61640954/400684364/-1015964506?refcode=BLU-JRFC-20230411-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85Mzg5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NmIwZTRkMS03ZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FQ78Lnj65N5Iq7IdjNoI0OFsLGQAd_XUqrEwEZSe2Tw=)

**The contrasts with my Republican opponent, Marc Molinaro, are clear.**

He took money from George Santos and then voted to gut the Ethics Office responsible for investigating him.

He took money from corporate PACs and then he voted to give them massive tax cuts, adding $114 billion to the deficit.

He’s jeopardizing the Full Faith & Credit of the American economy, threatening to balance the budget on the backs of seniors.

**He votes 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor Greene!**

_We can’t afford another two years of Marc Molinaro._

clean_body: I’m writing to share some big news | = | Hi Peter, it’s Josh Riley. I’m writing to share some big news: I’m running for Congress in New York’s 19th Congressional District! I’m running because I believe in the promise and potential of Upstate New York. Even after all we’ve been through, this remains a Valley of Opportunity. Upstate New Yorkers are nothing if not resilient. When we get knocked down, we get back up. And I know that we can do in the future what we have done in the past: build a strong Middle Class, protect seniors’ right to retire with dignity, defend a woman’s freedom to make her own healthcare decisions, and manufacture the things the world needs to meet our biggest challenges. But Peter, we need to return to a politics that puts everyday people above special interests. That’s why I’ll never take a penny of corporate PAC money. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = The contrasts with my Republican opponent, Marc Molinaro, are clear. He took money from George Santos and then voted to gut the Ethics Office responsible for investigating him. He took money from corporate PACs and then he voted to give them massive tax cuts, adding $114 billion to the deficit. He’s jeopardizing the Full Faith & Credit of the American economy, threatening to balance the budget on the backs of seniors. He votes 95% of the time with Marjorie Taylor Greene! We can’t afford another two years of Marc Molinaro. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | = | = | = | = | = We have a strong foundation to build on. In 2022, our campaign won over 49.2% of the vote in a very challenging environment for New York Democrats. We had the highest Democratic turnout percentage of any congressional district in New York State – thanks to the help of grassroots supporters like you! The Cook Political Report and Sabato’s Crystal Ball are already calling NY-19 a tossup for 2024. And national Democrats just listed our district as one of their 33 initial targets for 2024. We can win this thing, Peter. I’m honored to have you on the team, and I look forward to working together to flip this seat blue next November. With gratitude & high hopes, Josh P.S. Whether you’re a Democrat or a Republican or none-of-the-above; whether you’ve been in politics actively for years or this is your very first campaign; no matter who you love, how you pray, your race, your abilities, or your background–there’s a place for you on our team, and we’d love to have you join us. | = * | | = Paid for by Josh Riley for Congress Josh Riley for Congress PO Box 836 213 Tioga St Ithaca, NY 14851 United States | | ---|--- = = If you wish to donate by check, you can make checks payable to Josh Riley for Congress and send to PO Box 836, 213 Tioga St, Ithaca, NY 14851. Peter,

There is a disturbing trend on the left-- Transgender activists are increasingly emboldened to attack those who oppose them. Time after time, we watch the left enable the rhetoric and justify the violence-- **ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!** I was ambushed and assaulted by a transgender activist after speaking to a group of students at San Francisco State University. Students gathered wanting to hear the pro-woman side of the sports debate but were impeded by transgender activists, shouting, cursing, and threatening. This left-wing intimidation campaign won't work! This is only more evidence that I'm fighting the good fight, and proof that women need sex-protected spaces! I know what I'm doing is right. When they want you silent, speak louder. I'm on the frontlines fighting for women and girls and speaking TRUTH to all, even those who refuse to hear it. [**Will you step up and stand with me in this fight? Donate to NinePAC and help me continue to speak TRUTH where it's not welcome and FIGHT to protect the future of women's sports!**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547403:6VSFiqGNb:m:1:3391001263:B283FA2E4FB294FFA87C7467B0A9FE94:r)

name: Senator Bob Casey
subject: I want you to be the first to know.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election. | | |
---
| | Hey Peter, I want you to be the first to know: **I’m running for re-election.** It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities. **But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone.**
**If you’re with me,**[**will you split a donation between the PA Dems and our campaign today**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61641175/400684920/1308572717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTMxNWI2ZS03ZmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_OZo44-6crlxtdj6O4U5HmAMRcHNOQGuThizFv3hfpg=)**? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race.**
---
[CHIP IN HERE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61641176/400684921/1308572717?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZTMxNWI2ZS03ZmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_OZo44-6crlxtdj6O4U5HmAMRcHNOQGuThizFv3hfpg=)
---
In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red. Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton. **I’m no stranger to hard fights.** I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth. But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign.

clean_body: I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election. | | | | | Hey Peter, I want you to be the first to know: I’m running for re-election. It’s an honor to represent my fellow Pennsylvanians in the Senate, and it is their trust that drives me to get up every day and fight for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities. But know this: Mitch McConnell and the GOP are already coming for this seat. I won’t be able to win this re-election fight alone. If you’re with me,=? This is poised to be one of the most competitive elections in the country, so your support will make a huge impact on the start of this race. = In 2022, Pennsylvania’s Senate race gave Democrats our slim, 51-seat majority. That means next year, our opponents are going to do everything they can to flip Pennsylvania red. Republicans are already targeting this Senate seat and running attack ads. To defeat them, we’re going to earn support from Pennsylvanians from Erie to Scranton. I’m no stranger to hard fights. I’ve been standing up for Pennsylvania’s working families and communities for my whole career, and I won’t stop now. There’s still more work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results for working families and children across our commonwealth. But it’s going to take all of us. The first 24 hours of fundraising are critical to the success of this campaign. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | = | = | | | = | = | | | = | = Thank you, Bob Casey | Thank you for supporting the Pennsylvania Democratic Party. Pennsylvania is one of the most important swing states in the country. Donald Trump won Pennsylvania in 2016, and in 2020, we flipped our Commonwealth blue and elected Joe Biden. If we're going to elect Democrats up and down the ballot in 2022, we need your help. = Emails are an important way for us to stay in touch with our supporters. If you need to update your contact information, please . If you don't want to receive future email updates from our campaign, you can click here to unsubscribe: If you'd like to receive text messages from PA Dems, text JOIN to 70504. By participating, you consent to recurring autodialed marketing messages from PA Dems to the phone number you provide. No consent required to buy. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Impulsive decisions are out of character for me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Booker for Kentucky
body:
[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18924?t=1001&akid=3138%2E346206%2EW3GJji ][IMG]
Peter,

Impulsive, emotional decisions are out of character for me.

I am the guy who had a four-year plan to get into Harvard even though my
family was dirt poor.

So I thought long and hard about the decision to run for the United States
Senate.

I prepared for it long before the possibility of Senator Sinema’s party
switch.

I came to the conclusion that as a Marine, a Latino, and someone with a
record of standing up for working people, we can build a coalition that
can win a 2-way race, 3-way race, 27-way race... doesn’t matter.

The only open question was whether the grassroots support would be there.
And I thought it would be. So far, I’ve been right.

So I am asking:

[ https://act.charlesbooker.org/go/18930?t=1002&akid=3138%2E346206%2EW3GJji ]Can you please use this link to split $5, $10 or whatever you can
afford between Charles Booker and my campaign? The amount isn’t as
important as the donation, because it all adds up when we’re all chipping
in. So please.

CHIP IN →

Thank you, and adiós,

Ruben

Contribute to Charles Booker: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-email-donate?refcode=em20230411-3138-footer&t=1003&refcode2=3138_346206_W3GJji&akid=3138%2E346206%2EW3GJji

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.charlesbooker.org/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=3138%2E346206%2EW3GJji

Contributions to Booker for Kentucky are not deductible for federal income tax purposes.

Paid for by Booker for Kentucky

name: HelenGym.com
subject: Everything must change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Our city is at a crossroads.

Violence causes parents fear whenever their kids head to the subway or stay late for sports practice. It shuts down block parties and celebrations. It pits communities against one another and rips apart the very idea that we’re in this together.

Our young people are forced to learn in unsafe school buildings that pose hazards to their health. Longtime residents are struggling to keep up with the rising costs of living. Our economy is failing to produce the high-wage jobs and robust small businesses that enable communities to prosper.

As Helen often says, everything must change — and we need a fearless, proven fighter like her to deliver it.

Tonight’s debate is a critical moment on the pathway to realizing that change.

On the debate stage, Helen will outline her bold vision for a safer, thriving, vibrant city for all Philadelphians. It’s one of our biggest chances to show voters that Helen is a champion who will make our city the best place in the country to live and raise a family.

Ahead of this crucial point in our campaign, we’re racing to raise $5,000 to keep our TV ad on the air, power our work to meet more Philadelphians where they are, and capitalize on tonight’s debate.

So, what do you say : Will you chip in to help Helen and our movement rise to this moment? We’re still $3,579 short of our goal.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:

CHIP IN $5 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=5]
CHIP IN $12 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=12]

CHIP IN $20.23 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=20.23]
CHIP IN $50 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=50]

CHIP IN $100 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?express_lane=true&amount=100]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em]

Thanks for always having Helen’s back. We’re so grateful to stand with you.

— Team Helen

P.S. The debate will be broadcast at 6:30 PM on FOX 29 and streamed on FOX29.com, FOX 29’s YouTube channel, Tubi, and Amazon News!
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States

_So I need your support more than ever to have any chance of fighting back against the Left’s assault on Wisconsin and _preserving our conservative House majority in 2024.__

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61643317/400692737/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhODdiMy04M2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BSq6tzz3aTiQG7mO9HlexJsDPy1VHAyn8OfwME-0Ug=&emci=f3b149a4-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=047a87b3-83d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364)
