| | Less than one year after the _Dobbs_ decision, women across our country just lost access to another pillar of reproductive care. **Just a few days ago, the most lawless judge in America – hand-picked by Donald Trump – effectively banned access to the abortion medication,****mifepristone. This ban will take effect in seven days, unless the Fifth Circuit acts.** If it takes effect, this ruling will ban the most common method of abortion in ALL 50 states. Even states where abortion is still legal, like Oregon. [**Republicans are continuing to wage their war on women's reproductive freedom. The consequences for women if this ban is allowed to take effect will be devastating. We have to stop them. Sign my petition today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61643318/400692738/-731304598?contactdata=IONmrbfKZbXhgmV8FgUMvYyIso7zHaqy7g3MvI42koOap2lsKw9hk8vtRnNE8/tGlT8aYwkEPCfJg5XJR91IaInnW8I7DtGwWp0peHEhLro=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhODdiMy04M2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BSq6tzz3aTiQG7mO9HlexJsDPy1VHAyn8OfwME-0Ug=&emci=f3b149a4-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=047a87b3-83d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) This case has no legal standing, and was purposefully funneled to Trump's judge in Texas because right-wing extremists knew he would deliver the verdict they wanted. The very same extremists that helped overturn _Roe v. Wade_. Conservatives have spent decades packing our courts with right-wing judges and justices willing to do their dirty work for them and legislate from the bench.**The mifepristone ban is the direct result of years of Republican court-washing**. A few weeks ago, I did something I've never done before:**I stood on the Senate floor and called on President Biden and the FDA to ignore this illegitimate ruling, keep mifepristone on the market and protect access to this critical medication for women nationwide.** Our country is at a turning point. We can either sit back and watch the undemocratic takeover of our institutions by right-wing extremists, or we can fight back. That's where you come in. [**I need your help: sign my petition and tell President Biden to stand up to conservative extremists and ignore the mifepristone ban.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61643319/400692739/-731304598?contactdata=IONmrbfKZbXhgmV8FgUMvYyIso7zHaqy7g3MvI42koOap2lsKw9hk8vtRnNE8/tGlT8aYwkEPCfJg5XJR91IaInnW8I7DtGwWp0peHEhLro=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhODdiMy04M2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BSq6tzz3aTiQG7mO9HlexJsDPy1VHAyn8OfwME-0Ug=&emci=f3b149a4-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=047a87b3-83d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) [add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61643320/400692740/-731304598?contactdata=IONmrbfKZbXhgmV8FgUMvYyIso7zHaqy7g3MvI42koOap2lsKw9hk8vtRnNE8/tGlT8aYwkEPCfJg5XJR91IaInnW8I7DtGwWp0peHEhLro=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNDdhODdiMy04M2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4BSq6tzz3aTiQG7mO9HlexJsDPy1VHAyn8OfwME-0Ug=&emci=f3b149a4-f2d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=047a87b3-83d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=9818364) we know Republicans won't stop here. clean_body: | | | | Less than one year after the Dobbs decision, women across our country just lost access to another pillar of reproductive care. Just a few days ago, the most lawless judge in America – hand-picked by Donald Trump – effectively banned access to the abortion medication,mifepristone. This ban will take effect in seven days, unless the Fifth Circuit acts. If it takes effect, this ruling will ban the most common method of abortion in ALL 50 states. Even states where abortion is still legal, like Oregon. This case has no legal standing, and was purposefully funneled to Trump's judge in Texas because right-wing extremists knew he would deliver the verdict they wanted. The very same extremists that helped overturn Roe v. Wade. Conservatives have spent decades packing our courts with right-wing judges and justices willing to do their dirty work for them and legislate from the bench.The mifepristone ban is the direct result of years of Republican court-washing. A few weeks ago, I did something I've never done before:I stood on the Senate floor and called on President Biden and the FDA to ignore this illegitimate ruling, keep mifepristone on the market and protect access to this critical medication for women nationwide. Our country is at a turning point. We can either sit back and watch the undemocratic takeover of our institutions by right-wing extremists, or we can fight back. That's where you come in. we know Republicans won't stop here. They didn't stop with Dobbs. They're not content to leave it up to the states. They'll keep chipping away at our constitutional rights and freedom from every angle unless we act. We must hold them accountable and defend reproductive rights – starting with ignoring this ban. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Candace Owens, Co-founder of BLEXIT
subject: The most personal email I’ve ever sent you
body:
I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

[](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-01Hrey0Lpue324YLQNzFbSQc2nj3jNM7jUvp8shKQlxwfWoI6OmeRarOAZak4bJSZ-jder78rCjQ_S79Pc15E8kt_VtBE4TZ49J01gXxim8w-BUQzr4hNP9f4vtLmBg96FJGITaHcdstlkY_K6KCim8%3D)

Friend,

This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation.

Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation.

**For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop.** In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities.

Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture.

[_**Please support the BLEXIT Foundation 's mission today by helping me reach our goal of raising $25,000 from new online donors. You can click here to donate.**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-05jsh306GVahxw4NIDeWv7pLNbPO-Msvk8Rbga4fd7OJNpdChJ9DiI4RSOoyQZ56eFEuHa7d0RlspdQf8g5cooNYnro-Ngf-xinawgqK-ECUkIiboxZjCOR2iUit0q0Il9gO-N2iKvO3jAs95GQiiQg%3D)

**_Now I 'll share my story_... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities.**

Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking.

We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals.

This is WRONG.

I've dealt with racism... _**I 've even received death threats**_. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable.

But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up.

I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters.

[_**Friend, I am inviting you to support the BLEXIT Foundation and help us spread our winning message of entrepreneurship, school choice, faith, and family. My goal is to raise $25,000 from online supporters to fund our mission. Please click here to donate $10, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000 or any amount. **_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-0yCe09Wpb0geoW1KH7G9AmJzTkonKE55jAFdiLjIJ4J4Fx4ojgno1tkawQfmCd0iO6bIfc1M_FPr6selH0423b7AaBNLpsq_wAOVTGzXixMFGWFDdKq6-apuYFwpOW3ETipdHmzHyQhFkaAHTL7mFGA%3D)

I am breaking the rules.

It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... _I 'm not doing that_.

You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country.

So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.**Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss).**

When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing.

Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for:

* **School Choice:** Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools.

The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. [_**You can support BLEXIT 's efforts to fight for School Choice here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-072fzM3mEcUTguWK8b3DEJ9hVEzkPlaJpbyxl39-3QsxWgxLoEqcaz9SYlRhHASI84ebN10DCb-CTsIYoay9CiBCE5D3wbCP-Uw3HT5JvBSYxRlz-3OA5WthlzMPYhvJ6RBLmsEeccnACRdiLoGkHyM%3D)

* **Criminal Justice Reform:** The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities.

Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message.

[_**Help the BLEXIT Foundation change the narrative by making a donation here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-0696cB2xsvuk-ox8-ft-i_CqfHQ6YCMZPrVKRsFPmuvO_MY1gf5RpGQq04siUqIxukqYBhkGJE3082HOo5TQ3H0hb_XF4vMhNqrv1klGlVueXtEQ9ODDHg70UCxjxEi7oFzw4NMS4TsTQt-3fF_M1CI%3D)

* **Entrepreneurship:** I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire.

BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation encourage entrepreneurship and empower Black and Hispanic communities by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-086cuYhIwdNoap5n9nD5acxbeoKIJToIK4tD-A1czXwTcQahnyclJ9BTEsp52V8qJGSJaTTQBwWtaiLPxH-ISMimYl4ovE_stPSUIjYqfQxf5dqG2yHdgfoCnCf2kW4b_ikoJmPrG9VLRoUqHPFdVY4%3D)

* **Teaching History: **Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. [_**Please help the BLEXIT Foundation teach real American history by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-01HzIQI5lgJ6eKeKSx68fzHXjdpZNa3z9cJJ8SS3fW2sfTO6KDGGXn3GJUtQFNRqwQSLSk-BbYNyJRY48neOneboLxDMjrB_XsnPYRlv-wTOR9INpGXs6niczTmFHu1KvpMNZ2sNoXvQX33DgEgE5BU%3D)

* **Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore.

The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. [_**Please support BLEXIT 's events and help us spread our message by donating here >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglh5jbcyYPMXtuCPSsXDsu-0_3xwW4WskOCFKAbGMCkb6cDfOBP31dU8vlp09VJNHfO2Uj8auag52EZ3w1DbtS-DQjLAizxtODAGVI4bGCvDUnrn7i3dgS7XPH_R8AQt5O3wdpyPklKhda0Fs5motPU9x7ZqsgqpezhIqJqZXGih6A%3D)

What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor.

This is personal to me.

I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot.

Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today:

[_**Donate $10 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglhsog4t3KimGjBFmmiIrO_W093ZACR4q07LgysLwSs2VqmtxUm9R4u0jhqkMG16gx6wSZqg1MQSlM7HwtgiPtSyUAl9JuPhd7JeSXaHXxxzUmjzNp42vorvHorXZdyCrpkyinpPUQCBhI3E7PMuro70OD5xF8EcBHOGPSsQLo3un4%3D)
[_**Donate $35 >>>**_](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=33c74d1b955e47e5b8e05687b970b57f&_e=6hQ9Zwbonh2uTFpE1kIo8iqW0VeWlgaBSuFsw32IJozBeFCTh4QvGfa2AWv218COSz1OpO1gKRslCUlJcVcBnSRii6j9K8OfMg-hgKp4MKjI178EO4aQnq-FIBLBHglhlCMFNb8TLtcdqo35xpHxBAFci1BRq0p8NVh0zFCbYsSOaN-HXNakJYlQqn9jWapZ490SlAiXd3iLphzSfp2XfxgNIpA1PaQyOrgzCHXl0GlCJGXGpfCtbtUZwvSMhB8V1TOqHqCTmdM7hPYlhM_oJXv_PFBbGKBKIGW50LzG3QI%3D)

This is my last message to you before you close this email.

The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment.

My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause.

clean_body: I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Friend, This is the most personal and vulnerable email I have ever sent you... But I must share my story and tell you why I created the BLEXIT Foundation. Before I share my story, allow me to introduce the BLEXIT Foundation. For too long, I have watched Black Americans force-fed a message of victimhood, fear, defeat, and dependence. And, this has to stop. In 2019, with Brandon Tatum, we created BLEXIT Foundation - a nonprofit organization - dedicated to bringing traditional American principles and a message of empowerment to urban minority communities. Our message to America's black and minority communities is that you are not a victim. We promote economic independence and individual freedom, strengthening the nuclear family, and fostering a deeper appreciation for patriotism in Black American culture. Now I 'll share my story... racism, death threats, and empowering black communities. Growing up as a black woman, I can recall learning how "helpless" I was told I was. And this message - which the media forces Black Americans to listen to - is heartbreaking. We're taught to believe we're victims, that nothing will ever change, the police are our enemies, and racism prevents us from ever achieving our goals. This is WRONG. I've dealt with racism... I 've even received death threats. Racism is an ugly form of collectivism and is unacceptable. But the solution is NOT to become a victim and give up. I created the BLEXIT Foundation to empower black communities, minorities, and the people in my life whom I love. Since our start in 2019, BLEXIT has grown substantially with over 41 grassroots chapter programs in 41 states, over 14,000 volunteer members and local community leaders, and nearly 60,000 grassroots supporters. I am breaking the rules. It seems like every email I receive in my inbox engages in fear-mongering, makes big promises, and demands you and I make a donation without any of the details... I 'm not doing that. You should know the details, believe in our mission, and understand how BLEXIT is changing the direction of our urban communities and our country. So I am taking a risk by sending you a long email with all the details to empower YOU to choose to support the BLEXIT Foundation.Please read to the end of this email (I have an important message at the end you don 't want to miss). When I founded BLEXIT, I wanted to make sure above all else we were NOT just a "think tank", but rather we pride ourselves on being a thoughtful and quick acting "DO-tank". We're doing things no other organization in the country is doing. Here are the BLEXIT Foundation's values, what we're doing to reach Black communities, and what we're fighting for: School Choice: Often, the people allegedly "fighting for minorities" are doing everything in their power to keep Black and Hispanic students locked into awful schools. The ugly truth is that these schools are simply brainwashing centers attacking the nuclear family, creating victims, and teaching their twisted values. BLEXIT is fighting for School Choice to empower young Black and Hispanic students to learn real skills, have more opportunities, and escape poverty. Criminal Justice Reform: The mainstream media wants urban communities to hate our law enforcement officers. This ugly message is setting Black Americans back. The BLEXIT Foundation supports our men and women who serve as police officers and defend our communities. Yes, we do need criminal justice reform. But we believe cooperating with our police officers and connecting as a community is critical to creating justice. BLEXIT Foundation is starting conversations with police officers and urban communities. The media wants you to believe cops are evil! This is wrong. But people never hear this message. Entrepreneurship: I am passionate about empowering Black and Hispanic Americans. Free markets, responsibility, and advancing the careers of urban communities is the solution to poverty. The BLEXIT Foundation identifies young leaders in urban communities and helps them create resumes, practice interviews, and learn skills employers desire. BLEXIT is not a book club or simply talking a big game... No, we're actually making an impact with real individuals committed to serving urban communities. Teaching History: Critical Race Theory has nothing to do with solving race relations in our country. This is about division and spreading a victimhood message. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in teaching real American history. It is critical for our urban communities to learn about our Founding Fathers and the Constitution to become productive and educated citizens. Presenting Our Message: **We have failed to reach urban communities with our message and values. Instead, we've allowed the mainstream media to write the narrative. Not anymore. The BLEXIT Foundation is going places where no one else goes. We're hosting events in Detroit, Baltimore, and Tampa and starting real conversations. We're not just preaching to the choir, and these aren't boring events. They have music, art, and real conversations, and they are fun! I am committed to reaching urban communities and spreading our message. What does "BLEXIT" mean? BLEXIT is the Black exit from the culture of victimhood, fear, and dependence the media has forced on us. If you hold a permanent view of yourself as a victim you become your own oppressor. This is personal to me. I was once a slave to a culture of victimhood and became a proud Black patriot. Friend, I am asking you to join the BLEXIT Foundation by making an investment in our organization. Please use one of the links I've copied below to donate today: This is my last message to you before you close this email. The BLEXIT Foundation believes in faith, family, and freedom. At the end of the day, our message to urban communities is about love and empowerment. My burning desire is to use my voice and change the direction of our urban communities and the country. The BLEXIT Foundation has a real impact, and I am inviting you to join our cause. Thank you, Friend. Candace Owens President BLEXIT Foundation Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Sean Hannity are spreading disinformation and lies in the ranks.
#
Derek —
For a campaign to be successful, you’ve got to think through your targeting.
We spend a lot of time studying what channels our voters watch, the areas they live in, and the platforms they’re subscribed to.
The same thing goes for billboards, and that’s what we’re looking at right now.
When a member of the Armed Forces drives up to base, they see a bunch of billboards.
And for the next piece of our FOX campaign, we want them to see a billboard about how Tucker Carlson, Laura Ingraham, and Sean Hannity are spreading disinformation and lies in the ranks — and endangering our national security.
The price of a billboard varies a bit, but they typically cost around $2000 for a month. And Derek, there are a LOT of bases in this country.
**[So, to start this off, we’re asking you to make your first $20 donation. That might seem small, but if 100 others join you that’s a billboard for a full month. If 1000 join you, that’s 10 billboards. And if everybody reading this right now donated, we’d crush our goal and fully fund this campaign for a year.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-apr23.Brw65h&refcode=em230411-1-subs&t=1&akid=8156%2E3013755%2E00Nk4Y)

The price of a billboard varies a bit, but they typically cost around $2000 for a month. And Derek, there are a LOT of bases in this country. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly: | | | | | | | | | ** That’s how VoteVets works, Derek. Lots and lots of people chipping in what they can, when they can, to support a common goal. This team has always had our back before, and we hope you will again today. Thank you, The team at VoteVets PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Our. Kids. Are. Dying.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
Republican leaders don’t care about our kids because if they did, they’d ban these damn weapons of war.

Friends -
Guns are the leading cause of death among children in the United States of America. Not car crashes. Not cancer.
Guns.
And it’s getting worse.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/2117?t=1&akid=1270%2E4767699%2Eb7Azj2)
Republican leaders don’t care about our kids because if they did, they’d ban these damn weapons of war. They’d support background checks.
But they don’t.
Because they don’t give a damn about protecting kids and they are certainly not “pro-life.”
Gavin
* * *

👉🏻 **Hi.** Please don’t click away just yet. 😡
If you are angry about the state of gun violence in America, there is something you can do about it. Please split a contribution between Gabby Giffords’ gun safety organization and Gavin Newsom’s Campaign for Democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we’d have the resources to take on the NRA nationally and in California and we could save lives. If that sounds worth $20, please split a donation between GIFFORDS and Campaign for Democracy today.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Caleb=20Heimlich?=
subject: We need you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Join us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction! | | |
---
| | [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=f4ae32fbb7&e=6a281f566d)
---
| |
---
| Dear Peter,

We need you. I know times are tough, but we need you on our team to have any chance of making a difference this year and next in Washington State. That is why I am personally asking you to [renew your Sustaining Membership](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=5e91a4cded&e=6a281f566d) – [or become a new Sustaining member](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=b514295360&e=6a281f566d) – of the Washington State Republican Party. We are building a strong and vibrant Republican Party, but we will need your [support](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6a9608582a&e=6a281f566d) to keep growing and expanding to achieve our ambitious goals.

The stakes couldn't be higher in this election cycle. Democrats in Olympia are pushing forward their own aggressive and radical agenda, and we need [your help](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=bf60bea5c7&e=6a281f566d) to stop them before it is too late for our great state.
Last week, the State Supreme Court upheld the Democrats' Income Tax on Capital Gains. Now there are bills to lower the initial threshold, expand the rate of the tax, and apply similar taxes to other forms of income. Without your help, the Democrats will achieve their stated goal of a progressive statewide income tax for all. And that is far from all, Democrats are pushing anti-family, anti-second amendment, and anti-public safety legislation at an aggressive pace.
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c890d56664&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| By [renewing your Sustaining Membership today](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=88a6e63d1f&e=6a281f566d), you'll be joining us in the fight to move Washington State in the RIGHT direction. Your support will help us to recruit and train new activists and volunteers, launch effective advertising campaigns, and support our Republican candidates at all levels of government.

But we need to act fast. The Democrats are already ramping up their efforts to win elections in 2023 AND the critical 2024 elections. We can’t afford to wait - we need to match their energy with our own, and we can only do that with your investment.
---
| [ ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=16e9028a25&e=6a281f566d)
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=c7f988d86d&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")
---
| [Your contribution of ](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=8f1a1833e6&e=6a281f566d)[$10](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6205d92c92&e=6a281f566d),[ $25](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=2da6c4deaf&e=6a281f566d), [$50](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=e57639c4e7&e=6a281f566d),[ or more](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=28c330f122&e=6a281f566d) will make a real difference in our fight to keep Washington State out of the hands of radical socialists. [Become a card-carrrying Member of the Washington State Republican Party today by joining the party as a sustaining member.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=97baf6407a&e=6a281f566d) This card embodies your willingness to stand up for Republican priorities and take back our state.

We can't afford to sit on the sidelines - we need you to [join the team today.](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=51c9b85576&e=6a281f566d)

Best regards,

Caleb Heimlich
Chairman
---
| [Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!](https://wsrp.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=be1a8605f1118163852707f35&id=6715e65588&e=6a281f566d "Become a 2023 Sustaining Member Today!")

name: The EMILYs List Team
subject: a full scale attack on autonomy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by EMILYs List [www
body:
|
---
| | This is why we need pro-science, pro-choice voices in office *everywhere* >> [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61646764/400705874/541775293?sourceid=1048886&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjliYzU2MC04Y2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTrx8F00n3LLRoyzKCE78TTc5R1mK8iP23RizKFPVxk=&emci=aa1bb35a-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1b9bc560-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Republicans nationwide are attacking the civil rights of trans people. Make no mistake: this is yet another way the GOP is trying to destroy our bodily autonomy — and we won't stand for it.

**We can replace Republican bigots with Democratic pro-choice women nationwide. Please, donate today to help elect women who will PROTECT our rights:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61646765/400705875/541775293?sourceid=1048886&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjliYzU2MC04Y2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTrx8F00n3LLRoyzKCE78TTc5R1mK8iP23RizKFPVxk=&emci=aa1bb35a-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1b9bc560-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** **Peter, we are appalled by the Republicans' recent attacks on our trans family and friends.**

Since the beginning of 2023 alone, at least __492 bills__ have been introduced across 47 states with the intent to block trans people from accessing health care, education, or legal recognition, and even from simply _existing_ in public spaces without fear. Of these nearly 500 pieces of legislation, 36 have been successfully passed and 363 remain active in their respective legislative chambers as of April 10.

After years of calculated attacks on our reproductive freedom, it should come as no surprise that GOP lawmakers are using bigotry, inflammatory rhetoric, and dangerous (and baseless) fear tactics to justify anti-trans legislation. It's all the same agenda: to destroy our bodily autonomy.

[**So please, stand with EMILYs List and donate now to support Democratic pro-choice candidates who will FIGHT BACK against Republican extremism.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61646766/400705876/541775293?sourceid=1048886&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjliYzU2MC04Y2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTrx8F00n3LLRoyzKCE78TTc5R1mK8iP23RizKFPVxk=&emci=aa1bb35a-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1b9bc560-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)

So here's the good news, Peter: EMILYs List-endorsed women like Gov. **Gretchen Whitmer** in Michigan, Reps. **Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)** and **Jahana Hayes (CT-05)** , and Sens. **Mazie Hirono (HI)** and **Elizabeth Warren (MA)** are already fighting back. From enshrining trans civil rights to providing legal means to pursue protections from discrimination, Democratic pro-choice women _know_ how essential it is to protect choice and autonomy — and that's why we need their voices in office now more than ever. ****EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight for _all_ of us. Donate to help elect and reelect candidates who can stop vicious GOP extremism in its tracks:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Help-Women-Win-April23](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61646773/400705883/541775293?sourceid=1048886&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYjliYzU2MC04Y2Q4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oTrx8F00n3LLRoyzKCE78TTc5R1mK8iP23RizKFPVxk=&emci=aa1bb35a-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=1b9bc560-8cd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)**** Thank you,

the EMILYs List team

clean_body: | | | This is why we need pro-science, pro-choice voices in office everywhere >> Republicans nationwide are attacking the civil rights of trans people. Make no mistake: this is yet another way the GOP is trying to destroy our bodily autonomy — and we won't stand for it. We can replace Republican bigots with Democratic pro-choice women nationwide. Please, donate today to help elect women who will PROTECT our rights: Peter, we are appalled by the Republicans' recent attacks on our trans family and friends. Since the beginning of 2023 alone, at least 492 bills have been introduced across 47 states with the intent to block trans people from accessing health care, education, or legal recognition, and even from simply existing in public spaces without fear. Of these nearly 500 pieces of legislation, 36 have been successfully passed and 363 remain active in their respective legislative chambers as of April 10. After years of calculated attacks on our reproductive freedom, it should come as no surprise that GOP lawmakers are using bigotry, inflammatory rhetoric, and dangerous (and baseless) fear tactics to justify anti-trans legislation. It's all the same agenda: to destroy our bodily autonomy. So here's the good news, Peter: EMILYs List-endorsed women like Gov. Gretchen Whitmer in Michigan, Reps. Jennifer McClellan (VA-04) and Jahana Hayes (CT-05) , and Sens. Mazie Hirono (HI) and Elizabeth Warren (MA) are already fighting back. From enshrining trans civil rights to providing legal means to pursue protections from discrimination, Democratic pro-choice women know how essential it is to protect choice and autonomy — and that's why we need their voices in office now more than ever. **EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight for all of us. Donate to help elect and reelect candidates who can stop vicious GOP extremism in its tracks: Thank you, the EMILYs List team ****** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Team Shapiro
subject: Our democracy is under threat
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHAPIRO FOR PENNSYLVANIA
body:
As we get ready for a critical election in 2024, we need to do everything we can to secure our democracy and make it easier for people to vote – not put up barriers to the ballot box.

Derek, it's no secret: our democracy is under attack.

Whether it’s right-wing attempts to make it harder for people to vote, voting misinformation and conspiracy theories or the violent attempt to overturn the 2020 election, our democracy has been threatened like never before.

As we get ready for a critical election in 2024, we need to do everything we can to secure our democracy and make it easier for people to vote – not put up barriers to the ballot box.

**Josh Shapiro believes the right to vote is sacred, and is leading the fight to protect our democracy at every turn.[Will you sign on to join the fight to save voting rights and protect our democracy?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61663669/400744316/54261591?utm_campaign=email_041123_voting-rights&source=email_041123_voting-rights&refcode=email_041123_voting-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODM0ODg5OS1hZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BN5v5WjJY79mR6cH-pUWtXYJUVYeBb4GdAqtr358U8Y=&emci=03a017d1-93d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=38348899-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)** | | [Sign Your Name →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61663670/400744317/54261591?utm_campaign=email_041123_voting-rights&source=email_041123_voting-rights&refcode=email_041123_voting-rights&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NTY5MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzODM0ODg5OS1hZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BN5v5WjJY79mR6cH-pUWtXYJUVYeBb4GdAqtr358U8Y=&emci=03a017d1-93d5-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=38348899-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=21962291)
---
As our Attorney General, Josh Shapiro went to court time and time again to defend Pennsylvanians’ right to vote and ensure every legal vote was counted.

Now as our Governor, he’s leading the fight to make it easier to register to vote and cast your ballot, while ensuring that our elections are secure and conducted with integrity.

Now more than ever, we need to stand together to ensure every voice is heard in our democracy – and fight back against every single attempt to suppress the right to vote.

**So Derek, can we count on you to sign your name and help us defend voting rights and secure our democracy?**

name: Coach
subject: Protect American Farmland >>>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
Take immediate action now >>>
| | | Peter, It’s vitally important that I reached you today, Peter. Our national security and American sovereignty are under attack, from within and without. Our southern border crisis is already criminal enough, but shockingly, President Biden has been selling our country’s farmland to our top foreign adversaries across the ocean. U.S. Department of Agriculture data demonstrably shows Chinese ownership of American farmland has increased from **$81 MILLION in 2010 to a frightening $1.8 BILLION in 2020**.
---
[**PROTECT AMERICAN FARMLAND**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/0e7424a11fa2d93e/756caa24fae45159c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
This is precisely why I’ve led the fight for American farmers and our economic freedom by introducing the _Protecting America’s Agricultural Land from Foreign Harm Act_ alongside my fellow Republican Senators Braun, Tester, and Rubio. We must increase federal oversight of foreign investments in agricultural land, especially from **Russia, China, North Korea, and Iran**. Our food and national security must be prioritized and protected from bad actors. I’m proud to support this legislation to safeguard our agricultural industry and national interests. With that said, my work on this issue is _far from over_ , so I’m asking for your urgent help to get this critical legislation over the goal line. [Rush your secure support here!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/0e7424a11fa2d93e/d8d8595bede8c07ac3d6b838967d376c/33013) – Coach **Show your support – rush a contribution:******
---

name: Katie Hill
subject: Viagra is ten times as dangerous
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61647405/400708275/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230411_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjU2Nzg1Y2EtOGVkOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=P3WNHPu9dU8fB4sUxzbWe9r8iHjlQCJEIdb_7U-7XGE=)
---
Peter, **This mifepristone decision out of Texas is complete bullshit. ** Conservative anti-choice extremist Judge Kacsmaryk said the FDA failed to consider “the intense psychological trauma and post-traumatic stress women often experience from chemical abortion.” No mention, of course, of the trauma caused by **FORCING GIRLS AND WOMEN TO GIVE BIRTH, or losing autonomy over their own bodies. ** This argument is patronizing and misogynistic, and assumes women can’t reasonably make our own choices based on what’s best for us. Not to mention the fact that Viagra is responsible for ten times as many deaths as mifepristone annually — but no one’s talking about banning Viagra, are they? [_**We’re expecting this fight to go all the way to the Supreme Court, and we want to be ready when it does. Can you rush an urgent contribution to our Rapid Response Mifepristone Fund? clean_body: | = Peter, This mifepristone decision out of Texas is complete bullshit. Conservative anti-choice extremist Judge Kacsmaryk said the FDA failed to consider “the intense psychological trauma and post-traumatic stress women often experience from chemical abortion.” No mention, of course, of the trauma caused by FORCING GIRLS AND WOMEN TO GIVE BIRTH, or losing autonomy over their own bodies. This argument is patronizing and misogynistic, and assumes women can’t reasonably make our own choices based on what’s best for us. Not to mention the fact that Viagra is responsible for ten times as many deaths as mifepristone annually — but no one’s talking about banning Viagra, are they? = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for all you’re doing in the fight to protect abortion rights. — Katie HER Time PAC 2120 University Ave Berkeley, CA 94704 United States | mailto:team@her-time.com | Paid for by the HER Time PAC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

name: =?utf-8?B?RmlyZWJhbGwgTmlja2VsIPCfkLE=?=
subject: From me to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for Congress Wiley Nickel for Congress
body:
Hi, it’s Fireball! 🐱 I’m sending a quick note around because it’s National Pet Day! If you’re new here, I’m Wiley’s (well, mostly Adeline’s) cat! My mom and dad showed me all of the photos folks posted on Facebook of their furry friends. Adeline left my favorite treat out for me, and I even think I spotted some new boxes and paper bags around the house. I LOVE boxes. | | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61647785/400709400/810968497?refcode=230411-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk1MjQ0ZC05MGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXa8nKaJcDinHXMoWFcK_Qa-CYAC-SisIx5TJwRiEt0=) Hi, it’s Fireball! 🐱 I’m sending a quick note around because it’s National Pet Day! If you’re new here, I’m Wiley’s (well, mostly Adeline’s) cat! My mom and dad showed me all of the photos folks posted on Facebook of their furry friends. Adeline left my favorite treat out for me, and I even think I spotted some new boxes and paper bags around the house. I LOVE boxes. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61647786/400709401/659973833?refcode=230411-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk1MjQ0ZC05MGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXa8nKaJcDinHXMoWFcK_Qa-CYAC-SisIx5TJwRiEt0=) While I’m being celebrated extra today, I’m hoping you will help me out in an extra special way: [**will you help make sure Wiley is re-elected in 2024?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61647787/400709402/810968497?refcode=230411-email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk1MjQ0ZC05MGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UXa8nKaJcDinHXMoWFcK_Qa-CYAC-SisIx5TJwRiEt0=) It’s been so fun seeing Wiley when he gets home from his trips to Washington. Listening to his stories and seeing pure excitement on his face when he talks about all the exciting stuff he’s working on makes me one happy cat. I want him to keep this up for a long time! You are a key part of making that happen. body:

The RNC may require presidential candidates to reach a grassroots donor benchmark to participate in debates! That means without YOUR support, Nikki Haley could be disqualified.

name: Josh Gottheimer
subject: fighting for your rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH GOTTHEIMER FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [#]I wanted to take a moment and sincerely thank you for the incredible outpouring of support you showed this campaign ahead of our first end-of-quarter fundraising deadline of 2023.

We knew that the NRCC would study my quarterly report and look for any signs of weakness. Thanks to you, we showed our strength — and let the NRCC know that we’re not backing down.

It’s your strong grassroots support that allows me to continue fighting for Jersey Values and bipartisan solutions. Let’s keep this momentum going so I can hold my seat in 2024 — we’re only just beginning!

Thank you for your dedication to our mission. Supporters like you are truly the most important members of our team.

We showed our strength at the end of last quarter — but if we get complacent, the NRCC will go on the offensive. Will you chip in $ or more today to get this quarter started off strong? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jg-fr-2304?amount=]

Grateful to have you by my side,

Josh
Josh Gottheimer represents New Jersey’s Fifth Congressional District. Josh is in Congress to fight for lower taxes and Jersey Values. He’s working across the aisle to find real solutions for New Jersey families and is actively fighting against the ideological gridlock in Washington. name: ShariceForCongress.com
subject: show your unequivocal support for reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SHARICE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| A Texas judge just ignored 20 years of scientific evidence and ruled to block the leading abortion medication in the United States. Now it’s likely to be debated all the way to the Supreme Court. We need to respond immediately.

**[Sign on now to stand with Sharice in the fight for reproductive rights!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61648008/400710117/-123498198?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230411_PT_1.1_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGIxMWZlMy05MGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZiczRwDmeQn3o2dHX3mtg0VYsFFsR-xEx28AWD8V1M=&emci=06f398d6-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cdb11fe3-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)**

* * *
A Trump-appointed judge in Texas just ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication, Mifepristone.

This medication has been safely and effectively used by millions of women and was approved by the FDA decades ago — but this judge ignored 20 years of proven, scientific evidence and banned its FDA authorization. It's still legal in some states for now, but this sets up a court battle that could go all the way to the Supreme Court and take full effect nationwide.

**Last year, Kansans spoke loudly with their votes and rejected extremist actions to limit abortion rights in our state.

Voters in Kansas and across the country rejected extreme anti-choice candidates from coast to coast. Now, we need to fight back again.**

**[You’ve always stood by Sharice as she fights for reproductive rights. Will you stand with her again by signing our petition to show your unequivocal support for reproductive freedom?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61648010/400710119/-123498198?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230411_PT_1.1_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGIxMWZlMy05MGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZiczRwDmeQn3o2dHX3mtg0VYsFFsR-xEx28AWD8V1M=&emci=06f398d6-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cdb11fe3-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)** | | [SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61648011/400710121/-123498198?source=EM_NBI_SD_20230411_PT_1.1_0_1MO_website_NA_NA_abortion&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZGIxMWZlMy05MGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iZiczRwDmeQn3o2dHX3mtg0VYsFFsR-xEx28AWD8V1M=&emci=06f398d6-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cdb11fe3-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=22117458)

clean_body: | A Texas judge just ignored 20 years of scientific evidence and ruled to block the leading abortion medication in the United States. Now it’s likely to be debated all the way to the Supreme Court. We need to respond immediately. A Trump-appointed judge in Texas just ruled to block access to the leading abortion medication, Mifepristone. This medication has been safely and effectively used by millions of women and was approved by the FDA decades ago — but this judge ignored 20 years of proven, scientific evidence and banned its FDA authorization. It's still legal in some states for now, but this sets up a court battle that could go all the way to the Supreme Court and take full effect nationwide. Last year, Kansans spoke loudly with their votes and rejected extremist actions to limit abortion rights in our state. Voters in Kansas and across the country rejected extreme anti-choice candidates from coast to coast. Now, we need to fight back again. | | Thanks, ShariceForCongress.com | = | Click here to from Sharice Davids' email list. name: Mark Lamb
subject: Washington needs a new Sheriff in town [WATCH VIDEO HERE]
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)
|
Peter,

My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign's first official supporters.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we 're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that 's why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

[**That is why today I 'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our ****nation 's Capital****.**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what's the point if I'm not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities ' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona's third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It's our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I 'll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r) **I'll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That 's where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**" Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety."**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I'm tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn't afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff's badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

**Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media**

[](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547925:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547926:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r) [](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547927:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

**
**

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experiences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ ** HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA'S SENATE SEAT RED**](https://email.vervemail.com/ct/62547924:J9jQfqGNt:m:1:3365131770:588191E4ACE72061082832C535A1045C:r)

---

| Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
---

Every single one of these shootings is an unthinkable tragedy, leaving families and communities broken. **But despite so much senseless loss, Republican politicians are refusing to support commonsense gun safety reforms. **

name: Kirsten Gillibrand
subject: let me explain
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
| | |
---
Friend, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas has issued a ruling that, if upheld, would ban mifepristone — a pill that doctors prescribe for abortions and treating miscarriages — in every single state across the country.
This ruling is heartless, dangerous and blatantly politically motivated.
More than half of all abortions in the United States are performed via a prescribed medication** ** like mifepristone. It is a safe, reliable and effective method to access affordable care. It's been approved by the FDA and prescribed by doctors for more than 20 years.** This isn't about medicine or science or patients' health. It's about politics and an extremist agenda, plain and simple. And we cannot let them get away with it.**
If we allow this ruling to stand, it will remove mifepristone from markets nationwide — even in states where abortion remains legal. And millions of Americans will suffer the consequences. This is a battle that we cannot afford to lose.
**This moment calls for hope, resilience and bold action. That's why I need 25,000 grassroots Democrats to stand with me and raise our voices to restore reproductive freedom. [_Please, will you add your name before midnight tonight to protect the future of our reproductive rights?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664919/400749508/951960192?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=43614&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk4059-su-nd&refcode=jtk4059-su-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTkvMS83MjcyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGFlYThlNS1iNGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=m09apOPQG6Iap_6s_3dCzF1_onFnX_7NeJR8EUOFS3w=&emci=44412078-82d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=70aea8e5-b4d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=7659029)**

name: Cliff Schecter, Blue Amp Action
subject: Tennessee Republicans turned back the clock Jim Crow by deciding the mere act of protesting their mediocre, portly, pasty privilege required expelling two black--but not a white--Democratic lawmakers. It’s backfired completely, as the Nashville City Council just voted to overturn their decision, and return Justin Jones to the legislature.
body:
Tennessee Republicans’ own goal
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T88fd29a7-d51f-4463-aacc-41f96a2e2c95/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Peter, **We've written to you about Tennessee Republicans turning back the clock Jim Crow by deciding the mere act of protesting their mediocre, portly, pasty privilege required expelling two black--but not a white--Democratic lawmaker. ** _Whoops. _**_They've created two national stars in Justin Jones & Justin Pearson, both passionate and charismatic speakers for the cause of justice_**.**_ In an immediate act of defiance, the Nashville Council, who can overrule the state legislature, did just that voting 36-0 to send Jones back to represent his constituents._**_ He was inaugurated at the capital and is back, albeit with a much larger national following._ [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tee04e60f-7c8b-4ac8-bc6d-2126218b243b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **_Like "Me Too" & "Black Lives Matter," this must be a watershed moment to confront racism, our gun plague and authoritarianism._ _These young Black lawmakers risked everything. They're getting death threats. They could have their careers destroyed. The Right sure is trying, as Malcolm X said, "by any means necessary."_** [**_Will you send a powerful message to other Democrats thinking about standing up like the Tennessee 3 did, that we're with you in this fight? Will you join us in giving $5, $10, $25 or whatever you can to defeat autocracy in America?_**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T01c285e0-53e0-4955-ad25-afca15036f9e/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _Thank you for fighting for democracy and equality for us all._ Cliff

| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country. — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. | | The ruling by a federal judge in Texas invalidating the Food and Drug Administration's approval 23 years ago of the abortion pill mifepristone has the potential to be one of the most consequential abortion cases since the overturning of Roe v Wade. Two federal judges reached contradictory conclusions. With two opposing rulings, the case will go quickly to the U.S. Supreme Court. One ordered the FDA to continue the status quo and retain safe access to abortion medication. At the same time, Judge Matthew Kacsmaryk stated the FDA violated federal law over the last 23 years. He moved to effectively ban mifepristone's availability nationwide, including invoking the "anti-vice" law created in 1873. Mifepristone has been used for over 20 years by over five million people. Medical professionals have well-established the medication's safety, and the FDA has followed its mission, federal rules, and regulations. [Mifepristone is ](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/e2OTmbVqY/c?w=yATPISd8rCN2IJ-GWOQjXAu5BEviR793F1ARg9EP338.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6Ijk0MzRkNDUyLTY4OGEtNDZmMi04OTcyLWZhM2ZiMjgyYzM2NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[safer than Tylenol, Viagra, and Penicillin](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/e2OTmbVqY/c?w=yATPISd8rCN2IJ-GWOQjXAu5BEviR793F1ARg9EP338.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6Ijk0MzRkNDUyLTY4OGEtNDZmMi04OTcyLWZhM2ZiMjgyYzM2NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9)[.](https://www.votedrbob.com/so/e2OTmbVqY/c?w=yATPISd8rCN2IJ-GWOQjXAu5BEviR793F1ARg9EP338.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iaXQubHkvRnVuZERyQm9iIiwiciI6Ijk0MzRkNDUyLTY4OGEtNDZmMi04OTcyLWZhM2ZiMjgyYzM2NiIsIm0iOiJtYWlsIiwiYyI6IjE4NjYyNmQ1LWNhNWUtNDYzMy04MzRhLWU4ODNkMGJkZGQ3NSJ9) Commonly prescribed drugs like penicillin and Viagra have higher death rates than medication abortion.

name: Chris Deluzio
subject: A radical judge has ended access to medication abortion.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
This is unacceptable.
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61652742/400717905/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.11_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDNkZmI0ZC05NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ANSMLzFLorrYczre7CnhJ8rJ26SgqvqyYsG23NMfGFY=) Derek, we learned late last week that a federal judge in Texas has reversed the Food and Drug Administration's approval of the abortion pill, a ruling that could end access to medication abortion. **This is unacceptable.**

The abortion pill has been used by women and their doctors for over two decades, and the decision to block a safe and effective treatment will not save lives like the radical right claims – _it will kill women and girls._

**I’m angry for my wife and my daughters, for every American whose rights are diminished by this outrageous decision. Reproductive rights are fundamental human rights, and everyone should be able to make healthcare decisions without right-wing politicians getting in the way.**

Derek, this is just the beginning. This ruling out of Texas oversteps the will of voters because it will outlaw the use of the abortion pill **even in states where abortion is legal.** This brings Kevin McCarthy and the radical right one step closer to their goal of a national abortion ban. _But I won’t let that happen without a fight._

**[Abortion rights are at stake, so today, I’m asking for your support. If you’re able, will you chip in to my campaign today to ensure I can stay in Congress to fight for abortion access?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61652744/400717907/-908155246?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.11_b1_cd_all&amount=15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjU0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MDNkZmI0ZC05NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ANSMLzFLorrYczre7CnhJ8rJ26SgqvqyYsG23NMfGFY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Brittany Pettersen
subject: I could really use your input on this, Team
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Brittany Pettersen for Colorado
body:
I would really like to hear from you directly. Do you have a second?

Hey, It’s been about three months since I took office as the Representative for Colorado’s 7th District. And in that time, there’s already been so much to do: Finding bipartisan opportunities to make progress while standing up against Kevin McCarthy’s extreme agenda. Fighting to bring an end to the USPS’s disastrous mail delays. Meeting with families and business owners across CO-07 to hear about what’s on their mind and what Congress can do about it. **And I have no plans to slow down, to be clear. As I continue to take on this work, I’d like to hear directly from you about what your priorities are.** **[Will you take a moment to complete my short issues survey?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61652880/400718029/1852028011?refcode=email_041123_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlmYTk1Yi05NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlwED9lFBL-A8JKPpFaCHGCXpTED3x2A2iwzcR_j-jY=&emci=cd92b227-94d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c19fa95b-96d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)** | | [TAKE THE SURVEY →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61652881/400718030/1852028011?refcode=email_041123_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlmYTk1Yi05NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlwED9lFBL-A8JKPpFaCHGCXpTED3x2A2iwzcR_j-jY=&emci=cd92b227-94d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c19fa95b-96d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)
---
Whether the answer is rising housing costs, climate change, civil rights, or the gun violence that continues to inflict so much suffering on our state and our nation, I want to hear what issues are top of mind for you and your family.
Thank you so much for taking the time to **[share your thoughts with me](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61652882/400718031/1852028011?refcode=email_041123_survey&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMTlmYTk1Yi05NmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nlwED9lFBL-A8JKPpFaCHGCXpTED3x2A2iwzcR_j-jY=&emci=cd92b227-94d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c19fa95b-96d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=19954364)** today. I really appreciate it.
-Brittany

**Jackson has one of the highest homicide rates in America. What do we need to do to fix it? **

Rafael Mangual believes that anti-police policies and softer sentencing lead to more crime.

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dave Min for Congress 2024**
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/db3272bd3a26/releasedave-min-statement-on-former-rep-harley-rouda-withdrawing-from-ca-47-congressional-race-15653499?e=7017cc100e)
---
| |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** April 11, 2023
**Contact** : [press@davemin.com](mailto:press@davemin.com)
**Dave Min Statement on Former Rep. Harley Rouda Withdrawing From CA-47 Congressional Race** **IRVINE, CA** — Today, upon hearing the news that former Representative Harley Rouda would be ending his campaign for Congress in California’s 47th Congressional District, Orange County State Senator Dave Min issued the following statement: **“Jane and I want to send Harley, Kaira, and the whole Rouda family good thoughts and prayers. Knowing the fighter that Harley is, I have no doubt that he will have a full and speedy recovery. I want to thank Harley for his public service, his decency and patriotism.”** ########### _Before entering the State Senate, Min was a law professor at UC Irvine, where he taught and researched in the area of business law. He resides with his wife Jane Stoever, a UC Irvine law professor who specializes in domestic violence and family law, and their three children in Irvine. Dave is a native Californian, a product of California public schools who graduated from the Wharton School and Harvard Law School, and an Eagle Scout._ _California’s 47th is an open Congressional District in Orange County that includes the Cities of Costa Mesa, Huntington Beach, Irvine, Newport Beach, and Seal Beach, and portions of Laguna Beach, Laguna Hills, and Laguna Woods. Incumbent Katie Porter is vacating the seat to run for U.S. Senate. In 2022, Porter defeated former Assemblymember Republican Scott Baugh by 3.44% in this “toss-up” district. State Senator Dave Min currently represents over 80% of Congressional District 47 in Sacramento. In 2020, Min received over 158,000 votes within CA-47, defeating incumbent John Moorlach by 5.15%. 19% of the registered voters in CA-47 are of Asian and Pacific Islander descent, including one of the largest Korean-American populations in the country._
---
| |
---

But McCarthy and his extremist GOP pals will continue to throw up roadblocks to derail those efforts unless we protect this seat and take back the House. = = – Nikki for Congress Paid for by Nikki For Congress Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States Nikki has spent her life fighting for workers and working families by strengthening unions nationwide, and she was instrumental in passing a $15 minimum wage in Illinois while working as a senior advisor for Governor JB Pritzker. name: Indiana Republican Party HQ
subject: The results are in:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
You made your voices heard.
| | | Hoosier Republican, Thank you for participating in our **2023 BBB March Madness** bracket! It was a close competition — from the supply chain crisis to the botched withdrawal from Afghanistan to the Chinese spy balloon incident, there were plenty of Joe Biden’s biggest blunders to choose from. **But we’ve just finished counting the votes, and according to Hoosier Republicans like you, Biden’s Biggest Blunder has been:**
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/b8ea6c58900c4d76/bec28f7eee16409ac3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
**✅Chaos at the Southern Border**** ** With **millions** of illegal border crossings since Biden took the oath of office, this comes as no surprise. Biden’s border disaster has contributed to the fentanyl epidemic and the violent crime wave that’s sweeping our country. And it’s past time to hold him accountable for his blatant refusal to uphold the rule of law and protect the American people. [I hope you’ll consider pitching in a contribution to help us fight back against the Democrats’ lawless agenda – and elect Indiana Republicans who will hold Biden’s feet to the fire.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/b8ea6c58900c4d76/eca8314a598ec837c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Thanks again! — Indiana Republican Party HQ

Peter -
My name is Aquilino Gonell, former U.S. Capitol Police Sergeant, and on January 6, 2021 I almost died defending the Capitol from insurrectionists inspired by far-right leaders like Sheriff Mark Lamb.
Today, Mark Lamb declared his candidacy for U.S. Senate in Arizona against my friend Ruben Gallego.
I am writing because inciting, cheering, and making excuses for an attack on our democracy should not be a prerequisite or credential to be in Congress or any position of trusted authority.
But that is part of Mark Lamb’s claim to fame. It’s why he can credibly run for U.S. Senate against Ruben.
So I am personally writing to ask for your help. To help elect Ruben. To help send a message that we cannot allow insurrectionist-cheerleaders to get into the United States Senate.
So please:

Mark Lamb says the insurrectionists were “very loving, Christian people.”
I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed.
I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield.
But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not.
I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking:
