So please: = = Mark Lamb says the insurrectionists were “very loving, Christian people.” I can assure you they were not spreading the word of God as they cursed at law enforcement officers and assaulted us with multiple weapons. I wonder how Christian and loving the invading rioters were as they threatened to shoot me, and said that I, an Army veteran and police officer, should be executed. I wonder how Christian and loving they were as the attackers pulled me in every direction by my leg and my shield. But Mark Lamb doesn’t even have the courage to stand up for law enforcement officers injured or killed on duty that day. When asked about us, he said he wasn’t there and couldn’t say what was true or not. I am going to do everything I can to help elect my friend Ruben Gallego — who also showed extraordinary courage that day. So I am humbly asking: = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = Thank you, Aquilino Gonell * Paid for by Gallego for Arizona Gallego for Arizona 1601 North 7th Street Phoenix, AZ 85006 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, you can , but we'd be very sorry to see you go.

body:
This is integral to our campaign | Derek, since launching this campaign, you’ve been on my mind. I’ve heard so many stories from people who have felt left out of the political process and have been waiting for change that has yet to materialize. [**Will you take a minute to share with me what policies would make the biggest impact on your life? Whether it’s a Green New Deal, Medicare For All, affordable housing or another policy that hasn’t been brought up yet — I want to know what’s been on your mind and how I can help.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61659728/400727701/-70179372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdhMzNiZC05ZmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNCOSIM-KpXYYgtHsMvRAaMqDrSH7Ski9abnhZr5rIQ=&emci=d87a33bd-9fd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=da7a33bd-9fd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178) **[Share Your Story](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61659729/400727702/-70179372?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83Mjc4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYTdhMzNiZC05ZmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=RNCOSIM-KpXYYgtHsMvRAaMqDrSH7Ski9abnhZr5rIQ=&emci=d87a33bd-9fd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=da7a33bd-9fd8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=14089178)** I’m running on a platform to truly lift up Virginian families and those most often left on the sidelines, which means hearing from people like you is vital to helping us continue to build this movement. Hi Peter, it’s Emilia.

From the moment I launched my first campaign for Congress last year, you have heard me talk a lot about how [**this is a people-powered campaign, fueled by folks like you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61659779/400728011/-1747924743?refcode=em_fr_2023.04.11_b1_es_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNWRlOGMxNC1hMGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jR0SaCodP9LOr0JMiUvtDjueX2v2q8LgzNVTAxUZCKA=)

And despite all that’s changed over the last year – _including my being elected and sworn in to serve Ohio’s 13th District_ – our campaign remains reliant on the support of this grassroots team.

That means the voters we can reach, doors we can knock, and TV ads we can air will be determined by your grassroots support. That means the number of campaign staff we can hire will be shaped by your generosity. And that means, when conservative Republicans begin to dump millions into our race to try to bring their dangerous agenda to our community, _this grassroots team will be our best line of defense._

**Bottom line: You are the backbone of our campaign.**

[**That’s why today I’m asking for $5 (yes, really just $5). I know it may not seem like a lot, but on a people-powered campaign like ours, every dollar goes a long way toward ensuring I can remain fighting for you in Congress. | | | | | **CAGOP 2023 QUARTER 2 PRIORITIES SURVEY **

body:
ICYMI: Abortion is still legal and the fight is on| | |
---
Hi Friend, I don't know about you, but after last week, I am so angry. Conservative activist judges are once again attacking our bodily autonomy. The [ruling by Judge Kacsmaryk](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659855/400728344/1104976983?dl=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)[ is about more than just a pill](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659856/400728345/1104976983?dl=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). It's about our ability to control our own bodies without the government and judges inflicting their religious beliefs into our lives. Judge Kacsmaryk's decision had no basis in science or medicine and has been heavily [condemned by doctors](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659857/400728346/462529322?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) and even the[ pharmaceutical industry](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659858/400728347/1359289858?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134). You know something is wrong when progressives are in agreement with the pharmaceutical industry! We were lucky that almost immediately after Kacsmaryk's decision, an opposing ruling was made in Washington by [Judge Thomas O. Rice.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659859/400728348/-2071117117?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) He issued a preliminary ruling ordering the FDA to maintain access to to this medication in the states involved with the case. US Attorney General, Merrick Garland, [has announced](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659860/400728349/1689082920?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) that the Justice Department will appeal the Texas ruling.
The future is uncertain regarding the legal status of Mifepristone, but one thing is very clear: **access to safe, legal abortion care is being relentlessly attacked throughout the country.** Even in Pennsylvania, where [Governor Shapiro](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659861/400728350/-826206659?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) has vowed to protect abortion access, many people are forced to travel long distances to access abortion care, especially people who live in rural areas. Additionally, since 1995, PA has used taxpayer dollars to fund deceptive [anti-abortion Crisis Pregnancy Centers](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659862/400728351/1965568224?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) making it even harder for pregnant people to receive medically accurate information and compassionate care.

---
| | When people vote for progressive candidates, communities win representatives who fight for our rights! At KPEF, we're using our resources to [unite progressives across the spectrum](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659863/400728352/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=) and demand that our democracy protect our right to bodily autonomy.
---
| [Protect Our Democracy!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659864/400728353/-1148132282?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=)

| | |

**Other News:** As if these rulings weren't enough, we also watched as Republicans in [Tennessee](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659865/400728354/-803005015?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134), [Idaho](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659866/400728355/-578301791?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134), and [Kansas](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659867/400728356/1945986648?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) attacked our bodily autonomy in others ways. From restricting people's physical movement to inspecting children's genitals to disenfranchising entire legislative districts - and this was just this week! BUT we're also thrilled to see that when we organize and elect progressives, we win in [Wisconsin](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659868/400728357/-54543789?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134) and [Michigan](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61659869/400728358/1032067408?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzkxNjI4IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjc1YjU1NGE2LWEwZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=OSnImh8TfsKK9I-N211WW-6CO2TJq7cTfCaDZCgsFUM=&emci=9b46d723-cfd4-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=75b554a6-a0d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2038134)!

**Coming up:** Here in Pennsylvania, we have a new and extremely narrow state House majority, which is a great step towards progressive change, but there's still a conservative state senate, and our local governments quietly determine much of our day-to-day lives. We've seen first-hand the importance of judges in protecting our bodily autonomy. Our local school boards and municipal officials also oversee everything from our children's education and safety to our property taxes.**Luckily, in PA the primaries are coming up next month, so we can take action!** **🔆 Starting later****this week we're launching a new, weekly series with bite-sized overviews of what's on the ballot and how it impacts you 🔆

clean_body: ICYMI: Abortion is still legal and the fight is on| | | Hi Friend, I don't know about you, but after last week, I am so angry. Conservative activist judges are once again attacking our bodily autonomy. The . It's about our ability to control our own bodies without the government and judges inflicting their religious beliefs into our lives. Judge Kacsmaryk's decision had no basis in science or medicine and has been heavily and even the. You know something is wrong when progressives are in agreement with the pharmaceutical industry! We were lucky that almost immediately after Kacsmaryk's decision, an opposing ruling was made in Washington by He issued a preliminary ruling ordering the FDA to maintain access to to this medication in the states involved with the case. US Attorney General, Merrick Garland, that the Justice Department will appeal the Texas ruling. The future is uncertain regarding the legal status of Mifepristone, but one thing is very clear: access to safe, legal abortion care is being relentlessly attacked throughout the country. Even in Pennsylvania, where has vowed to protect abortion access, many people are forced to travel long distances to access abortion care, especially people who live in rural areas. Additionally, since 1995, PA has used taxpayer dollars to fund deceptive making it even harder for pregnant people to receive medically accurate information and compassionate care. | | When people vote for progressive candidates, communities win representatives who fight for our rights! At KPEF, we're using our resources to = and demand that our democracy protect our right to bodily autonomy. | = | | | Other News: As if these rulings weren't enough, we also watched as Republicans in , , and attacked our bodily autonomy in others ways. From restricting people's physical movement to inspecting children's genitals to disenfranchising entire legislative districts - and this was just this week! BUT we're also thrilled to see that when we organize and elect progressives, we win in and ! | Coming up: Here in Pennsylvania, we have a new and extremely narrow state House majority, which is a great step towards progressive change, but there's still a conservative state senate, and our local governments quietly determine much of our day-to-day lives. We've seen first-hand the importance of judges in protecting our bodily autonomy. Our local school boards and municipal officials also oversee everything from our children's education and safety to our property taxes.Luckily, in PA the primaries are coming up next month, so we can take action! 🔆 Starting laterthis week we're launching a new, weekly series with bite-sized overviews of what's on the ballot and how it impacts you 🔆 | | | Event: Thursday, April 13, from 6-7 p.m. A free panel on Pa.’s Supreme Court candidates and why the 2023 election matters from Spotlight PA. = | Deep breath: When the news keeps hitting us non-stop, take a moment to breathe deeply and remember to take of yourself — this work is hard and non-stop — doesn't mean you need to be as well. Keep fighting the good fight and keep in touch! In solidarity, Laura Nevitt, Executive Director P.S. At KP/KPEF we value our amazing staff and prioritize paying a living wage. =. **Crow’s right wing connections are well known** — including bankrolling lavish vacations for Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas and his wife Ginni Thomas, a far-right activist herself.

Last year **Sinema’s PAC received a contribution of $5,000 from Crow** , and in 2021, her campaign was even forced to **return $2,900 to Crow** after he exceeded federal contribution limits.
**Sinema has a long history of hobnobbing with shady, dark money billionaires** — we certainly know she’s more comfortable spending time with that set than with everyday Arizonans.
Time and again Sinema proves she’s more interested in prioritizing the needs of Wall Street and billionaires than her own constituents' needs. **That’s why we’re doing everything we can to get the message out to Arizonans: the 2024 cycle is quickly approaching and it’s going to be a tough one.**
****

name: Cori Bush HQ
subject: The ruling on abortion pills
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
As of the writing of this email, access to Mifepristone and medication-based abortions has not changed.
#
Peter,
Last Friday, a far-right, Trump-appointed, anti-abortion judge issued a ruling calling on the Food and Drug Administration (FDA) to recall its approval of Mifepristone — a pill used in abortions that has been deemed **safe and legal** for 23 years.
**To be clear: As of the writing of this email, access to Mifepristone and medication-based abortions has not changed.** Mifepristone is safe, effective, and still legal. The opinion of one far-right, Trump-appointed, anti-abortion judge won’t change that.
But that could change if this case gets brought to the U.S. Supreme Court — the same court that repealed _Roe v. Wade_ last summer.
[**We need to be ready for another right-wing attack on abortion. Can you make a gift of $5 today to support Cori’s work and prepare our movement for the fights to come?**](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230411.6BEBO7&amount=5&refcode=em20230411-2498&t=1&akid=2498%2E1082990%2EIN7B9O)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230411.6BEBO7&amount=5&refcode=em20230411-2498&t=20&akid=2498%2E1082990%2EIN7B9O)**
**Cori is on the frontlines of the fight to defend abortion access because we're working towards a world where abortion is more than just legal.** We're working towards a world where no one is harassed or shamed for accessing basic health care, no one has to travel for hours or days to receive care, and no one is shouldered with the large financial burden just for receiving reproductive care.
**[If it makes sense for you, please consider chipping in $5 or more to support Cori as she works to defend abortion access.](https://act.coribush.org/go/238?c0=cori-em-20230411.6BEBO7&amount=5&refcode=em20230411-2498&t=21&akid=2498%2E1082990%2EIN7B9O) It's going to take all of us working together to defend Mifepristone against right-wing judges and make sure every person receives the reproductive health care they deserve.**
In solidarity,
Cori Bush HQ

**[Contribute ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cori-em-20230411?refcode=em20230411-2498-footer&t=22&refcode2=2498_1082990_IN7B9O&akid=2498%2E1082990%2EIN7B9O) **
---
Follow us on **[Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/VoteCoriBush/)** , **[Twitter](https://twitter.com/CoriBush)** , **[Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/coribush/)** , and **[visit our website](https://coribush.org/)**. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Mail us: Cori Bush for Congress, 75 North Oaks Plaza, St. Louis, MO 63121.
Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress

To be clear: As of the writing of this email, access to Mifepristone and medication-based abortions has not changed. Mifepristone is safe, effective, and still legal. name: Attorney Larry Klayman
subject: Citizens’ Grand Jury to seek indictment of NYC District Attorney Alvin Bragg
body:
New York City District Attorney Alvin Bragg has declared war on President Trump and the American people.

Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is coming to Ohio to spread his extremist message as he prepares for 2024.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61660218/400729603/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhYzI1MzQwOS1hMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gofIB3asYzLljVxurbw0D1r6ym9j1b053OgeeMBMSo8=) | _Ugh_ , team. Florida's worst is coming to the Buckeye State:

This Thursday, Florida Governor Ron DeSantis is addressing his supporters in Summit County and Butler County — **seemingly going full-speed ahead as he prepares for an expected presidential run in 2024.**

We don't need to tell you why a DeSantis presidency would be a nightmare. He's a proud anti-choice extremist who already signed a dangerous 15-week abortion ban in Florida. **Now, he's made it clear that he'll go much further to restrict abortion care — and possibly even ban it altogether if left unchecked.**

We can't let extremists like DeSantis control our bodies or our futures. So while Ron is in Ohio spreading his dangerous politics, Ohio Democrats are hitting the ground running on our signature-gathering efforts to get a crucial reproductive rights amendment on the Ohio ballot this fall.

Team, we'll continue to fight alongside the majority of Ohioans who firmly believe that access to reproductive health care is a fundamental right in Ohio. _**But we're counting on your support to do it.**_

**[It's crucial that we do all we can to defend access to reproductive care in Ohio. name: Laura Loomer
subject: Weaponized Justice
body:
I know what you're feeling. I hear it when I speak to people all over the country. Many are angry, others are hopeless, some are so jaded by our government that they are numb. | | | | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/1/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/oo1iEsG0_edEvmOD0xgO_dcTkvA=317) | [](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/2/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/QzRj5z5Ota_futkx-9dy5Ez9UJY=317) Dear Friend,

I know what you're feeling.

I hear it when I speak to people all over the country.

Many are angry, others are hopeless, some are so jaded by our government that they are numb.

Me?

**I 'm more driven than ever before.**

From the political persecution of January 6th protesters, to the unjust pursuit of President Trump, it cannot be more clear . . .

. . . Leftists cannot win fairly, so they have weaponized our justice system to protect themselves and the structure of a corrupt government.

Luckily, my team and I are here to expose them all! [**And you can help us do that!**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/3/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/KrumqfX8mwxI7rtubrWGaxoe_kY=317)

If you're a student of warfare, you know that in order to win a war, you need to **disrupt** your enemy's supply lines, **confuse** their communication, and **drain** all of their resources.

Even in a peaceful revolution, the tactics are the same, and when taking on a corrupt government, the resource you MUST **disrupt** first is their ability to completely control the flow of information.

For far too long, the mainstream media has protected the government and kept the people in the dark. And more recently, the Big Tech tyrants have controlled the flow of information to keep us silent and in the dark.

Just look at the battle Big Tech continues to wage against the truth regarding **COVID vaccines**!

**Think back to January 6 th and the constant drumbeat to paint patriotic protesters as seditionists**!

The information war is what I've been fighting, and I'm on the cusp of a major victory with my RICO lawsuit against Twitter, Facebook, and their founders.

Big Tech tyrants have been BUSTED colluding with our own government and federal law enforcement agencies to censor and suppress information with the goal of influencing our elections!

And to think these same Big Tech tyrants have the audacity to accuse President Trump of election interference...

It's a joke.

What Big Tech has done is **CRIMINAL** , and that's what my case is all about . . . [ **and it will take you joining in and supporting my lawsuit to hold them accountable.** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/4/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/e-8ULgyHirsUcVvU_zbBsfTkSMY=317)

My legal costs continue to grow as my lawsuit progresses, and my expenses are piling up as Big Tech continues to add more lawyers to their legal team. Their legal team is five times the size of mine.

[**By the end of April, I have to raise $38,600 to catch up on all of my legal fees.** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/5/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/j4qXipt1A8871nFVIyif4r1Gb4w=317)

[**Will you please chip in with a generous donation of $25, $50, $100 or even $250 today?** ](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/6/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/9R74lwFVFHyNrVMwH5rHWWMUq3o=317)

Every dollar counts and will be greatly appreciated.

Help me and my legal team keep going so we can continue to wage our battle to save America from the destructive radical Left and their conspirators in Big Tech.Help me and my legal team keep going so we can continue to wage our battles to save America from the destructive, radical Left and their conspirators Big Tech.

Thank you so much for all that you do, [**and please, support my efforts today**](https://5gcvd67r.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Flibersend.loomered.com%2Fl%2FbZPeCTAajmzyaMKwCIY0iA%2FBMHIlgyw763bd3EERfrRzn4g%2Fz892QhLRnorDUVMrPKJUqR8Q/7/0100018771df214c-62821411-f6c1-4082-84cc-1556b615bd8b-000000/Rw5cmdnngSGS4Z8G6edRg2wkI0M=317).

Respectfully,

Laura Loomer

We are reaching out to you as a valued supporter of the AZ Dems to discuss an issue we believe is critical for the future of Arizona.

President Biden's Infrastructure Plan will significantly improve our state, with at least 250 projects in the works. Projects that could help us create jobs, build our economic growth, and make a more sustainable future for our communities.

As one of our supporters, we believe that you share our vision of a better Arizona. That's why we need to ask you directly:

**Do you support the improvements coming to our state with the Infrastructure Plan?**

[Yes! [I’m not sure.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnls1-fa6y_I3_sHa1h_5i5w4HQnG0eRhEbFFeLdT3fuQchQho29iwypU5_NbHFR6wKde6Z-e2GRK5pV44flI36JkF_mQGNZA65SJT7Lo0ezg3ECCyeYElU0IL2kos9efA9VSverz6_EFxUHcdtyKtfLAGk0y5Npc4tc98G5hqtAfjG4gx0oB28J5L6j6H7893CmXPu2FkJCP6LPEYphXQDR/3v9/_qoG5PxrSkaL_1Ie4zBjAA/h6/Sc4oT1_H-885R18DjM3rdogXr98yyqdmu0EHF98uYNc)

subject: Gun violence is the leading cause of death for children in America

Seth is running for Congress to fight for the middle class and those working hard to join it. Peter,

There have been over 140 mass shootings in America so far this year.1 And in America, gun violence is now the leading cause of death for children.2

**Repeatedly this year, my Democratic colleagues and I have called on Congress to take action by passing common-sense gun safety legislation, but Republicans have blocked us every time.**

We don’t have to live like this. We have a responsibility to protect the safety of every American, and that starts by passing common-sense gun safety legislation. That’s why I’m an original co-sponsor of the Assault Weapons Ban Act and Bipartisan Background Checks Act, and why I’m supporting legislation that requires safe storage of firearms, bans bump stocks, and regulates high-capacity magazines.

We can take action right now to keep children safe by passing common-sense gun safety laws; but only if Republicans stop blocking our efforts to protect Americans from gun violence.

body:
I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_t=MQktABr0a9fWBjdTIqyGYkJfdoLofGH-fbjFmJ4bxSBk90i6BkYfLnyJ-wAlB2nagJlmbrF4T8o6meNEyt7Kkw_FCKgumkkHicg9qF76Nlk%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_t=MQktABr0a9fWBjdTIqyGYkJfdoLofGH-fbjFmJ4bxSBk90i6BkYfLnyJ-wAlB2nagJlmbrF4T8o6meNEyt7Kkw_FCKgumkkHicg9qF76Nlk%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFmV054HPa_g0N3StbVLDcmhQZhyY_IY1S7HclsisA7qVP_axNR2Yhxs-vNhXooxeP0L5GM0OBSyD6J0s8kMqN5lteh6Xuve68opCiBaHMVN8lqLTzg8n1pxS5hC521MGsk6AiMRaOP4VIUWliw41xrA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFwMSjoPOoISfDCvSMYg8OMKzMbV-7ozYx7EZvZQ5XJjY5z0zgjqAbuIYBKo3xZYy5DdKweexLlwK-brD2LwP5kf-6WzpBKJMWAd6Hg-kdHv9WhtdCLJC0OOxZbaRACR4yPJGuLEjHd03HzFt8w3tJ9w%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFT4kfJZbJJVVCywmiQm4fLdxcbijVk2zXcMibmF-GRBfI1pGFXr5oPkqOTXOH2eLWDEzQPxFriOw1PnOcwaB_6P_BW9jZAGd6nAlaah3hNf48lk0WKGn7qhPEJrhLUPoxW72YQOw19e68Bii4dlQWpg%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oF42hi34IXxm48TyHzUs-15diqcg68td1wD2v8F6YJeqF0EV16EbG38noo30DAvyAenEE9tmidxSuQ5QUoc-AGTH7VezIq895pxvKnTBAYgP7cVrYGW3q6AvqBzCOh-DdLEydTHnc8G2m2Mz5iktu7iQ%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFx73peo5KcpjzPd44s6fIgkzWd1PoFII5XnU3L_-g973Yd6LNepMfx1JIy4SGcfh5ZyPSqkM-4k9SZkPu8LINmuHVTeKDveIMlPdv6TMfCYKJsbcHqU-H13zYK2QdigWl6VIyKxM8fJ2RcTU2snTUOA%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oF3S-3f38XMUL2TVkta8o1TnWVC1K28GZiFYPlnhzaufH_ORq03ZBJik-XNfe6zC6s1iMHP8iMMmlXaun_lpOFY7q6SnTorJVokI2KN_GoNXPFT-22oiY6GADOnUmlB0k0Gkb5zIUZO8QOSC671Vt4hg%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oF-ccnBh60it2Wmlx1X1eRadh-QGPqxOx4K83hvJEC40DaXN08H4jHKJmqOYW2qKlTRJarEj9VCmeSux5zL0O85oul4GQesIPt1r7kBiqMbw32mGkl6Ucd4WAPef3RftFyUObsNItXzvtNMK1VVzLq7w%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFi1MwFTZOmaK2nLW0xg9l-F-Kh9dNk6TCyLJ6c5cV3NpEKRO1FeGNSBiIxdXanuoxK11sn3l1kYrXCpQOlNdTNp-YBRcn1QBEg4rOjKlOeK_gEzTR-DbbG_undOX0qYrUh2E-WtccXHhj_B5wBY6IsQ%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFp4chh_-rcvIDeF3YdioT3ciJvAsXTUDmU-YiniMuecqK_dQeAmblC3tow_sA3pstVTX_-nG29PJKfutrWB5wf6cl4thctYJZBhVqAZYEhiqGp6V6_2nVEtSGZDWBs_QfvQW7mXKejkIK_ISdg01KMw%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=657d3fd971e643aab0d9fa2bffcb98ae&_e=wf_gF7JZPjLyL-UCv_pA3pw9Fx-xFNQ-kJj6eZNvIrH8liV0y7TFf_v_9r6l7xqNpdz-AZMU2zvaAY4__vrbXN1yQzY4VJNePnkPxfsulaUFClnYEMQrd6HPIXiO2Q0YRhuoQWvgs0GqOd2qWwVosKQzPZ7a3Yx_yvbnILNA6r_iB0iYqKHWXR8fjw8lr_vlQdCWxMhFd4wwTFJ009kK2iRyWP6u3pD0RTozSqfJRyhs1j0_6vRKfJ3K2cCl09oFC51Dp5DceZdnrTTswMUMQEqmrQwfN1FNW3LeQO0rbZTQ64xBVA8p087D68ZbO3atyb19zOIf0A9rVyCQ41Hdtb0g4L2U52xUb0pxPxzeGz4rikocPiSkG3vPkvGvIX0Bwla3p2OyL9O7Sxpr1u3JQQ%3D%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. clean_body: I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that’s why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

name: Julia DeGraw
subject: Friend - we need the Right to Repair
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Oregon League of Conservation Voters
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61661352/400734577/2045316182?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiNDdkZmY2LWEzZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JRy2C20KbgRtrqLbPoD3aETbCqPownlpMj0YzkQfCzE=&emci=fdf298d6-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb47dff6-a3d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230) | | | Hello Peter, The Senate will soon be voting on one of the bills in our Zero Waste Package priority, the Right to Repair bill (SB 542). If the bill passes, companies would be required to make the tools needed to repair our stuff available without having to become an authorized repair provider. This means that **we would be given more options for repairing our devices, which can reduce waste and save money. ** **[Will you write to your state senator today urging them to vote YES on SB 542?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61661353/400734578/-30466268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiNDdkZmY2LWEzZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JRy2C20KbgRtrqLbPoD3aETbCqPownlpMj0YzkQfCzE=&emci=fdf298d6-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb47dff6-a3d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Have you ever purchased a new phone or electronic device because your old one isn’t functioning as well and it would cost around the same to repair, if not more? You’re not alone, and it’s designed to be this way. The makers of our devices are in the business of selling us their new stuff every year, and they make it difficult for us to repair our devices after we purchase them. Some companies design products without the parts necessary to fix a component, or they make repairs exclusive so that only they can do the repairs—all so they can make a profit and create a monopoly on repairs. The result? Replacing our devices nonstop and a ton of electronic waste. In our state, an estimated 4,800 cellphones are disposed of every day on average. Cellphones thrown away and other electronic waste is difficult to recycle, toxic to human health and the environment, and contains non-renewable rare earth minerals that are mined at an unsustainable rate. As such, electronic waste is the fastest growing waste stream in the world. As this waste breaks down, heavy metals can contaminate the soil and groundwater. And when the electronic waste gets incinerated at a landfill, it can release harmful substances into the air, which may create health problems for essential workers and surrounding communities. But with the Right to Repair, we can change this. **Passing SB 542 gives us the freedom to repair our stuff wherever so that we can get more use out of our electronic devices and reduce electronic waste.** **[Please write to your state senator today asking them to support the Right to Repair bill.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61661354/400734579/-30466268?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkxDVi8xLzcwODc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNiNDdkZmY2LWEzZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JRy2C20KbgRtrqLbPoD3aETbCqPownlpMj0YzkQfCzE=&emci=fdf298d6-90d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=cb47dff6-a3d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=2107230)** Thank you for taking action, Julia DeGraw
Coalition Director, OLCV | |

name: =?utf-8?Q?Warrior=20Mom?=
subject: The American Health & Freedom Summit
body:
Get Your Ticket Today! | | | **The American Health & Freedom Summit**
**_No Complaining - Just Solutions_**
---
| |
> | | | | **Are you ready to get the newest science, protocols, products and inspiration to keep your family on the cutting edge of Optimal Health & Well Being?**
> ---
|
> | | | | **LAST CHANCE**... Wednesday April 12th is the last day to take advantage of the discount sleeping room block and the early bird tickets. This Public Summit is a once in a lifetime historic event!!! You will never see these world renowned doctors, scientists, experts and advocates all together in one place again. ( View the attached graphic ) There has never been a more important time in history for everyone to gather together from around the country, to take back our health and freedoms. If you or your kids are struggling with a health issue, or you are an optimizer, you will want to get your tickets now. You will be kicking yourself if you miss this one. There are public events for parents and individuals, also functional medical doctors, chiropractors, nurses, autism/neurodevelopmental disorders and health freedom advocates that run from 8am-6pm on Saturday & Sunday. Additionally, there are preprograms that start on Friday for the Nurses, Chiropractors & Freedom Advocates, which continue all weekend. CME & CE hours available for doctors and health professionals. The fellowship with new and old friends and influencers, along with the support and networking that our conferences have been known for over the past 25 years will be tremendous. You will also be able to preview the latest & greatest health & wellness products and services in the EXPO to help your family on their journey. Not only will you benefit from this conference but you will leave with the intellectual ammunition to help your friends and family know the truth. **Do whatever you have to do to get there.** Come to learn. Come to fellowship. Come to change your future. Can't wait to see you there! Last chance for early bird tickets, go to:
> [www.thewellnessrevolutionworldtour.com](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=b8bc5e251e&e=3a42edfdc4)
> ---
| [ ](https://warriormom.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7c0b21e245e40197b3670bea2&id=6fd975bc58&e=3a42edfdc4)

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: The Insulin for All Act would prohibit manufacturers from charging more than $20 for a vial of insulin.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
I’m co-sponsoring the Insulin for All Act, which would prohibit manufacturers from charging more than $20 for a vial of insulin. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/ZsYp6Jc2ATNP3MkVzvte6Pmk0F4jS6NOytihmYTOZ1f-yWw6Cj7G9e1dlkX4TL0NMWtZ9DST5cFtdsPS-4D2fKNVbxdzSbLD9T9x2URiTkAkvV0OpQQCoNHFnrXrpjTvq2m90mEc271ANoSU-w3H2N7s2Kb9Frz-Mu8WM1EX54JZ5_g6d5vdtOr_MO9BBOpSYS-YWs_2Yb3lFPLPo6mX5ARkxDhNaGJ0cQz7ylizpAu7rSJeUqVJz11UsilFpbag8bznXmXoTJcgR3hrGPPRv41IHHyuN8LVejA2xjyJ2aQpbfENbZJ9OPP-3AxdJcmcb8UAFvHOp12zWG1sPMfDFwOkzZl97jlj6KM8dEZzlHs0FNdBwb7Sxnuw-0TifiUtylVd0YCAC8BFA3VFlBuFskv7yqfgCRrlFMFEkrpGWW5B078wkHTy1bPgq_WJ4eTu/3v9/ErxkdbcrRgyoh5VxEQCK4g/h0/jQA4O7CIstfM-zxhpRC5E4KoYEeuwalcjcGmOK0xqFc)
---
Friend, If a resident in my district traveled just 10 minutes from their home across the border into Canada, they’d find that the average price for one vial of insulin is just $12. But in my home city of Detroit, it’s $98.70. This is due to Big Pharma’s extortion. Since 1996, the price of insulin has gone up by over 1,000%. Insulin price-gouging over the past few decades has led to people skipping doses and dying. **Last year, 1.3 million people with diabetes were forced to ration insulin because they couldn’t afford it. Meanwhile, the three major insulin manufacturers made $21 billion in profits last year.** **So I’m co-sponsoring the**** _Insulin for All Act_****, which would prohibit manufacturers from charging more than $20 for a vial of insulin.** I firmly believe that healthcare is a human right and families should not have to ration life-saving medication. I am outraged that our community and neighbors can't get essential treatment without facing a heavy financial burden on their family. **Every person who needs insulin should be able to have access to it.** [**Please add your name to sign on as a grassroots cosponsor of the**** _Insulin for All Act_****today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3XHgIvBn3KGlh9Ud-M4-Zqe86IojGvXoPmXqy96JAT1D1l6oJ3wOS985M3I9XnVo7Z9oDgN8kM2JVgrL9nhtuAcuMX9lQUxm16hmvtjMThVtSJHlX5KOrUR7L1ywGBb8TXrdtWgIjoZWsft1ziqmDPJnTMz4o_ajFDQWw9Sc1xBznEE8gAmibYOoGbmSIcY4lo4vWTr1QayiPnxfn4xVHqYgiq8-YFoxsyPUd5OXItIpXaVf8K0Qx1IilBIeT3iF3xcvYPEA9bvU_xUMVuCmEZkQPjs4gOUEWJNAFQiljDg3AKZi-fdZTnbjO_H36OczjoCvosYWViuRZcxXTuoHBRnmslF6PRoIz1QdJGpnsYiaPpbxSKZH4wwVTodtWnkzIsRW21kb8IO2Tj78J1bMVzLRg8M6lZrGwDU3o8CDPUpcPsc6N53CLmSS2ustMXTHh6Le25D-7p2ZdttLigPgT10WooA_UTnP5Oc-r-fg0QUUpEF_5eXnmHuRg7QA_ouiPW2DxZSSHnkzsqzvyn3nwZwsmBhS2ZpB8NvtHGbwHWTl/3v9/ErxkdbcrRgyoh5VxEQCK4g/h1/69Uuz_1SU430S8kDqWhgFkZqlSWc5RDIcNfrV2joUKI) | [SIGN ON](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3XHgIvBn3KGlh9Ud-M4-Zqe86IojGvXoPmXqy96JAT1D1l6oJ3wOS985M3I9XnVo7Z9oDgN8kM2JVgrL9nhtuAcuMX9lQUxm16hmvtjMThVtSJHlX5KOrUR7L1ywGBb8TXrdtWgIjoZWsft1ziqmDPJnTMz4o_ajFDQWw9Sc1xBznEE8gAmibYOoGbmSIcY4lo4vWTr1QayiPnxfn4xVHqYgiq8-YFoxsyPUd5OXItIpXaVf8K0Qx1IilBIeT3iF3x-wb08yodEr2NO81FqNhB_O1K_0COi5XnWXY3VIUZwHAIvsHQuwU6yBzphUiPdsmIkDX1GUvBx15c_GkkXE6-nUh2aYJwASIL6p2qvgLESeIA7bJkwdDke28qxz7ESN-PdDV50BKMDPlABVgEPmrO7ukU8xqXExo84oL9yWFM8HlsB4CES9nTdZHeBAOz1263Bx6tTBHoD9hViwkJczdWFYMkmW0B5n6mx6ciBCssEsJfWKvE24vdDOBCr3G-_98Tx1PIupsWWKYEj0ICcr-CJMZmzYb9qvWZNznWBwV4GU/3v9/ErxkdbcrRgyoh5VxEQCK4g/h2/7dhg8PgMlPTWJoCyAUDHzIWdSYTj2xFgfjvN5AA8Fyo)
---
I am committed to stopping Big Pharma from continuing to take advantage of people merely to increase their profits. Corporate greed has consumed the healthcare sector for far too long.
20% of families are weighed down by medical debt in this country, and it’s one of the major reasons people file for bankruptcy.
That’s why I recently re-introduced legislation to stop the collection of medical debt for two years and prohibit debt from medically necessary procedures from being included on a credit report. And I continue to push for Medicare for All, because we must take the profit motivation out of healthcare.
[**Please sign if you agree: It’s outrageous that Americans pay the highest prices for insulin in the world. It’s time for the**** _Insulin for All Act_****.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnlBNhiUhIkbX_VXVxXAv8Qeag_aSZstKyjLb6VBGuVF3XHgIvBn3KGlh9Ud-M4-Zqe86IojGvXoPmXqy96JAT1D1l6oJ3wOS985M3I9XnVo7Z9oDgN8kM2JVgrL9nhtuAcuMX9lQUxm16hmvtjMThVtSJHlX5KOrUR7L1ywGBb8TXrdtWgIjoZWsft1ziqmDPJnTMz4o_ajFDQWw9Sc1xBznEE8gAmibYOoGbmSIcY4lo4vWTr1QayiPnxfn4xVHqYgiq8-YFoxsyPUd5OXItIpXaVf8K0Qx1IilBIeT3iF383V-0iTDq0vMxjuMCqhEa44zA3aTKL4WBwLfPVtQOhBmkyU5hadsGqd_W5DXDHm6sRlQgJXMQ2Qgup6JSO3WVaiQ1WYi5vogjQpdFcqw8njiig_hwMS0QXrxZY2YIv_4mj3MinmTVmpO7PcaXiTyXY6K0XqbRT0eMf9EjNvKwe7plr3kJ3jqpYdGQ17usPan1xof3m0v_9t_yJOYFZaRYREd18SQ6y66xNPFDFZm5xfz_4IGEqMXWMsYXjJk04H0EUQspHJuAotA8mwCTZHv_H6iYfDZYIWhsf-mSTj-cDN/3v9/ErxkdbcrRgyoh5VxEQCK4g/h3/7SBDvldt1DbXFEelhc4RYCOMWMJ1nP3bizAODkd-SJs)

Rashida

Friend,
From the moment I announced our 2024 campaign, I told you we would not only be facing Joe Biden and the radical Democrats...
I warned that we’d also be going up against every last entrenched Swamp bureaucrat of the Deep State.
And now, my sham ***arrest*** at the hands of a Soros-funded District Attorney for committing _no_ ___crime_ has proven just how deep the bench of opponents we face truly is.
_Make no mistake, this politically charged indictment was only the tip of the iceberg in how far these shadowy forces are willing to go to try and stop our movement._
But as I’ve said from the start, no matter what, I will continue to stand right where I belong and where I’ve always been, _between them and**YOU**. _
No amount of attacks, lies, or Soros-fueled indictments will intimidate me out of MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!
_**And I’m willing to bet it won’t intimidate YOU either, Friend.**_

clean_body: | | | Friend, From the moment I announced our 2024 campaign, I told you we would not only be facing Joe Biden and the radical Democrats... I warned that we’d also be going up against every last entrenched Swamp bureaucrat of the Deep State. And now, my sham arrest at the hands of a Soros-funded District Attorney for committing no _crime has proven just how deep the bench of opponents we face truly is. Make no mistake, this politically charged indictment was only the tip of the iceberg in how far these shadowy forces are willing to go to try and stop our movement. But as I’ve said from the start, no matter what, I will continue to stand right where I belong and where I’ve always been, between them andYOU. No amount of attacks, lies, or Soros-fueled indictments will intimidate me out of MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN! And I’m willing to bet it won’t intimidate YOU either, Friend. | Thank you and God bless you, | Donald J. name: Team DNC
subject: Open this email to see where the 2024 Democratic National Convention will be:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic National Committee, **[www
body:
As a strong grassroots supporter, we wanted you to be the first to know the location of the Democratic National Convention. | |
---
Derek, we have some exciting news to share. Because you are a strong grassroots supporter of the DNC, we wanted you to be the first to know: **The Democratic National Convention is returning to the Midwest. Chicago will host the convention from August 19-22, 2024.** The Midwest is a critical Democratic stronghold and Illinois, Wisconsin, Michigan, and Minnesota -- known as the “blue wall” -- were crucial to the 2020 victory of President Biden and Vice President Harris. These states have voted to send a Democrat to the White House in every election since 1992 with only one exception: 2016. **And in 2022, the Democratic governors of these states were resoundingly reelected -- making up one of the best midterm elections for a sitting president in decades.** Chicago has already felt the impact of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, including rebuilding crumbling roads and bridges, replacing dangerous lead pipes, and expanding broadband. The region will showcase the Democratic economic agenda that is unleashing a manufacturing boom, strengthening U.S. supply chains, creating good-paying middle-class jobs, and expanding economic opportunity. We’re thrilled that Chicago will host a successful convention to showcase the Democratic Party’s values. We hope to see you there! \-- Team DNC

clean_body: As a strong grassroots supporter, we wanted you to be the first to know the location of the Democratic National Convention. | | Derek, we have some exciting news to share. Because you are a strong grassroots supporter of the DNC, we wanted you to be the first to know: The Democratic National Convention is returning to the Midwest. Chicago will host the convention from August 19-22, 2024. The Midwest is a critical Democratic stronghold and Illinois, Wisconsin, Michigan, and Minnesota -- known as the “blue wall” -- were crucial to the 2020 victory of President Biden and Vice President Harris. These states have voted to send a Democrat to the White House in every election since 1992 with only one exception: 2016. And in 2022, the Democratic governors of these states were resoundingly reelected -- making up one of the best midterm elections for a sitting president in decades. Chicago has already felt the impact of the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law, including rebuilding crumbling roads and bridges, replacing dangerous lead pipes, and expanding broadband. The region will showcase the Democratic economic agenda that is unleashing a manufacturing boom, strengthening U.S. supply chains, creating good-paying middle-class jobs, and expanding economic opportunity. We’re thrilled that Chicago will host a successful convention to showcase the Democratic Party’s values. We hope to see you there! \-- Team DNC Please consider making a $7 contribution to the Democratic National Committee to help elect Democrats up and down the ticket in 2023 and 2024. body:
Alvin Bragg just SUED Jim Jordan for investigating the witch hunt against President Trump in New York. | | | I’m absolutely FLOORED.

**Alvin Bragg just SUED Jim Jordan for investigating the witch hunt against President Trump in New York.**

As a Green Beret serving in some of the most dangerous places in the world, I saw tyrannical leaders across the globe use the power of the justice system to silence their opponents.

_But I never thought I’d see it happen right here in America._

**Soros-backed liberals in New York are waging war on ANY conservative who dares to challenge them, and I need every patriot to step up and STOP this witch hunt.**

name: Greg Landsman
subject: A note on Friday night’s assault on reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Landsman for Congress P
body:
On Friday night, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas suspended the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, a drug used by millions of women for medication abortions. Let’s be clear: This is a politically-motivated attack. Friday night’s ruling was a direct assault on the right of women to make choices about their healthcare.
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662475/400739873/1921099384?refcode=em_eng_2023.04.11_b1_gl_all&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDVkZmNiOC1hOWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeGVnryqqkYu8am2UiGl1ceYa4lN-X3VNmuX_F7NFOs=)

Friends, it’s Greg.

On Friday night, a Trump-appointed federal judge in Texas suspended the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, a drug used by millions of women for medication abortions.

First things first: Mifepristone is safe and effective, and the ruling to halt its FDA approval completely ignores decades of scientific precedent.

**So let’s be clear: This is a politically-motivated attack. Friday night’s ruling was a direct assault on the right of women to make choices about their healthcare.**

Politicians and judges have no place in these deeply personal, life-altering medical decisions. I will never stop fighting against the attacks on reproductive freedom to ensure that women across America always have access to the care they need.

[**If you agree that Congress needs to act immediately to restore and codify reproductive freedom, will you add your name to our petition?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662477/400739875/1870498772?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmZDVkZmNiOC1hOWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=UeGVnryqqkYu8am2UiGl1ceYa4lN-X3VNmuX_F7NFOs=&emci=61bccfc5-89d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fd5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=10283101)

Greg

name: Team Kilmer
subject: "The Polluters Over People Act"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
House Republicans just introduced a dangerous counter to President Biden's Inflation Reduction Act, Peter.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662485/400739887/-2027002553?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU1ZGZjYjgtYTlkOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJhuvsVPvJC8ofAyIFTz1lcNN7Oj05LeqGoHVJ2eKx8=&emci=035fb6e2-b3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

This is unacceptable, Peter.

House Republicans have introduced a bill that's so damaging it's already become known as "The Polluters Over People Act." It would prioritize protecting corporate profits and Wall Street over the health of the American people.

While President Biden's Inflation Reduction Act sought to move us away from our dependence on fossil fuels, this dangerous legislation from House Republicans would give hand-outs to Big Oil while leaving the American people behind.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662486/400739888/-1881367569?ms=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6qwKwrOR0fUtlQV+EmcZhbYff2n70TT6kHBAhrXVRPQ6uuAccPk7qNVnaY3RSewxPEZA3WJB8ie+SCR6+KZMebr899Swy+HqhyA1kPP6ZNtfiwSgQ8Qi//ePIRttKfhtIZLnYt4912UENvjwfmf5mqJv/MKdMTsS9b1tRuNipco=&refcode2=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU1ZGZjYjgtYTlkOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJhuvsVPvJC8ofAyIFTz1lcNN7Oj05LeqGoHVJ2eKx8=&emci=035fb6e2-b3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)
"The Polluters Over People Act" is a giveaway to Big Oil and gas companies. _That means more price gouging at the pump, an increase in environmental and health disasters for the American public, and multiple steps backward in the fight against the growing climate crisis._ House Republicans even rejected an amendment to prevent drilling off the coast of Washington.

Look Peter, Derek knows that the majority of Washingtonians – and Americans – overwhelmingly recognize the danger and urgency of the climate crisis, and are ready to see legislators take immediate action to mitigate its devastating effects NOW.

**That’s why we're asking:[Will you sign Derek's petition and tell House Republicans that you REJECT their dangerous "Polluters Over People Act"? >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662487/400739889/-1881367569?ms=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6qwKwrOR0fUtlQV+EmcZhbYff2n70TT6kHBAhrXVRPQ6uuAccPk7qNVnaY3RSewxPEZA3WJB8ie+SCR6+KZMebr899Swy+HqhyA1kPP6ZNtfiwSgQ8Qi//ePIRttKfhtIZLnYt4912UENvjwfmf5mqJv/MKdMTsS9b1tRuNipco=&refcode2=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU1ZGZjYjgtYTlkOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJhuvsVPvJC8ofAyIFTz1lcNN7Oj05LeqGoHVJ2eKx8=&emci=035fb6e2-b3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835) **
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662488/400739890/-1881367569?ms=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&refcode=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&source=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230410_popact_adv_gq_act___TK_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=6qwKwrOR0fUtlQV+EmcZhbYff2n70TT6kHBAhrXVRPQ6uuAccPk7qNVnaY3RSewxPEZA3WJB8ie+SCR6+KZMebr899Swy+HqhyA1kPP6ZNtfiwSgQ8Qi//ePIRttKfhtIZLnYt4912UENvjwfmf5mqJv/MKdMTsS9b1tRuNipco=&refcode2=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzNzUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmU1ZGZjYjgtYTlkOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vJhuvsVPvJC8ofAyIFTz1lcNN7Oj05LeqGoHVJ2eKx8=&emci=035fb6e2-b3d7-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=fe5dfcb8-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=3595835)

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: What the actual f*ck did Hakeem Jeffries just do?
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, our jaws
just dropped:

Hakeem Jeffries — an entrenched member of the Democratic establishment and
the current leader of the House — was recently a guest of a Republican
operative and Nazi sympathizer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133446?refcode=em20230411-28433&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g ][IMG]

This is exactly why we can’t trust or count on politicians who are a part
of the political establishment.

They sell us and our values out at the first chance they get. Hakeem
Jeffries isn’t a progressive, he’s an entrenched politician who now
apparently has been rubbing shoulders with a Republican operative and avid
collector of Nazi memorabilia.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133446?refcode=em20230411-28433&t=1002&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g ]Will you rush a $3 contribution right now to help us
take on the Democratic and Republican political establishment? With your
support, we will elect more change leaders like AOC who would never sell
out their values or be a guest of a Nazi sympathizer.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/133446?refcode=em20230411-28433&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g ]Contribute $3

Thank you for your support,

Team JD

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1022&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1023&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230411-28433-footer&t=1024&refcode2=28433_1203867_7nHP3g&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=28433%2E1203867%2E7nHP3g

With this win, Hodge Washington became one of two people to successfully defeat an incumbent for a city council race in Phoenix for the first time in two decades. Councilmember-Elect Hodge Washington, will take office on April 17th and for the first time in city history, Phoenix will have two Black city council members serving at one time.

**Run-Off Victory in Chicago Mayoral Race** [](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953x8Bdi3DJx_tI_BkDTloM8oIhbIZMVsW3afV_eoOUfR_oHzyAF2Ux88HMOq0h3Zb8pyqCP5_cct9JwS-xJ4iBIk1J3d5bShFl-fKU17KzwtxMJW0hSYUB9mPnRroJ8yilWvWE7eUuxw1toRlaeirYGWp_KzMSLB_N_i97sSC8wYoACEJF07XcVVeeCs11_RxelOHsjzaS7qONArHwA7MjEmXVMblnOBz6GNwywkmQYfMsanxu644R3N5qBMMfWEC7oJmKY2jYhTeLyjbPa2ZHo2OxSbwPDwebExf-qHWFvqmBE-bsoWI5B97MwCmZFy9uH9uUvxsXcEqowLF8bVB9ZilknsPpr44kFQuXoXNd7uiBkfeNZ5AcpqpaimGHq_I0rkWqjWnu0JF6oWyAZ6t-Id7V6fh3eiHBgnb3TmaX7zZw/3v9/AusUycdoQfefRA8YfrsqvQ/h3/NJmKcInis5U0yrcLefRXWiGubbDVlZVEJy7hpGOCLUA) On April 4th, [Brandon Johnson won his run-off election](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/Mqag7sW8TIW-nixyBdulQgQROiIq-nDYJPBPR74FnCezJN6WMGG28B8QO4NNTqcqQrV1gZsfrCz8nJsposuj0ADmgxfpBYjNTC4HLhEbaECTPLt6E5imaZbTWMSB2qMOBSoiXvsSh0HUra4Jh4EgnGqlsqu4623om_4h4zPV0KTVAsO4gRGbbyaTZ9hJWuVvwNZceNXWbZeqpxUKhEmDHuk75ilDFjuUeUmFa-VTqWTE0Z5o9G24Ah7axR4s_xrAoDy6kPAty4NMIv5JWoOJrQyZd9rdX8tE8CJLLAUkupck9utVXhM71sMJ07YiUCVj_tDOzof8rXn9ZS-CzBI1OQtNCw4U_-Hf0MQjXqDvhjcgrU6OMaefD9DVIItQzHSmZlxtt8a5UHzpuA4k2SfPE1PEeJ7QKrgkCfRKn7n9tZmTDc5epdLAVycAIfTpWywbh5gXdQikZOf91yhiD3KCcQ/3v9/AusUycdoQfefRA8YfrsqvQ/h4/JWoBN9G3AKwAZjm-0kW_RUtubapvZgqi-Qhz_86y_lI), becoming the next mayor of Chicago. With this win, he will lead the third-largest city in the country. Mayor-Elect Johnson began his career as a public school teacher at Jenner Academy in Cabrini-Green and Westinghouse College Prep on the west side; he then went on to become an organizer for the Chicago Teachers Union; and served the City of Chicago as the First District Commissioner for Cook County, for the last five years.

clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Run-Off Victory in Arizona City Council Race On March 14th, Kesha Hodge Washington won her run-off election for the Phoenix City Council District 8 seat. With this win, Hodge Washington became one of two people to successfully defeat an incumbent for a city council race in Phoenix for the first time in two decades. Councilmember-Elect Hodge Washington, will take office on April 17th and for the first time in city history, Phoenix will have two Black city council members serving at one time. Run-Off Victory in Chicago Mayoral Race On April 4th, , becoming the next mayor of Chicago. With this win, he will lead the third-largest city in the country. Mayor-Elect Johnson began his career as a public school teacher at Jenner Academy in Cabrini-Green and Westinghouse College Prep on the west side; he then went on to become an organizer for the Chicago Teachers Union; and served the City of Chicago as the First District Commissioner for Cook County, for the last five years. March Endorsements During the month of March, The Collective PAC made major mayoral endorsements: in his run-off election for mayor of Chicago, Illinois as she runs to become Denver, Colorado’s first Black woman mayor Kansas City Mayor Quinton Lucas as he runs for re-election in Missouri as she runs to become the first Black woman to serve as mayor of Philadelphia, Pennsylvania The Collective PAC also endorsed the following 11 candidates running in state and local elections in 7 states: , Denver Public Schools Board of Education, At-Large Seat (CO) , Jacksonville City Council, District 14 (FL) Karl Coleman, Decatur City Council, At-Large Seat (IL) , Saint Louis board of Aldermen, Ward 7 (MO) , Superior Court Judge (PA) , Keller Independent School District Board of Trustees, Place 4 (TX) , San Antonio City Council, District 2 (TX) , Virginia State Senate, District 13 (VA) , Virginia House of Delegates, District 2 (VA) , Virginia House of Delegates, District 19 (VA) , Arlington County Board (VA) The Collective in the News Roll Call - The New York Times - The New York Times - Thank you for being a part of The Collective Fam!
