name: Bob Casey
subject: A special request
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
I finally have a few minutes to sit down, catch my breath, and reach out to you with a special request. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662639/400740272/-744169294?refcode=Header&ms=Header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQzZWM3MC1hYWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Yi8VNhNJoBYJUD58vFD8wXIgu3McxO94WhUi0XLKZc=&emci=aacd006a-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c543ec70-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725) Hi Peter, Bob Casey here. 👋🏻 It has been a great 24 hours since we launched our re-election campaign. I finally have a few minutes to sit down, catch my breath, and reach out to you with **a special request:** **[Will you personally endorse my campaign for the US Senate? To win this important race, we have to build a strong grassroots movement that reaches every corner of Pennsylvania. Your personal endorsement is the first step towards doing just that.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662640/400740273/2007113822?source=em20230411-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQzZWM3MC1hYWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Yi8VNhNJoBYJUD58vFD8wXIgu3McxO94WhUi0XLKZc=&emci=aacd006a-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c543ec70-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **[Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662641/400740274/2007113822?source=em20230411-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQzZWM3MC1hYWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Yi8VNhNJoBYJUD58vFD8wXIgu3McxO94WhUi0XLKZc=&emci=aacd006a-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c543ec70-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **Let me explain what your endorsement means to me.** In the Senate, I’m not there to fight for the ultra-wealthy or powerful special interests. I’m fighting for hardworking Pennsylvanians — just like you, Peter. I know that if I have your support, I’m doing something right. **Still, I know that your support isn’t guaranteed.** I have to earn it. So, let me tell you a bit about me and what we’ve accomplished together. In Washington, we’ve:
* Lowered costs for working families.
* Expanded access to veterans’ health care.
* Supported small businesses.
* Driven critical federal investment to local communities across the Commonwealth.

**And we’re just getting started.** I’m running for re-election because we still have a lot of work to do to cut through the gridlock, take on the powerful special interests, and deliver real results that make hardworking Pennsylvanians' lives a little bit easier. **[With your endorsement, I know I can win this important race and keep fighting for you in the Senate. Please, take a moment to add your name now and join our grassroots team:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662642/400740275/2007113822?source=em20230411-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQzZWM3MC1hYWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Yi8VNhNJoBYJUD58vFD8wXIgu3McxO94WhUi0XLKZc=&emci=aacd006a-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c543ec70-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** **[Add your name »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61662643/400740277/2007113822?source=em20230411-ngp&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDU4NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTQzZWM3MC1hYWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=8Yi8VNhNJoBYJUD58vFD8wXIgu3McxO94WhUi0XLKZc=&emci=aacd006a-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=c543ec70-aad8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=8943725)** Thank you, Bob Casey

subject: The 3️⃣ things you need to know

_ 🎲 _Will your account be suspended for “violence” or “harassment”?_

[**FIGHT BIG TECH’S GAME OF MONOPOLY**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=264db1c9bc3b4b9b85f7601d420829d4&_e=vL3ZREJwMVg82UB8n_4Gwuvh3B8CeQ7am58RMrOe-Q5GwAfd2nbkRbtS5gV_xtCW5u98hwMi2CwcKeiUSJB5StKeXLnGThU4pFQ96z3RKbH0kR4pybkd-8wtjQWeiPIGwZuCEAuRn8deLQOt0bIqHiNxNY5X39uDn8lTRTn6nqC1lSnCSAitvSg_O6warDmtSnSBynEQhiqN7p6U2jpRX3-f-QJ-IZjCuh0VrbX-jWJ36_osZ5RrQTjwlkLteE_b8bJXJrOTIpC7R78fJjBXO7ql1HscdF1ht-H4hZ_lrglKk6LG5z8ELqVvVgGDtQMTAG5_T5KfQCedZ7kvrMHJQQC9RPR80J3hONxPFZAqUSViYSIwUxZcBmoHotQfR_cZ)

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Washington needs a new Sheriff in town
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.
[Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_t=dKwrMwfshX1bDXu-dj_u1D5HLyVWbrjGs2wWuFvNcocXeyICc4QxI0XQP7bLLZp8CgCTHFLuaj5HTgOfrLVjpZ4ikozJsJgfR0nwXd5DTf4%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_t=dKwrMwfshX1bDXu-dj_u1D5HLyVWbrjGs2wWuFvNcocXeyICc4QxI0XQP7bLLZp8CgCTHFLuaj5HTgOfrLVjpZ4ikozJsJgfR0nwXd5DTf4%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign’s first official supporters.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4wLhzL7F3LGROY7Doo36ZpPtXLXHoSd4gVSb79Sh-hfjNC818CdxKSrJ1w76E32lEoYW45e1DG-fMrbfovJXOyXrLm3hNTkqmH88b_Vgm1afk1m6F2QDx1jO1gMyIPllvPcjQKOr1dJelAoZE5uocSg%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4O_7RmY9oAzfcsJCKjugYv9ynloxK_MBETsR0Wrkkhy4ilF9T_HCORaZCs0EB80YJuVnogu300eKvHBjNdjrVx_MTYEvRKvzs5WYCsfy5P3QaBZDY2Pl6ykwO6Wcg8tQNC8uMgSKkKSXKMEk9ZFe5sw%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4bRw8kR__oX10kq0CCcGfH26vVz-6Tq0yq4CsA0CAm7T7xPAC8KXXE1ESRdsGg4pYnjare8UQYq-Z8X_MUzObGw9pFrgvAgkjDHYOE8OE6HoeodVxDmqM7oOl6wJWSRbQpfzSATkrIUjule5qVrqqqg%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that’s why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I’m announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation’s Capitol.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi40lHtcuNHfQeMOMOOzjxbOoXYk2Hf_SSa0yt9YHxKbsxXfN_1VEYXnQHuTotQx75ZA2dnTe4xRheQgvpd1f2IAHTCpxZlDJILrKAMzrMdOt0B7QEAp_unvcX7o4_LkLHO2SAzM3twWQCy0pm1uueziA%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4lctagIFd9SHF8FgL3i6mCZZpVZFA5f48oQHwEW2PtNl45dtaT1qtaMMUzER-e7D73xN6qAltfIspUHHfN8Z9I8Nwr1xrYh1Krr_BxsXc9Yg7zNFNs0_OXDYBoFMEUM_JlHPZ6agp4E4ZeAwjxlXhiA%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4k0QXag38LKHnj8GW7SD-KMI2ReZk1ehH3PXnUrcPiGeZN4_UWC9H2zz9nOTa5THz9ftkoSkgdLAHWgqsqHMQ2s9SpZuLT7UDc5TXKzTIYTALl_liJt6ynqmmLlOlCP84OpCvbNAAWR9g7ip40L-m5g%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I’ll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4dxxYcmaN8hxvNmBAySj00N6wVvBHnEWbIfmnQWLbMmrO8h097Kyan5HMMc8UPF6SvBozecuZgY9etWHkOyTIPDOfg0ea2WoQf-xv_123oJUBGTrcVyzSYpBXd9r6sOiYJLLihkpmjeTLsOieyVsNvA%3D%3D) **I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4sjFPRGemObJzRkFb31qYnbBDj4Z_laxvCSMPJMk1NPoc1OBw0NXQ2VL3OJ5S5A_ttQjzgCYRloDvr_7hls3OQbeVMv8cCsxBMKAbL8lqCg9ds3Y83oq68HjeJ3ibSoS5J33PGYMw4t3-CX5Bkk4LOA%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That’s where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**“Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.”**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I’m tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4mgV6F4P4oNvR2WL_QNeTM3cYv8PkR3gQcH1_ZUlmxkUXcnkt2N-5idcAnDCJMVhr6KMpyD7eqpWMpGhh6otW8-3g9WfuuCQzYwlOKfO0eYZh2LLa4GcD-OykwzXOwwEkuxjScXB-rVfOoLsR8MQzCw%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi45jxa4IWm-fbqbK5EJ7_qALlqHAcUff_zmLyKhgiATjCFYUZOE4bk_AhSHZA6xaclH9cxny98_svP0453z2DipX4mhYwnPzfNxbmDvZjlxkBq1OH59Bdns2L4eImwDwvhzHmre2A9WbS26WE8Aq0KLw%3D%3D)
Sheriff Mark Lamb
Republican for U.S. Senate

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

[ ** HELP ME FLIP ARIZONA'S SENATE SEAT RED ➞ **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=e9e78bbb617345ebbaaab2429f535e23&_e=N2CT8-G2_FcfAGiCwHZJaxkcWwT87nv6XgNCIAwZArSWTLUEzuxaTexYuXLr-JD0_OoskZ5oy84gojIT8pB-vyasMbRA2n_qJozTp9fwPguPPNas4s0c4aYeIOhwf0Q63xg9fFMTSHAf9J-_3jPyQT3x7g7Pk8SklR3XrbSL1mYQCF3PeSDYxQCFJW37NLsG-Vxv1nQdUb25zjEc1NJRggKUcwm_TRG-5mX-hIcuap_CGc8sInXyPqd5PS4uMzi4-_xBpKmNbYnj1iu5aPJhi7hi2-FYG2YdO0rYZQoAGf7e7S3DzMJZ7nNFQfY1AnREBqwq1S2Tzt79M7qFBXiuWGl1SIxPyMLXH_MueyFJixD_wbkB8hlNmsubmyxMNkEvOLYYP_hcuVqbwDBvqGqp4Q%3D%3D)

clean_body: I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. | | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb - I’m a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we’re also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I’m responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that’s why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son’s life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what’s the point if I’m not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son’s incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities’ ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff’s badge on, I remind myself that I’m no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. To find out more about my candidacy, In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona’s third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It’s our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction. I may currently have a big job title, but I have even more responsibility. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I’ll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That’s where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual’s rights. Benjamin Franklin famously said, “Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety.” Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn’t afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington. The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff’s badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. For me, my community and family are everything. Thank you, Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media Meet Sheriff Lamb: | GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

subject: 🚨 Urgent Action Alert: Enhance the Police Pursuit Bill – Contact Your Senator NOW!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Washington State Republican Party
body:
Help us ensure a STRONG fix to Police Pursuit bill, SB 5352, passes the Senate

http://wsrp.org
Ballots Are Out, Vote By November 2nd!

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=WeGlgXqOx-Y

With ballots out, now is the perfect time to get out there and volunteer on a conservative campaign. Every door you knock on in these local races matter a lot and the results of this election year will be used as a bellwether for the 2022 midterms.

We are also hosting another WSRP Statewide Day Of Action on Saturday, October 30th! Bring a friend or neighbor to volunteer for a few hours to help local conservatives win in November! Sign up here to join our Statewide Day Of Action! (https://form.jotform.com/212737084845058)
State Sen. Gildon On Vaccine Mandates
https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws
State Senator Chris Gildon (R - Puyallup) joins the podcast this week to discuss vaccine mandates, anti-policing laws, the Long-Term Care Tax, and how he got his start in politics. WAGOP is now on Apple Podcasts and Spotify, follow us and never miss an episode! Listen here. (https://soundcloud.com/user-450836972/wagop-report-state-sen-chris-gildon-on-vaccine-mandates-and-democrat-anti-policing-laws)
Republican Leaders Fight Inslee's Mandate
Thanks to our Republican leaders in the State House and Senate for fighting back and offering a strong rebuke of Inslee's harmful vaccine mandate. Below is an excerpt of their most recent statement to the press:

“We are already experiencing higher prices and empty shelves partially as a result of COVID's shutdowns and workforce shortages. Today's deadline, with its unnecessarily hardline consequences, will only make that worse when hundreds, if not thousands, lose their jobs and are denied unemployment benefits. It also threatens public safety by reducing our police forces at a time when crime is already rising. People feel unsafe. They are afraid of what criminals will do when there are even fewer law enforcement officers to respond. And they are worried about people's chances of survival if there aren't enough first responders to help in an emergency. The governor underestimates the potential impact of his actions.

“Coercion, intimidation, threats and public shaming are not tactics a leader should be using against the people. The governor's obvious disdain for those who are choosing to lose their jobs rather than compromise their right to make their own medical decisions is unhelpful. He is dividing the public – segregating us and turning people against each other. Yesterday, even unvaccinated health-care workers were heroes. Today, they become villains in the governor's narrative."

Read the full statement. (https://jtwilcox.houserepublicans.wa.gov/2021/10/18/republican-leaders-todays-vaccine-deadline-threatens-critical-services-public-safety/?fbclid=IwAR3WxI9H29hbbmfbZhdkDS9QjqdVd2TIRCdjNjUkUlLdeThtbUjK_WBWJuw)
Smiley Campaign Shows Grassroots Support In Latest Fundraising Quarter
Tiffany Smiley is fighting hard to retire Patty Murray and her latest fundraising numbers show not only has Tiffany raised more than $1.6 million but she also has unequivocal grassroots support, with over 10,000 donors from Washington State. Flipping a U.S. Senate seat is hard work but Tiffany has shown in the only 5 months since starting her campaign, that she is a force to be reckoned with. Learn more about how Tiffany stands on the issues here (https://www.smileyforwashington.com/issues) .
Contact:
Steve Johnson
Communications Director
Washington State Republican Party
(425) 460-0570
steve@wsrp.org (mailto:steve@wsrp.org)

subject: What I said in The Philadelphia Inquirer

body:
Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and the next mayor will play an enormous role.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663375/400743191/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NmMwM2VjLWFjZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYuk5XfluhFlj83LT-xE5qbV43tXaDpvvOu3t2fJ4WY=)

| Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I recently gave an interview with _The Philadelphia Inquirer_ and wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it!

The year between midterm and presidential elections is considered an “off-year” in politics, but I strongly believe _**there is no such thing as an “off-year” for the climate movement.**_

Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and the next mayor will play an enormous role in reducing the city’s fossil fuel consumption, regulating it’s fossil fuel polluters, and taking action against new fossil fuel projects.

We are proud to support climate champion Helen Gym in Philadelphia who has a proven track record of climate action, _**but we can’t elect her without you.**_ [_**Will you contribute $10 today to help us support climate champions in crucial elections in 2023 and beyond?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663376/400743192/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230411-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NmMwM2VjLWFjZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYuk5XfluhFlj83LT-xE5qbV43tXaDpvvOu3t2fJ4WY=)

Philadelphia is home to chemical plants in the surrounding area dumping hazardous waste and polluting clean, drinking water. And this is not just an environmental issue, but a public health and safety one, too.

By electing climate champions like Helen, **_we set ourselves up to take meaningful climate action at the local level._

[_Will you contribute $10 to today to elect climate champions and join our movement to fight climate change?_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663378/400743194/931978131?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230411-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg3NmMwM2VjLWFjZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=IYuk5XfluhFlj83LT-xE5qbV43tXaDpvvOu3t2fJ4WY=)**

clean_body: Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and the next mayor will play an enormous role. | = | Hi, it’s Jane Fonda. I recently gave an interview with The Philadelphia Inquirer and wanted to make sure you didn’t miss it! The year between midterm and presidential elections is considered an “off-year” in politics, but I strongly believe there is no such thing as an “off-year” for the climate movement. Philadelphia has a crucial election coming up on May 16, and the next mayor will play an enormous role in reducing the city’s fossil fuel consumption, regulating it’s fossil fuel polluters, and taking action against new fossil fuel projects. We are proud to support climate champion Helen Gym in Philadelphia who has a proven track record of climate action, but we can’t elect her without you. = | = Philadelphia is home to chemical plants in the surrounding area dumping hazardous waste and polluting clean, drinking water. And this is not just an environmental issue, but a public health and safety one, too. By electing climate champions like Helen, we set ourselves up to take meaningful climate action at the local level. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s fight like hell together, Jane Fonda = | | = Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. body:
I am appalled, angry, and frustrated at the unrelenting attacks on our reproductive freedom.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61663434/400743393/-1301062112?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmZlNmM2MS1hZGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEW1Ra1mNGMkfkGyqk-fNzIBjZEwYQrBpG3kgTts53Y=)
---
| Peter,

Last Friday, a Texas judge ruled to enact a nationwide ban on mifepristone – a drug commonly and safely used during abortion procedures for 20 years. Though the decision has not gone into effect, this puts us on a dangerous trajectory toward restricting access to safe reproductive care.

I am appalled, angry, and frustrated at the unrelenting attacks on our reproductive freedom. I know you are too.

But just as the Republican party feels emboldened to push its extremist agenda, we should feel emboldened to fight back. We can’t allow their efforts to roll back our rights to go unchallenged, Peter.

We have ample time between now and November 2024 to set the stage for Democratic wins up and down the ballot. And as the newly elected chair of BOLD PAC, I will ensure progressive Latinos feel empowered to run for office – _and win_. But I need your support. [_**Will you contribute $10 or whatever you can to my campaign today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61663435/400743394/-1382951893?refcode=BLU-SAN-20230411-1-EM&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODI2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYmZlNmM2MS1hZGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gEW1Ra1mNGMkfkGyqk-fNzIBjZEwYQrBpG3kgTts53Y=)

clean_body: I am appalled, angry, and frustrated at the unrelenting attacks on our reproductive freedom. | = | Peter, Last Friday, a Texas judge ruled to enact a nationwide ban on mifepristone – a drug commonly and safely used during abortion procedures for 20 years. Though the decision has not gone into effect, this puts us on a dangerous trajectory toward restricting access to safe reproductive care. I am appalled, angry, and frustrated at the unrelenting attacks on our reproductive freedom. I know you are too. But just as the Republican party feels emboldened to push its extremist agenda, we should feel emboldened to fight back. We can’t allow their efforts to roll back our rights to go unchallenged, Peter. We have ample time between now and November 2024 to set the stage for Democratic wins up and down the ballot. And as the newly elected chair of BOLD PAC, I will ensure progressive Latinos feel empowered to run for office – and win. But I need your support. = | | | = | = | = | = | = ¡Ànimo! | I don't know about you, but I didn't sleep at all on Friday night after a single judge in Texas ruled to enact a _nationwide_ ban on a drug safely used in medical abortions for over 20 years. As of today, the drug – Mifepristone – is still available, but this is a dangerous step towards a total abortion ban.

Republicans have already raised **MILLIONS** of dollars to retake control and implement a nationwide abortion ban. But I don't panic – I plan and prepare. body:
Today is National Pet Day, and as your pet may have told you, we traditionally expect gifts to celebrate. (Don’t Google it.)

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61663538/400743978/428766023?refcode=BLU-SWC-20230411-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODczMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MGM4Y2NlOS1hZGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6iArvp4k_18TcT2Xu8OGpt58NTLX17cxEISQ3cLrzbM=)

| Hi, Peter!

name: Sheriff Lamb
subject: American families are in ruins. Let’s fix them.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Today, I'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in the United States Senate.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CuecNIcg_uaPQXVtSrIxE0ThMW0htVh2NZsAhCjDPaOz4eONTW6s-vPDWvulmKNIBOFo5aR2xH0rd7RwWjuBjFP-zNLhcr4Wxm8qD5bddRelNnQOagwvefZzT2x81maRJRP1IBtWADjTVB0UhFUXU3I6A%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign's first official supporters.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CuenLzEXwDZDfMqKddoQOEd7VpjIgeTdb1-M5aF3YORiQlq4XNFrOadBsu6P11dnpG__gR2MWsFKlYw23st79R5GLIgeWSscSeGFQdECHsemAM2JGaFbkdy39L1FR9OpgINPtfakBuEIRL3v2eIjv2wEA%3D%3D)**

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CueMVUaPuHG-Mv35kkOQv26Qxl2N2K36lzl75Me0izBBBCE_PMemtIf9_QXi8Bq7DLiNuwNLYTZyjqvh-H5T_7JdfLsw8zVOBWm4ZTehmoJWpxP9K5uuavqQLTvTxZzp5pA9LfN7gV9_VUtIDVl5_itLw%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67Cuea7MG_9lBxHHd7fxzKuYywLFJJ_LXrUuUomvTESQ3-vWRdMWGQqzLroQOwz1iHcZ6g1b-mV2Las2SzOLgyNDdnQbz0f0v6uCHJdHtHsKYvYrbKPIESt6tHlp8wiIIuOrioP76HVJt0KTulQaiKV5iIg%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we 're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that 's why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation's Capitol.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CueUg2c5s1qMA-C55b2fxxosakLVpCzoXM6Nt0itjIXs4vMLciztVZi8g-442oBheODGlEj2TYPdvb06i6WpUXCaTqTropInS1AODREBwnTPqaAoOnqyHavylPsdtmWN30l_3EHiqXPLguBo3D0XoGVWw%3D%3D)**

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CuemQqPnyUvwjLwRZLRCgp4QIsom6j2CvuO45VzMrmvC56-AyxsOOSrBLhFlMU2L5nukHDRRQv4y-9BEShHDG_jfkrglS_WLYi_2JXB5SvxGSOqKleY4h_KOYauIBFcKnlQzKAqx02M_gD6EGBqZIYwLw%3D%3D)

I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what's the point if I'm not willing to **step up and speak out** against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us?

Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities ' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

To find out more about my candidacy, **[sign up for our campaign emails here.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CuezLfsJy70x99LpHEPSOxT7LQbciEA3plfFjDTa0Qr5bSKQSgiiyLzclaWLH6KvG3tulqHnctMBwUXIzSOj6nehhdR2d0Nb3Dq9Gj--mZDjTogmEDAVXju-P2UnXBVUVg1ktFu45EPl21gyzquWnmoKQ%3D%3D)**

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona's third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It's our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

**[I 'll stand up to the woke left and the weak political establishment in Washington.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67Cuel0hfUGngDc7XD_ZXdX30Jsj9WSZdBEXyi1DNJ1rHaEecyyjiO8ozKjCSmie6uVq8nUA-QW9yTVU5MHrXdsVJFllvGYBuba7d0_KNJFiY-Xaab-AU8DoeUCxfCNAHbaSQWT7S--Blx_in8uY-3A64kg%3D%3D) **I'll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67Cueq3HuDolVhGUzDwdzKaywruGcbqtuVDbR27H0qbsdgqYwGOVjP6XyhIBpbGaVvHq09n_RmoJ1JdXO7zLQnfQufQS8RtBCpwgOGolobcIfzHG9eOnkmDIT0XY9XoZeV_T-uDVaOWh9B3OPfa9aQ_7bBw%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That 's where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**" Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety."**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I'm tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=56f15ac87c7146ddaeb36b96fbdf6b8a&_e=iLb2EPJc-ogXCcQ6WbD44ZzIibVMdofuAQD4-14d9Tm1UrA8S0qg8wC7GSZdTU7XlsakAjhFir7zdSAfLZyAi8gNkrC9v7vyzkVR02TiiZCL6USqJaaGza3k_Mc3gmKfpmXue3jfqRfJ4iG9-4M2ikpaV0hQqe4q2D-RG7EdWcfmhyFpF9KVPXkBh7gJXLb-2-PyVfR2a1mgZJtaDi_Ty7bMRxCt1kpfr8PsIiplTlUgRaxGVsDOItuJYfr67CuetcSxoJdL4HqHAu0D_3e1BsaLN_BoPYdOzVyYh6HHRNNk3Xb0bXdHWFwInqg1OrhsyoygDowCKyGGRnkrlwMaM_RKPEtzAWhmthSqZjzav7sJ-tdChCKrhF6UqCVnSkonMngjkC92azmrhY0K7XPjxw%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn't afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff's badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

clean_body: Today, I'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in the United States Senate. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona. Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we 're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - that 's why I take my job so seriously. Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby. During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl. As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities. I can talk about personal responsibility all day long, but what's the point if I'm not willing to step up and speak out against the failure of career politicians in Washington who are too politically correct to protect us? Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally carried dead bodies from our communities ' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers. Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - and continue to be - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight. When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable. And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims. I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset. I'll work 24/7 to do everything in my purview to secure the southern border and provide our law enforcement officers with the resources they need to succeed as our first responders. As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. That 's where personal responsibility is important. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights. name: Voting Rights Alert (via the NDRC)
subject: “Back to 1902”: GOP governor’s new restrictions roll back progress in Virginia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
it’s a grim preview of what they’re plotting across the country
|
---

Team, when our movement helped Democrats win full control of Virginia’s state government for the first time in decades, we saw significant progress on issues like reproductive freedom, fair redistricting reform, voting rights and more.

But now, Virginia Republicans are working to turn back the clock: | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663568/400744009/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230411_FR_4E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyYzhjY2U5LWFkZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WlV2mb2vcUEdSWpbOD81yvwyQGsNgFGpihI6QPTYQ3s=)
---
[**_Help defend voting rights nationwide: Donate to the NDRC >>_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663569/400744012/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230411_FR_4E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyYzhjY2U5LWFkZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WlV2mb2vcUEdSWpbOD81yvwyQGsNgFGpihI6QPTYQ3s=)
GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin just reinstated a _lifetime_ ban on voting for anyone with a prior felony conviction. This is a Jim Crow-era policy that had a greatly disproportionate impact on voters of color – in fact, up until 2016, _one in five_ Black Virginians were permanently disenfranchised.

**A few years ago,_the New York Times_ called Virginia “a voting rights bastion” under Democratic leadership. But under Republican leadership, Virginia is now home to one of the harshest voter disenfranchisement regimes in the country.**

This isn’t just about one state, team. Republicans are working to roll back progress on fair maps and voting rights in states like North Carolina, and they’re working to impose new voting restrictions at the national level. **Simply put, now is _not_ the time to let our guard down.**
[**When Attorney General Eric Holder warned us that “Now is not the time to take our democracy for granted,” this is what he was talking about. So please: Will you donate now to help the NDRC protect the gains we’ve made and continue fighting for fairness across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663571/400744013/866594094?amount=30&refcode=EM_RTI_20230411_FR_4E_redlight922_527&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjYyYzhjY2U5LWFkZDgtZWQxMS04ZThiLTAwMjI0ODMyZWI3MyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=WlV2mb2vcUEdSWpbOD81yvwyQGsNgFGpihI6QPTYQ3s=)

clean_body: it’s a grim preview of what they’re plotting across the country | Team, when our movement helped Democrats win full control of Virginia’s state government for the first time in decades, we saw significant progress on issues like reproductive freedom, fair redistricting reform, voting rights and more. But now, Virginia Republicans are working to turn back the clock: | = = GOP Governor Glenn Youngkin just reinstated a lifetime ban on voting for anyone with a prior felony conviction. This is a Jim Crow-era policy that had a greatly disproportionate impact on voters of color – in fact, up until 2016, one in five Black Virginians were permanently disenfranchised. A few years ago,the New York Times called Virginia “a voting rights bastion” under Democratic leadership. But under Republican leadership, Virginia is now home to one of the harshest voter disenfranchisement regimes in the country. This isn’t just about one state, team. Republicans are working to roll back progress on fair maps and voting rights in states like North Carolina, and they’re working to impose new voting restrictions at the national level. Simply put, now is not the time to let our guard down. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = – The NDRC Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. name: Erin Van Natta
subject: It's Joe Kent's Birthday (surprise - SHH!!)
body:
Peter,
Today is Joe Kent's birthday and I'd like to ask your help with two things.
First, can you email me a Happy Birthday message for Joe? I'll compile them all into a single email to give to him tonight to lift his spirits and encourage him to keep going strong.
Second, we want to set a record of raising $25,000 on his birthday that will help us win the race that is Republicans' #1 target and our best hope to gain a seat in the US Congress. Make a contribution of whatever you can afford at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/SO5pP2VEL7635a4V5tTHL81g/5RW2boaBRcFnXzHg6Dr5sQ).
Joe has been working tirelessly to raise the money to defeat woke leftist Marie Perez and all of the Acela Corridor Democrats that are funding her campaign. Help me send Joe the message on his birthday that we've got his back!
Please help us meet our fundraising goal of $25,000 for Joe's birthday before midnight at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com.](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/SO5pP2VEL7635a4V5tTHL81g/5RW2boaBRcFnXzHg6Dr5sQ)
Thank you!

Erin Van Natta
PS: Please reply with your birthday message to my email and please give what you can at [https://JoeKentforCongress.com](https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/l/yKnBAvy7a4tJj7XnOa763cIw/4763a1ZUo16npUUJbqPx9K2w/5RW2boaBRcFnXzHg6Dr5sQ).

Unsubscribe: https://contact.joekentforcongress.com/unsubscribe/o2MugVE0sjPAeG1zwzE3zPwB377NamVJrtTtZu9DI892k/Aq892bLK7NUcUtSXFAg4JQAA/5RW2boaBRcFnXzHg6Dr5sQ

Some fast facts to know about Tate Reeves: [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61663657/400744275/-1470085607?refcode=ea.39348899-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ms=ea.39348899-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDMzMTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzkzNDg4OTktYWVkOC1lZDExLThlOGItMDAyMjQ4MzJlYjczIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=xNE1clWHxWhy5z9XJ3YiSaIz3AO8HHwCdD70z6aOFDA=) ❌ Tate prioritizes special interests over people — denying Medicaid extension, leaving hospitals to shut down and people without help.

❌ He blocked state funding for essential repairs to Jackson's water infrastructure.

❌ He’s involved in one of Mississippi's worst public corruption scandals for misspending millions of taxpayer dollars to enrich powerful friends, including celebrity athletes.

❌ He continues to honor the Confederacy by proclaiming April as Confederate Heritage Month, an outdated and divisive tradition that has no place in our state.

❌ A majority of Mississippi voters (57%) would choose "someone else" over Tate in the upcoming election.

| | The cruelty is the point.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663695/400744446/-505727010?sourceid=1048890&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc3ZjJjZC1hZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Np9wBTMyq935moax-GpY59XEVc0pWQvLuHWNrcZRnR0=&emci=5072f039-96d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba77f2cd-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934) Peter,

Last Friday night, an anti-choice, Trump-appointed judge in Texas ruled that the FDA must reverse its approval of Mifepristone, a safe and effective drug used in most medication abortions. Later this week, we expect Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis to sign a new law banning abortion after six weeks into pregnancy statewide. (The state already has a ban in place; the Republican legislature has been dead-set on restricting access further since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned last summer.)

The answer to both of these attacks on our freedom is the same: We need more Democratic pro-choice women in power. We need judges, governors, state and local legislators, and more who know that attacks on bodily autonomy are attacks on the fabric of our society. At EMILYs List, we endorse and support candidates who will fight FOR us, not against us. **** **Please donate today to help power this important work:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Protect-Medication-Abortion](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663702/400744453/-505727010?sourceid=1048890&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc3ZjJjZC1hZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Np9wBTMyq935moax-GpY59XEVc0pWQvLuHWNrcZRnR0=&emci=5072f039-96d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba77f2cd-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)** Thank you for taking a stand,

the EMILYs List team _\----------Original Message---------
From: Christina Reynolds, EMILYs List
Sent: Fri., Apr. 7, 2023_ **BREAKING NEWS: A federal judge just ordered the FDA to reverse its approval of a safe and essential abortion medication in _all 50 states._** Mifepristone, a key drug used in medication abortion, was approved by the FDA in 2000, and has since been used by millions to safely terminate pregnancy and treat miscarriage. In fact, it's used in _more than half_ of all abortions in the United States.

Today, after a baseless lawsuit filed by an anti-choice hate group, a Trump-appointed judge in Texas has ordered the FDA to suspend its approval for mifepristone in seven days. That's right — after more than _two decades_ of approval, the FDA is now being ordered to change its stance.

This ruling is an attempt to ban the use of mifepristone in all 50 states.

We knew that conservative extremists wouldn't stop once they'd overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , and they won't stop at banning mifepristone, either. This ruling is absolutely devastating for women and families across the country, but it's _not_ the end of these attacks.

The truth is that anti-choice Republicans won't stop until they've banned every type of abortion in every state, county, and town in America — or until we stop _them_. ******** ********Here at EMILYs List, we work hard to elect women at _every level of government_ and in _every corner of the country_ who are as committed as we are to defending the right to choose. Donate now to help our candidates protect and restore reproductive freedom everywhere:**

**[https://emilyslist.org/go/Protect-Medication-Abortion](https://click.everyaction.com/k/61663709/400744460/-505727010?sourceid=1048890&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYTc3ZjJjZC1hZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Np9wBTMyq935moax-GpY59XEVc0pWQvLuHWNrcZRnR0=&emci=5072f039-96d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=ba77f2cd-aed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=5177934)******** ******** Thank you,

Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers)
Vice President of Communications, EMILYs List ********

The truth is that anti-choice Republicans won't stop until they've banned every type of abortion in every state, county, and town in America — or until we stop them. **** ****Here at EMILYs List, we work hard to elect women at every level of government and in every corner of the country who are as committed as we are to defending the right to choose. Donate now to help our candidates protect and restore reproductive freedom everywhere: **** **** Thank you, Christina Reynolds (she/her/hers) Vice President of Communications, EMILYs List **** ** ** ******** **** ******** ****** **** | ---|---|--- EMILYs List is a community of over five million members that helps elect Democratic pro-choice women to office. | Paid for by EMILYs List and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. Feel free to drop us a line at mailto:information@emilyslist.org or simply reply to this email. Contributions or gifts to EMILYs List or endorsed candidates are not tax deductible.

name: Team AOC
subject: Shocking conjecture.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Now more than ever, local abortion funds need your support.
#
Mifepristone has been a legal, FDA-approved abortion pill on the market for nearly 23 years. Studies have shown that it is as safe, or safer, than common drugs like penicillin or Viagra.1
But on Friday, a right-wing, GOP-appointed judge in Texas ruled that the drug was improperly approved over two decades ago, and must now be removed from the market. The Biden Administration filed an appeal yesterday, and indicated they may ask the Supreme Court to review the case.
**If the ruling is upheld, we will have taken a significant step toward a national abortion ban.** Once medical abortion is banned, we are in extremely dangerous territory.
[ So today we are asking you to please split a donation between Midwest Access Coalition, Fund Texas Choice, Feminist Women's Health Center, and Mississippi Reproductive Freedom Fund – local abortion funds working to keep abortion safe and accessible. 100% of your donation will be split between these groups.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=abortion-aoc-email-20230411.PBzDaX&refcode=em20230411-4115-P_FND_CHA_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)
This ruling is different from other conservative decisions because this is not a case where a judge is making calls on what is within the bounds of the law or not: this is like a judge outlawing Claritin or aspirin just because they felt like it.
The contents of this judge’s decision is pure, shocking conjecture. There is no medical evidence, or a medical study, to support it. This ruling is an abuse of power and an extraordinary example of judicial overreach.
What we are seeing is a power grab over our courts, in which the laws passed by Congress and the Executive Branch are now going to require unanimous consent from 650 district court judges, many of whom were appointed by a right-wing, Republican party whose goal was to pack the courts with partisan judges.
_**But today we can stand together to support local, on-the-ground abortion funds that help arrange and pay for abortion care for patients who need it.**_
[ In states where access has been whittled away almost entirely, these funds also help pay for transportation and lodging for patients who have to travel hours, sometimes crossing state lines, just to access health care. If you can, support abortion access today → ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=abortion-aoc-email-20230411.PBzDaX&refcode=em20230411-4115-P_FND_CHA_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=abortion-aoc-email-20230411.PBzDaX&refcode=em20230411-4115-P_FND_CHA_GFM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)**
With resolve,
Team AOC

1 - [Center for America Progress](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/17979?t=22&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/abortion-aoc-email-20230411?refcode=em20230411-4115-P_FND_CHA_GFM&t=23&refcode2=4115_2526796_Bje6tM&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20230411-4115-P_FND_CHA_GFM&t=24&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=25&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=26&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=27&akid=4115%2E2526796%2EBje6tM)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Sheriff Mark Lamb
subject: Washington needs a new Sheriff in town
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
Today, I'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in the United States Senate.

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRii5sg2WSwAhAWKyTo1-xGYHksu81K4vGlJFgwLcQvsubLwoZdsnknluYyRWBjorPa7GBfrrrZpBiLTq3MHTNwYpeWCCas_9K49GoNoe01dEYKFtLEiwJqUuPeNH4Oju53lB9fbNNICGlW-Bza5KRMz7UHmoiNmpXXxayCChCSv4Q%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

My name is Mark Lamb - I'm a husband, father, God-fearing American, and proud Sheriff of Pinal County in the great state of Arizona.

**Washington needs a new Sheriff in town, which is why today I am announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate and[hope you will become one of my campaign's first official supporters.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRh9TDrbYqCYjcjOic6eSTga0djKoY2xLpAMoF6b75dI_X9Jfrg36fx5ZTtrpiN4ZYeBi2eEec4NBSv-oKBzqEuXCfcA0yFi8Q2_6LFkJ90TXGRk3zBRmKw-OHkuXbOJ74WO-cKVLFqX2bDHurQlUTn99ST1hJ8lP1T_J8a9oenq9w%3D%3D)**

[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRji5U3mzW8yD53qinrsRX7eUNtbdyNOl_hpch7iF_S-MWKQwarp8TokGR5MqzPNN2yqWteEDQMJBTTWcWRC-zYkCWAoUSInmcam8gkd3jVDx-U-r0ifnop2OIgQvZSBU5VA4H8A3SsybuC4ISY69VHNcer4K7SDZTj2T9bT5GnNog%3D%3D)
[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRhXkEuWQwMQdnsp_ZxfsA_ZLshDluDlVFD2FBd-rWyElpsaSV2D62p3zaQGhQ3gI6MNVWoaZN3HasgTVVscfye8N1ScmzWZxpcTjxG99EidUh86dEJrAHZ-C1fAuoU_q3O7rD-K0cl5T7bFkRkBxNZ71EaltauAacPPvUVOlghd7A%3D%3D)

Our sliver of Arizona is home to more than 420,000 Americans spread out over 5,000+ square miles; the place we call home is a vast and arid sundrenched landscape that also happens to be on the frontlines of several conflicts. **Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we 're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle.**

As the top law-enforcement officer in the area I'm responsible for the safety and wellbeing of every man, woman, and child who calls this place home. Unlike most of the career politicians in Washington, D.C., and in Phoenix, I know that in Pinal County, the buck stops with me - _**that 's why I take my job so seriously.**_

Like so many Americans, our family has experienced deep loss over the last couple of years. We lost our son and our one-year-old granddaughter eight days before Christmas. **There is simply no pain that compares to losing a child, let alone a grandbaby.** During my son's life, he struggled with drug addiction; he even spent time in my jail for using fentanyl.

As a result of my personal loss and the tragedy I see play out every day as Sheriff, I am hyper-aware that families across Arizona and America have been adversely affected by rising crime and drug use in our communities.

**[That is why today I'm announcing my candidacy for the United States Senate to level up my fight for Arizona families and yours in our nation's Capitol.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRgilFdCaZ84UzpbxlBUqM2nO55yDw7GywWPTKa6bLYxHpPH51h_H5JEys4uu8mEdAyo0iQqubblqOyNpMX00P-omkP79jdCzWsaPWzB53VW6ExVPlc9K6f5iCur1tWRMamsI6FhoQApnBTINvvJcBObBct4dyGDbxmRqJdxROZQBQ%3D%3D)**

Not only did I have to witness my son's incarceration in one of my jails, but I have personally **carried dead bodies from our communities ' ditches, rescued children from sex trafficking rings, and arrested gang members and drug dealers.**

Each day that I get up and put my Sheriff's badge on, I remind myself that I'm no better than any man or woman who works for me; I have been - _and continue to be_ - on the front lines of the opioid epidemic and the border fight.

In my capacity as the Sheriff of Arizona's third most populous county, I demand excellence from myself and everyone under my command. It's our DUTY to provide protection to the people we serve, along with an unwavering commitment to the communities under our jurisdiction.

I may currently have a big job title, **but I have even more responsibility.**

**When cartel violence spills over the border into our communities, my team is responsible for holding the thugs perpetrating the crimes in our communities accountable.**

**And when domestic violence allegations are made, my team is responsible for bringing justice to the victims.**

I was raised with a deep sense of personal responsibility that has remained with me throughout my life. Today in the United States of America, it seems to me that personal responsibility has come to be seen by many as a liability rather than an asset.

[**JOIN MY TEAM » WATCH MY ANNOUNCEMENT VIDEO**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRisOE37qqD2xPufdTUkx1Uq284AwNfAL1lY7LH0KVE43AHAiPJFNfKRgslLMtd0mhqLvdH4nj8A1lk3gjT5TJZshlRJ5vgqVNjpXD1-ZJBrRVIhQ2HFzeKhYcza582YYKgAAVM4YnZz2ortOntV-HSrXfsHp4GcEPHkEvo8z7TwXg%3D%3D)

As sheriff, I understand that the freedoms granted to us by the Constitution to make choices also mean the freedom to make bad choices. **That 's where personal responsibility is important.** There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights.

Benjamin Franklin famously said, _**" Those who would give up essential liberty to purchase a little temporary safety deserve neither liberty nor safety."**_

Pinal County, Arizona voters elected me to be their top enforcement official because they know that **[I'm tougher than a $2 dollar steak.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b43d45a8320349bebb45ab614275f910&_e=9yMDz8I1Wv3F-3DM8bmEeuFGB-Cng_uctn-8sew9ILhOQTg11j0fjQvYejZM6xh8gHJhH0muu54bBmx3VnUw7pMDPXoYyujbiz8S-xmjY-YlPdxQ7NTvk4a4dzCO-MpsYO2hntDEUVUsyw9ztLq_u5VKGSIU-yCq2m7qhCQnOV5VOAvRgK9RIsvth0b4ENA7iVILRS6D1hXa_yrxp-fz5hL0I19y9duD7-JLH_qCdRgg9acm-mSoC8cgGwrWn50NFhpPPPr-GxFzDIsJik-yY-YUgXWERLhydpoQPdNg5Oda4FGDJr83fs-179RYEc_3oanZb3hK5wPYF_lvlVV3eXhQpd9iBWw25lJmhD9YoHwTnXv4EqYnaT0mS9ajVoTH6wmUMszi_ec2TAkO5YxyzA%3D%3D)** Right now, Washington desperately needs someone who isn't afraid to tell it how it is or to get their hands dirty. I feel strongly that the Constitution must be protected**,a fight I will proudly continue as your next Senator in Washington.**

The voters who gave me the use of the sheriff's badge that I wear on my lapel know that the only interest I have in elected office is their safety. _**For me, my community and family are everything.**_

Thank you,

Not only are we fighting a war on illegal narcotics, but we 're also simultaneously fighting an immigration battle. There are times when I will have to intervene and voice objections to others in law enforcement who, despite their good intentions to control a situation or public behavior, are attempting to violate the Constitution and an individual's rights. Our small candidate spotlight of the week is... | | | Hi Peter – We want to introduce you to one of URD’s endorsed candidates for the 2023-2024 election cycle. **Ben Litchfield is running in a contested race for VA State Senate District 27.** Right now, Democrats hold a slim State Senate majority in Virginia. With Republicans in control of the governor’s office and the Virginia State House, we can’t afford to lose any seats in the State Senate. **Ben has spent his career fighting to protect consumers and is now running to fight for Virginia’s working families.** He was raised by a single mother and was driven to build a better life for his family. After attending law school, Ben worked in public service, assisting in the aftermath of the Financial Crisis and the Great Recession. He is running to ensure that every Virginian has access to jobs that pay a living wage, affordable housing for their families, and quality education for their children. **_[Ben's a fighter for working families, and taking back his district is going to be crucial to expanding our slim State Senate majority in Virginia. name: Helen Gym
subject: I'm about to go on stage
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Helen Gym
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-april23-em]
Team, our first and only major debate is about to begin, and I wanted to reach out to say one thing before I take the stage: Thank you.

It's a privilege to have you in this fight with me. I hope I make you proud.

Tonight, voters across the city will be watching and deciding who they plan to vote for, and I'm beyond excited to share our bold vision to end the public safety crisis, fully fund our public schools, clean our streets, and deliver a Philadelphia that loves you back.

But I’m going to need your help making that message heard in this historically crowded field of ten candidates — including self-funding millionaires who’ve already spent a small fortune to drown us out.

That's why I’m personally asking if you'll add a donation of any amount before I go up on stage. Here's your personal donation link: actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em?voter=dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-debate-em]

For decades, I’ve taken on our city’s biggest challenges and delivered solutions – whether it was restoring nurses and counselors to school, cutting evictions by nearly 70%, or guaranteeing predictable schedules for hourly workers.

All of this has only been possible thanks to people like you standing shoulder to shoulder with me in this fight.

The debate starts at 6:30PM on FOX 29 and will stream on their website. Hope you’ll tune in.

I can’t tell you how much it means to me to know I can count on you in these crucial moments.

Thank you for being part of this movement.

— Helen
Helen Gym is a Philly mom, a school teacher, a community organizer, and former City Councilmember. She has been fighting for Philly families and communities for decades — winning more resources for our schools, safer communities, and a more affordable Philadelphia. Our efforts are supported by everyday people like you who give what they can, whenever they can, because they want to see a safer, more prosperous, equitable Philadelphia that works for all of us. If you’d like to donate to Helen and help elect her as Philadelphia’s next Mayor, click here:
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hhg-em-feb2023]
Friends of Helen Gym
PO Box 11766
Philadelphia, PA 19101
United States
www.helengym.com [https://www.helengym.com/] | info@helengym.com [info@helengym.com]
