name: Rep. Shontel Brown
subject: Tell Congress to stop the GOP assault on reproductive rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
We need to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664329/400747055/-1734261590?refcode=EM_FR_230411Mifepristone_Abortion_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_logo&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDhlYmY5NC1iMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8bkW7O0K4LYuf2Zl1HDGtlpD1ctSHsg8ZVkpe6C0Pc=) Peter,

After working to overthrow _Roe v. Wade,_ the GOP movement to further deny healthcare to millions continues. A recent ruling by a federal judge in Texas to prohibit the FDA-approved abortion medication mifepristone is just another in a long line of attacks by the GOP on our most basic freedoms. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664330/400747056/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230411Mifepristone_Abortion_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_p1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDhlYmY5NC1iMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8bkW7O0K4LYuf2Zl1HDGtlpD1ctSHsg8ZVkpe6C0Pc=&emci=818ebf94-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=848ebf94-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) The GOP is throwing everything in its arsenal – state legislatures, attorneys general, the courts, and more – to destroy reproductive rights. We’ve seen it right here in Ohio, where Attorney General Yost led a national movement to prevent mifepristone’s distribution in ours and other conservative states.

**_In the face of this continued assault, the only way to secure our rights is to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act._**

[**_That’s why I worked with my Democratic colleagues in the House to reintroduce it, but now, Congress needs to hear from you, Peter. Can you sign our petition demanding Congress act to pass the Women’s Health Protection Act and defend access to reproductive care?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664331/400747057/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230411Mifepristone_Abortion_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDhlYmY5NC1iMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8bkW7O0K4LYuf2Zl1HDGtlpD1ctSHsg8ZVkpe6C0Pc=&emci=818ebf94-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=848ebf94-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664332/400747058/593891301?refcode=EM_FR_230411Mifepristone_Abortion_SB_90DO_4_G_TESTB_b1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDhlYmY5NC1iMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=A8bkW7O0K4LYuf2Zl1HDGtlpD1ctSHsg8ZVkpe6C0Pc=&emci=818ebf94-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=848ebf94-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=23746811) Make your voice heard,

Rep. Shontel Brown | As a Cuyahoga County Council member and Chairwoman of the Cuyahoga County Democratic Party, Shontel Brown has spent the last decade serving the people of Ohio and building coalitions. Now, as the Congresswoman for Ohio’s 11th District, she will fight for affordable quality health care, jobs that pay fair wages, a strong public education system, and equity and justice for all. **Will you join her and be the change we need?**

name: Team Becca
subject: Shocked and furious
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Becca Balint for Vermont, P
body:
Mifepristone is a safe and effective drug. This ruling is what is dangerous.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664356/400747198/966991095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjcyYmZjZi1iMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8jWEXnrZWdSA0ekqdNCaJAnivBsLiHBR6EkXDVFDYQ=&emci=d1be3b9a-a9d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=bb72bfcf-b2d8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=43402272) | Peter, Last Friday, we were shocked and furious to see that a federal judge ruled to invalidate the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, therefore ruling against the right of patients to make personal medical decisions with their doctors. **Let’s be clear: Mifepristone is a safe and effective drug, and it has been used for over two decades. This ruling sets a dangerous precedent and is an attack on reproductive rights and bodily autonomy.** While Republicans are seeking to control women’s bodies, Becca is working to re-establish a nationwide right to abortion and restore reproductive rights. She is a cosponsor of H.R. 12, **the Women’s Health Protection Act** , which would create a statutory right for medical providers to provide abortion care, a right for patients to receive that care, and abortion access protections across the country. **Right-wing extremists will stop at nothing short of a nationwide abortion ban, which means we can do nothing less than put our full support behind pro-choice candidates and lawmakers like Becca.** [_**Peter —for our freedom, our choices, and our health care — will you support Becca Balint with a contribution of any amount so she can continue using her voice and power to fight against these anti-choice attacks?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61664357/400747199/-2010650714?refcode=E20893-20230411-Mifepristone-SL-AbortionReproductiveRights-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=27&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM0MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYjcyYmZjZi1iMmQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V8jWEXnrZWdSA0ekqdNCaJAnivBsLiHBR6EkXDVFDYQ=) Thank you, Team Becca
---

clean_body: Mifepristone is a safe and effective drug. This ruling is what is dangerous. | | Peter, Last Friday, we were shocked and furious to see that a federal judge ruled to invalidate the FDA’s approval of mifepristone, therefore ruling against the right of patients to make personal medical decisions with their doctors. Let’s be clear: Mifepristone is a safe and effective drug, and it has been used for over two decades. This ruling sets a dangerous precedent and is an attack on reproductive rights and bodily autonomy. While Republicans are seeking to control women’s bodies, Becca is working to re-establish a nationwide right to abortion and restore reproductive rights. She is a cosponsor of H.R. 12, the Women’s Health Protection Act , which would create a statutory right for medical providers to provide abortion care, a right for patients to receive that care, and abortion access protections across the country. Right-wing extremists will stop at nothing short of a nationwide abortion ban, which means we can do nothing less than put our full support behind pro-choice candidates and lawmakers like Becca. = Thank you, Team Becca = If you'd like to receive fewer emails and only see our most important updates, **If you'd rather not stay up to date with Becca's work, you can . name: Friends of the Earth
subject: Your Signature Is Needed: Vicious trophy hunters are out for innocent bear blood
body:
| | | | | [](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1716104?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---|---|---

| | **URGENT ACTION NEEDED: Spring grizzly bear hunting season has already begun in several states, and vicious trophy hunters are out for blood!** Grizzly bears are one of our country’s most treasured mammals. After a long, cold winter, hungry grizzlies are finally leaving their dens, hopeful for a hearty meal this spring. Nursing mama bears who gave birth during hibernation will be among the most eager to nourish themselves and their newborn cubs. And that’s _exactly_ what cruel trophy hunters are hoping, so that they can easily lure out weakened mama bears desperate for food -- and _**VIOLENTLY SLAUGHTER**_ these helpless animals. Meanwhile, waiting for mama’s return, **orphaned bear cubs** are left scared and alone to **FREEZE OR STARVE TO DEATH.** [**Please, Friend, take action now to protect mama bears and their cubs from brutal trophy hunters this spring >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1716105?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1716106?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Right now, while you’re reading this email, trophy hunters are waiting just outside bear family dens to**ATTACK AND BRUTALIZE** these innocent animals by **_any means possible._**
Trophy hunters show _**NO MERCY**_ and will use the most **_INHUMANE_** methods to get their kill -- _**steel leg hold traps, choking snares, toxic lead bullets, and even dynamite!**_
And the worst part about these gruesome bear hunts? Many states _LEGALLY PERMIT_ it! No animal deserves to suffer the **agonizing pain** of these sick and tortuous murders, Friend. The U.S. Fish & Wildlife Service MUST take urgent action to STOP allowing barbaric trophy hunters to _**MASSACRE**_ these beloved mammals**before more precious grizzly bears are WIPED OUT forever.**
[**Friend, will you show mercy today by speaking up for these voiceless animals? Add your name to DEMAND an END to brutal bear hunting practices >>**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1716107?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1716106?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
**Thank you for protecting bears,
Friends of the Earth**
|

name: CaucusRoom
subject: 🚨 Is it Time to Panic?
body:
If you aren't with us, you're against us. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-e-quyvyk-trhiujldw-jl/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-r/)
## **It's Tuesday! China says they are[ready to fight](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-y/).**
[](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-j/) **Grow your organization and keep the momentum going with our powerful platform.** [Schedule a CaucusRoom Live demo today!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-t/) **They Are Against Us** The President of France has returned from a four-day state visit to China with[ **a renewed commitment to distance themselves from the United States.**](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-i/) **Democrat Money Laundering ** Democrats are laundering money using small money donations to Act Blue. **[James O'Keefe has uncovered some very suspicious donations.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-d/)** **Another Shooting** The Louisville Metropolitan Police Department says**[there are five people dead and eight injured in the Kentucky city](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-h/) **Monday following a shooting at a building that houses an Old National Bank location. A 25-year-old **[bank employee has been identified as the shooter.](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-k/)** **Pentagon is Leaky** The leaked**[Pentagon documents paint a grim picture of Ukraine's air defense outlook](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-u/), **predicting that the country could run out of key assets before the end of May. These types of leaks are a **[national security risk](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-o/)**! **Army of Influencers** Biden's digital strategy team plans to recruit an army of influencers to win over Gen Z voters during the 2024 election season. **[Wait, I thought this app was bad!!](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-x/) **Meanwhile, he's **[still not ready to announce](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-m/) **he's running for another term. **The Truth is Coming Out** New NARA records of the circumstances surrounding the Mar-a-Lago raid of former President Trump **[have revealed what we suspected all along](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-c/).** **Bad Behavior** **[Afghan refugees who were rescued and brought back to the US have been accused of being racist](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-q/)** and sexist towards those helping them, a bombshell report has found.

**Is it Time to Panic?** The economy is a mess with **[countries abandoning the U.S. dollar for trade and commerce](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-a/)**. What happens when the world dumps the dollar? **Let****'s [have a good laugh](https://caucusroom.cmail19.com/t/i-l-quyvyk-trhiujldw-f/)!**

Peter Willis,

You’ve likely only heard of Rep. Justin
Jones recently for being one of the Tennessee Three, targeted by the right
wing for standing with the people to demand basic gun reform, but Our
Revolution has been with him from the beginning.

In the Washington Post image above, you'll find Justin Jones right next to
Our Revolution Nashville Leader Brenda Ross and Our Revolution-endorsed
Nashville Metro Council member Zulfat Suara — who just voted to reinstate
Justin Jones to the Tennessee legislature!

Justin went from a community activist speaking at our 2020 Nashville
training to a national hero, and Our Revolution is doing everything in our
power to invest in the kind of organizing that enables and empowers more
heroes like Justin Jones in cities across America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230411_FR_Nashville_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Nashville&t=1010&akid=4192%2E5885482%2EVa8ibX ]Republicans are testing their worst authoritarian instincts on the city
and state levels, and Our Revolution is building a bench of strong leaders
like Justin Jones to fight back. Chip in here to help us elect a new
generation of progressive leaders from coast to coast!

Our Revolution delivered the organizing and messaging support to help
progressives score huge wins over the establishment in Chicago and St.
Louis last week, and that's only the beginning. We are now taking that
momentum to Philly, Pittsburgh, and beyond.

Zulfa Suara wasn't the only Nashville Metro Council member we elected who
was able to counter Republican extremism and restore Justin Jones to the
House. We also helped elect Nashville Metro Council members Emily Benedict
and Delishia Porterfield, who joined us on Monday's national live
organizing call.

On the call, Delishia laid out the stakes and the work ahead, saying,
"Today was a really good day for democracy in Tennessee, but the fight is
not over. Watch what's happening in Tennessee; if it's happening here,
it's coming to your state. We're asking people to invest in organizing
infrastructure, support the good candidates, the nonprofits, and activists
doing this work because without us working together, they're going to try
to take over our state, and I'll be damned if it happens on my watch."

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/8599?refcode=EM_NBI_OR_20230411_FR_Nashville_0_6MO_OurRevolution_NA_NA_Nashville&t=1018&akid=4192%2E5885482%2EVa8ibX ]Please help us build progressive power across America before it's too

body:
The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob Casey.
| Folks,

Bob Casey is officially running for re-election to keep representing Pennsylvania in the Senate — and he needs all the support he can get. The GOP and Mitch McConnell are already targeting Bob, and **PA’s historic competitiveness will make the 2024 Senate race among the most expensive and competitive in the country once again.**

[**That’s why we’re coming to you to ask: Can you become a Founding Donor of this campaign by splitting a donation between Bob Casey and Ron Be Gone today? Whatever you can contribute will have a big impact on this race.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16260?t=7&akid=1755%2E564421%2EG2ftOb) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Ron Be Gone and Bob Casey will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16266?t=13&akid=1755%2E564421%2EG2ftOb)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16267?t=14&akid=1755%2E564421%2EG2ftOb)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16268?t=15&akid=1755%2E564421%2EG2ftOb)
Bob Casey always stands up for the working families of Pennsylvania in the Senate. He’s spent his life fighting against the ultra-wealthy and the special interests that threaten our hardworking people — and he’s the first and only person to have won six statewide elections in Pennsylvania.

To win again, we’re going to fight for votes in each and every one of PA’s 67 counties. **We’ve done it before, and we’ll do it again.**

[**If you’re with us, split a donation between Ron Be Gone and our campaign to re-elect Bob Casey today.**](https://act.ronbegone.com/go/16260?t=17&akid=1755%2E564421%2EG2ftOb)

No one knows PA like we do — and together, we’ll win.

Thank you,

Team Casey

(www.ronbegone.com)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. P.O. Box 30295, Fort Lauderdale, FL 33303

| | | **BREAKING: Trump-appointed judge issues ruling that would BAN abortion pills!**

**_It could take effect in just a few days, so we MUST ACT NOW:_**
**[Sign our petition to DEMAND that Trump’s handpicked judges stop undermining our reproductive freedoms >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/12708?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20230411-BREAKING-AbortionPillRuling-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20230411-BREAKING-AbortionPillRuling-ETG-sl1&akid=10430%2E9716520%2Ee9APkJ)**

This ruling makes clear that overturning Roe v. Wade was only the beginning for Trump's far-right judges and justices. To protect our rights and freedoms, we need all hands on deck. We've launched a CRUCIAL petition OPPOSING Trump's far-right judges' attacks on reproductive freedom. But we’re missing your signature from our records, and the deadline is TONIGHT: Your ID | 9716520 ---|--- Signature | MISSING Deadline | TONIGHT | Thanks, Team DSCC If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded. | | The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. | Friend, Looks like I've caught President Biden in another lie! _...But, before you give me too much credit, it's not that hard considering every other sentence is another lie_. A Biden assistant recently told us the truth about the Biden classified document scandal, and it’s worse than the story the Biden Administration has been telling the American people. We learned:
* Biden moved classified documents to three different locations
* Transported them in a personal vehicle and
* Did NOT secure them behind lock and key
* And, we now have sworn testimony that the documents were moved in May 2022, NOT November 2022 like the White House said.

It’s becoming pretty clear there are some BIG issues concerning Biden’s handling of classified documents, but unlike President Trump, the media and Democrats aren’t clamoring for him to be indicted. Instead, they are attacking me for exposing the truth! [**If you can, please help me fight back against this barrage of attacks.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckTGPnDwQhn_N0LGCsdcsBcXtx_EVK0VKc1Eqy2sPrPewzdkQdP8-gnAp0rh4PXrm0TvKTaPtPxuoroD4sCYBIrAXQPz4ubq4PN3t__xaYf4hvrnz9on_AeL8OdHfyQNyIqfsuKVVm5lGCdWTyagpxaXEM2eI2aMpek66oLMRFa97rC9clGQUiQtnl4p4ZhsskBW8LLe34Kca7-daC12bc8VJcODFvuikylXFGII76eCysXnM85R2ow6wS6SXSKfV-khmmwDsdHAU8z7EXAc_REoJsHtqaYKXwUmKUvf53cqY5CFRAOviRorWD8DaOS4EKJbZyRSWqAlYe1gcsSNjFwesPdrYQ63cpOzggbV_sPlTOUq7z7ZdzTZ4uSqn5EGT84Pu1pBP8h7DO0U10JdU-UUNfiY_A2u9HvO317df3ff6HX8ACulHa4C1_4T7gVn7er1Z_nK_ZbEx02rH0SZRAS-GvVcd3O8AAAD__0f1q4E) **The two-tiered system of Justice in America is a top threat to our country. Without equal justice under the law, the very bedrock of America is under threat.** How can the entire Democrat party and media apparatus be cheering for an indictment of President Trump (who could declassify any document he wanted as President!) and have nothing to say about then Vice President Biden being far more careless and far less forthcoming about his handling, transportation, and storage of classified documents? Because the truth and justice don’t matter to them. However, it still matters to me and my Republican colleagues in the House. And for that, the Left is ruthlessly attacking me. [**If you’re able, I’d really appreciate it if you’d send a contribution to my campaign so I can fight back against these smears and defend my credibility****;****it’s essential to our success****.**](http://email.email.a1warroom.com/c/eJxckT2PnDAQhn_N0LHCYz6WguI2hBQrRWmi5CrL2APrDbY5G4Tu30cQLsU1Ll6Pnnn0jrTzZIb3BqobID6MjoAI_AUQ3143G9anvX9LbxWmb-V3W-yf-AUQl_eZ_k-ekAtZaaY9rdpEN7KUA-mEGlZeGRY5R0weDesrvF6JXRUi71nO-6IgHPS1xKGuM5aYBjPkWc7Y_mb5pca-qFWpal1UOZU55Nmx6CLZJkPw3l6Ut8nUPJZljodRB9hFUmugy2ZcIL1PAHbKWwrp4EOqvBsDxQjYPZXQ3glvBQWhhrQ3IkRxSmTAu7CTgnEj8HYJKwGW62JF9GtQBLw9Lc7YkjarBd6ebRyhknaWZnTA23_Y9CktxcNn3y4X453YpJXipInlQb3R5KLog_9DQY70IcU-qN4t5BbgrVNT-rzRr_HH68_5N2Ap3GQ08PZTeByYt19vd5O_9PckNHrezDSZWFaQZ-PRq_L2bwAAAP__uuSr3w) I really appreciate all the support so far, and I promise you I won’t stop until Americans know the truth. _With Courage_ ,

clean_body: They don’t want this getting out. | | | Friend, Looks like I've caught President Biden in another lie! ...But, before you give me too much credit, it's not that hard considering every other sentence is another lie. A Biden assistant recently told us the truth about the Biden classified document scandal, and it’s worse than the story the Biden Administration has been telling the American people. We learned: Biden moved classified documents to three different locations Transported them in a personal vehicle and Did NOT secure them behind lock and key And, we now have sworn testimony that the documents were moved in May 2022, NOT November 2022 like the White House said. It’s becoming pretty clear there are some BIG issues concerning Biden’s handling of classified documents, but unlike President Trump, the media and Democrats aren’t clamoring for him to be indicted. Instead, they are attacking me for exposing the truth! The two-tiered system of Justice in America is a top threat to our country. Without equal justice under the law, the very bedrock of America is under threat. How can the entire Democrat party and media apparatus be cheering for an indictment of President Trump (who could declassify any document he wanted as President!) and have nothing to say about then Vice President Biden being far more careless and far less forthcoming about his handling, transportation, and storage of classified documents? Because the truth and justice don’t matter to them. However, it still matters to me and my Republican colleagues in the House. And for that, the Left is ruthlessly attacking me. I really appreciate all the support so far, and I promise you I won’t stop until Americans know the truth. With Courage , | | | | James Comer Chairman House Oversight Committee | | | | | | | Paid for by Comer for Congress

| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61666061/400754644/-1701983021?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk10-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzNjZDJmYy1iZGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46w8lLmBWg7WNC7s1ePYt0SBs8t7LhPO5u3nPYai5vs=)

Friend –

If you haven’t already heard, one single Trump-appointed judge issued a ruling that could put in place a nationwide ban on medication abortion – the most common way patients get abortion care.
If this ruling stands, medication abortion will be pulled from shelves everywhere – including here in Washington state.

**[We need your help to fight back. Can you chip in $5 right now to show your support for reproductive rights, including access to medication abortion?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61666062/400754645/-1701983021?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk10-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzNjZDJmYy1iZGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46w8lLmBWg7WNC7s1ePYt0SBs8t7LhPO5u3nPYai5vs=)**
This ruling isn’t about science. Medication abortion is safe and effective – in fact, it’s safer than Tylenol. This ruling is about Republicans wanting to control women’s bodies. And I won’t stand for it.

The good news is that this ruling is being appealed and our fight will continue. But it shouldn’t have come to this in the first place – whether or not women can get essential health care should not be for judges or politicians to decide, ever.
[**I’m doing everything I can in the Senate to fight back against cruel, dangerous attempts to control women’s bodies, but I need your help. Pitch in $5 now to show your support.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61666063/400754646/-1701983021?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&refcode=jtk10-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzNjZDJmYy1iZGQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=46w8lLmBWg7WNC7s1ePYt0SBs8t7LhPO5u3nPYai5vs=)

Thank you for being with me in this fight.

Patty

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61666124/400754744/1120393829?refcode=em-wrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlNDE2OS1iZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvvEwI2Jdl-cZW6hmM80_OQSDbDSLnTiJwT-ggFL9Bs=&emci=c2421e63-bed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&emdi=5b5e4169-bed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&ceid=6830379)
**Who’s the Governor of Texas, Greg Abbott or Tucker Carlson?**

This week Fox host Tucker Carlson ran a segment about a man named Daniel Perry who was convicted of murder by a jury this week for killing a protester during a Black Lives Matter rally in Austin.

During the segment, Carlson asked why Greg Abbott had not announced a pardon for Perry, who jurors had decided did not shoot for self-defense.**Less than 24 hours after Tucker’s segment, Abbott announced he would approve a pardon if it reached his desk. **

There are no winners in a murder trial. But Greg Abbott is trying to use this conviction, and the issue of gun violence, to appease Fox News and win political points.

Peter, our governor should be working to make our communities safer with real action on gun violence prevention—not playing politics with a murder trial because Tucker Carlson told him to.

**[If you agree, chip in $15, $20, or whatever you can to support Team Casar and our fight for gun safety legislation.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61666125/400754745/990145661?refcode2=5b5e4169-bed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlNDE2OS1iZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvvEwI2Jdl-cZW6hmM80_OQSDbDSLnTiJwT-ggFL9Bs=)**

Peter, Fox News continues to call the shots in the Republican Party—from pushing Greg Abbott to pardon people like Perry, to blocking any sort of meaningful action on gun violence in Congress.

Greg Abbott says he’s for public safety. But if we zoom out a bit, we see that gun violence has increased on Abbott’s watch. He’s made it legal to open carry weapons of war, has done nothing to protect our children and students like the ones in Uvalde, and continued to take in thousands of dollars from the NRA and gun manufacturers.

**There have already been 13 mass shootings in Texas this year. That should be unacceptable to Governor Abbott—but instead, he’s playing politics to score cheap points. **

**[Help us fight for real action on gun violence—chip in $15, $20, or whatever you can, to support Team Casar. ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/61666129/400754749/990145661?refcode2=5b5e4169-bed8-ed11-8e8b-00224832eb73&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI5NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1YjVlNDE2OS1iZWQ4LWVkMTEtOGU4Yi0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hvvEwI2Jdl-cZW6hmM80_OQSDbDSLnTiJwT-ggFL9Bs=)**

clean_body: Who’s the Governor of Texas, Greg Abbott or Tucker Carlson? This week Fox host Tucker Carlson ran a segment about a man named Daniel Perry who was convicted of murder by a jury this week for killing a protester during a Black Lives Matter rally in Austin. During the segment, Carlson asked why Greg Abbott had not announced a pardon for Perry, who jurors had decided did not shoot for self-defense.Less than 24 hours after Tucker’s segment, Abbott announced he would approve a pardon if it reached his desk. There are no winners in a murder trial. But Greg Abbott is trying to use this conviction, and the issue of gun violence, to appease Fox News and win political points. Peter, our governor should be working to make our communities safer with real action on gun violence prevention—not playing politics with a murder trial because Tucker Carlson told him to. = **= Peter, Fox News continues to call the shots in the Republican Party—from pushing Greg Abbott to pardon people like Perry, to blocking any sort of meaningful action on gun violence in Congress. Greg Abbott says he’s for public safety. But if we zoom out a bit, we see that gun violence has increased on Abbott’s watch. He’s made it legal to open carry weapons of war, has done nothing to protect our children and students like the ones in Uvalde, and continued to take in thousands of dollars from the NRA and gun manufacturers. There have already been 13 mass shootings in Texas this year. That should be unacceptable to Governor Abbott—but instead, he’s playing politics to score cheap points. = Thank you, -Greg Greg Casar Congressman Texas Congressional District 35 ****=** | ****** ---|---

clean_body: I’m encouraged by this opportunity, friend! | Dear Friend, As an Afghanistan veteran and one of the most conservative members of Congress, I am running for U.S. Senate to continue my service to our country and stand up for our cherished American values. | My time spent defending our freedom abroad has only reinforced my will to fight for the safety and security of our nation. When I put on the uniform, it was to defend the American way of life, and today in Congress, I speak up to protect those same values. I will never back down from the fight for our nation. Our country is at a critical juncture, and I am eager to represent conservative voices like yours that have been the foundation of our nation. Help me fulfill my mission to serve our country. In service, | ---|--- Paid for by Banks for Senate Copyright (C) 2023 Banks for Senate, All rights reserved.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Mental health resources
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
_Content warning: This email discusses gun violence._
Peter,
Another community has been torn apart by gun violence. This time in Louisville, Kentucky. Two weeks before, at an elementary school in Tennessee.
The trauma of these events reverberates throughout our nation. Watching events unfold on social media and on the news, it affects us all. The pain of knowing that we are the only country in the world that has accepted gun violence as the status quo.
If you are having a hard time dealing with the weight of these current events, please seek out help. [Our friends at March for Our Lives have put together a list of resources.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/41520?t=1&akid=2364%2E420207%2Ew9FkmI)
Mere thoughts and prayers are not enough and will never suffice. This is a uniquely American epidemic that must be addressed — and **_it must be addressed now._**
Meanwhile, instead of legislating to save lives and ban assault weapons, Republicans are obsessed with banning the bodily autonomy of women and pregnant people. And in Tennessee, in the wake of a school shooting, state Republicans prioritized propriety and ousted two Black lawmakers who protested gun violence on the House floor.
Peter, **regardless of what NRA bank-rolled Republicans tell us, we do not have to accept gun violence in our nation.** I will not stop calling out my colleagues and leaders across the nation who prioritize the second amendment above our children. I will continue fighting to advance common-sense gun control legislation.
My thoughts are with the affected families and communities.
Thank you,
Pramila

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=2&akid=2364%2E420207%2Ew9FkmI)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2364%2E420207%2Ew9FkmI)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: Peter Welch
subject: 2023 is going fast
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT
body:
It’s going to be a pivotal year

# [](https://act.welchforvermont.com/go/144?t=2&akid=1236%2E61531%2ETiUy7N)
Hi There,
It’s been a busy first couple of months since I was sworn in to the Senate. I assembled my team, received my committee assignments, and quickly jumped back into the legislative process.
2023 is going to be a pivotal year in many ways, and I wanted to take a look ahead to what we can expect for the rest of the year.
* Commonsense, bipartisan legislation to help Vermonters: I’ve already introduced legislation to protect the environment and help independent pharmacies. I’ll continue reaching across the aisle to help Vermonters.

* The fight for reproductive rights: Now that the ultraconservative Supreme Court has overturned _Roe_ , we have to do everything we can to protect reproductive rights. Republicans in Congress will continue to try and restrict reproductive freedom even further, and Democrats will have to do everything we can to ensure that every person who wants an abortion can get one.

* Attacks on the LGBTQ+ community: We’ve seen a disturbing trend in states throughout the country working to restrict the rights of the trans community. The right-wing is trying to keep them from competing in sports, stop them from using the correct bathrooms, and keep them from getting gender-affirming care. Trans rights are human rights, and I’ll fight for them in the Senate.

* Fighting climate change with the Farm Bill: Congress needs to re-authorize the Farm Bill this year and, as a member of the Senate Committee on Agriculture, this is a great opportunity for me to focus on fighting climate change in agriculture. We can support small farmers and rebuild rural communities while helping save our planet.

* Implementing the Inflation Reduction Act: Last year we passed the Inflation Reduction Act, the largest climate package in U.S. history. But the work doesn’t end there. My office has been working hard to make sure funding and programs in the law get implemented in Vermont so we can bring down costs for families and help the planet.

When I traveled the state last year and listened to so many of you, I heard about these issues time and time again. I’m going to be laser-focused on them and many others in the Senate.
Thanks,
Peter Welch

---

---
| [ ](https://www.facebook.com/welchforvermont) | [ ](https://twitter.com/WelchForVT) | [ ](https://www.instagram.com/welchforvermont/)
---|---|---

PAID FOR BY WELCH FOR VERMONT

Welch for Vermont
P.O Box 909
Richmond, VT 05477
©2023 Welch for Vermont. All rights reserved.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you believe you received this email in error or wish to no longer receive emails from us, please [unsubscribe here](https://act.welchforvermont.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=3&akid=1236%2E61531%2ETiUy7N).

name: Katie Porter
subject: What issues are you thinking about?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Take the survey.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)
Derek, I’ve got a question for you: [**What issues are you thinking about?**](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20230411/?source=EMAG11_1_SURV_20230411_V1_F&t=2&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)
**[Take the survey ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20230411/?source=EMAG11_1_SURV_20230411_V1_F&t=3&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)**
Our campaign for U.S. Senate is in full swing—which means I’m on the campaign trail doing what I love most: Talking to people like you, hearing your stories, and learning about the issues most important to you and your community.
As much as I would love to, I can’t talk to everyone in person. Which is why I’m sending you this survey—if you have a few free minutes, **[I want to know about the issues that are most important to you:](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20230411/?source=EMAG11_1_SURV_20230411_V1_F&t=4&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)**
**[Take the survey ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/survey/kpem-survey-em-20230411/?source=EMAG11_1_SURV_20230411_V1_F&t=5&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)**
As a former professor, I know oftentimes only those with the highest, loudest hands get called on. Politics can be the same way, as those with resources and power play an outsized role in Washington. That’s why I like to do surveys like these, and hear directly from supporters like you.
Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts with me.
—Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAG11_1_SURV_20230411_V1_F&t=6&refcode2=21021_3422442_qYvmrT&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=7&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=21021%2E3422442%2EqYvmrT)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate

We’ll be frank – Republicans got a _big_ confidence boost from this last election:
**— Republican Joe Lombardo won the Governor’s race by 1.5%,** defeating the Democratic incumbent.
**— Senator Catherine Cortez Masto held off her Republican opponent by 0.77%.** This was the closest Senate race in 2022.
**— We won our battleground race by just 3.9%,** making my district the most competitive in Nevada.
With this momentum, National Republicans will invest unprecedented amounts into flipping Nevada completely red.
[**We have to gear up ahead of the GOP’s millions that they’ll invest in flipping NV-03 – and all of Nevada – bright red.
